authors_text: Lu Yang,Yunlong Wang,Lingqiao Liu,Peng Wang,Lu Chi,Zehuan Yuan,Changhu Wang,Yanning Zhang
title: Center Prediction Loss for Re-identification
title_zh: 重新识别的中心预测损失
abstract: The training loss function that enforces certain training sample distribution patterns plays a critical role in building a re-identification (ReID) system. Besides the basic requirement of discrimination, i.e., the features corresponding to different identities should not be mixed, additional intra-class distribution constraints, such as features from the same identities should be close to their centers, have been adopted to construct losses. Despite the advances of various new loss functions, it is still challenging to strike the balance between the need of reducing the intra-class variation and allowing certain distribution freedom. In this paper, we propose a new loss based on center predictivity, that is, a sample must be positioned in a location of the feature space such that from it we can roughly predict the location of the center of same-class samples. The prediction error is then regarded as a loss called Center Prediction Loss (CPL). We show that, without introducing additional hyper-parameters, this new loss leads to a more flexible intra-class distribution constraint while ensuring the between-class samples are well-separated. Extensive experiments on various real-world ReID datasets show that the proposed loss can achieve superior performance and can also be complementary to existing losses.
summary: The training loss function that enforces certain training sample distribution patterns plays a critical role in building a re-identification (ReID) system. Besides the basic requirement of discrimination, i.e., the features corresponding to different identities should not be mixed, additional intra-class distribution constraints, such as features from the same identities should be close to their centers, have been adopted to construct losses. Despite the advances of various new loss functions, it is still challenging to strike the balance between the need of reducing the intra-class variation and allowing certain distribution freedom. In this paper, we propose a new loss based on center predictivity, that is, a sample must be positioned in a location of the feature space such that from it we can roughly predict the location of the center of same-class samples. The prediction error is then regarded as a loss called Center Prediction Loss (CPL). We show that, without introducing additional hyper-parameters, this new loss leads to a more flexible intra-class distribution constraint while ensuring the between-class samples are well-separated. Extensive experiments on various real-world ReID datasets show that the proposed loss can achieve superior performance and can also be complementary to existing losses.
abstract_zh: 强制执行某些训练样本分布模式的训练损失函数在构建重新识别（ReID）系统中发挥着关键作用。除了区分的基本要求（即不同身份对应的特征不应混合）之外，还采用了额外的类内分布约束（例如来自相同身份的特征应靠近其中心）来构造损失。尽管各种新的损失函数取得了进步，但在减少类内变异的需要和允许一定的分布自由度之间取得平衡仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于中心预测性的新损失，即样本必须位于特征空间的某个位置，以便我们可以粗略地预测同类样本的中心位置。然后，预测误差被视为称为中心预测损失（CPL）的损失。我们证明，在不引入额外的超参数的情况下，这种新的损失会带来更灵活的类内分布约束，同时确保类间样本良好分离。对各种现实世界 ReID 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的损失可以实现卓越的性能，并且还可以对现有损失进行补充。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于中心预测的损失函数（CPL），以改进重新识别（ReID）系统的性能
AI.motivation: 现有损失函数难以平衡类内差异最小化与分布自由度的需求，需更灵活的约束方法
AI.method: 基于中心预测性，通过样本位置预测同类中心位置，将预测误差作为CPL，无需额外超参数
AI.result: 在多个ReID数据集上表现优于现有方法，且可与其他损失互补
AI.conclusion: CPL有效平衡类内分布约束与类间分离，提升ReID性能

title: Human strategic decision making in parametrized games
title_zh: 参数化博弈中的人类战略决策
abstract: Many real-world games contain parameters which can affect payoffs, action spaces, and information states. For fixed values of the parameters, the game can be solved using standard algorithms. However, in many settings agents must act without knowing the values of the parameters that will be encountered in advance. Often the decisions must be made by a human under time and resource constraints, and it is unrealistic to assume that a human can solve the game in real time. We present a new framework that enables human decision makers to make fast decisions without the aid of real-time solvers. We demonstrate applicability to a variety of situations including settings with multiple players and imperfect information.
summary: Many real-world games contain parameters which can affect payoffs, action spaces, and information states. For fixed values of the parameters, the game can be solved using standard algorithms. However, in many settings agents must act without knowing the values of the parameters that will be encountered in advance. Often the decisions must be made by a human under time and resource constraints, and it is unrealistic to assume that a human can solve the game in real time. We present a new framework that enables human decision makers to make fast decisions without the aid of real-time solvers. We demonstrate applicability to a variety of situations including settings with multiple players and imperfect information.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的游戏包含可能影响收益、动作空间和信息状态的参数。对于参数的固定值，可以使用标准算法来求解博弈。然而，在许多设置中，代理必须在不知道提前遇到的参数值的情况下采取行动。通常，决策必须由人类在时间和资源限制下做出，并且假设人类可以实时解决游戏是不现实的。我们提出了一个新的框架，使人类决策者能够在没有实时求解器帮助的情况下快速做出决策。我们展示了对各种情况的适用性，包括多个玩家和不完善信息的设置。

AI.tldr: 提出一种框架，帮助人类在参数化博弈中快速决策，无需实时求解器。
AI.motivation: 现实博弈中参数未知且人类无法实时求解，需快速决策框架。
AI.method: 设计参数化博弈框架，结合预计算策略与启发式规则辅助人类决策。
AI.result: 框架适用于多玩家、不完全信息等复杂场景，提升决策效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效支持人类在参数不确定的博弈中快速决策，具有广泛适用性。

title: Chop Chop BERT: Visual Question Answering by Chopping VisualBERT's Heads
title_zh: Chop Chop BERT：通过砍 VisualBERT 的头来进行视觉问答
abstract: Vision-and-Language (VL) pre-training has shown great potential on many related downstream tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), one of the most popular problems in the VL field. All of these pre-trained models (such as VisualBERT, ViLBERT, LXMERT and UNITER) are built with Transformer, which extends the classical attention mechanism to multiple layers and heads. To investigate why and how these models work on VQA so well, in this paper we explore the roles of individual heads and layers in Transformer models when handling $12$ different types of questions. Specifically, we manually remove (chop) heads (or layers) from a pre-trained VisualBERT model at a time, and test it on different levels of questions to record its performance. As shown in the interesting echelon shape of the result matrices, experiments reveal different heads and layers are responsible for different question types, with higher-level layers activated by higher-level visual reasoning questions. Based on this observation, we design a dynamic chopping module that can automatically remove heads and layers of the VisualBERT at an instance level when dealing with different questions. Our dynamic chopping module can effectively reduce the parameters of the original model by 50%, while only damaging the accuracy by less than 1% on the VQA task.
summary: Vision-and-Language (VL) pre-training has shown great potential on many related downstream tasks, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), one of the most popular problems in the VL field. All of these pre-trained models (such as VisualBERT, ViLBERT, LXMERT and UNITER) are built with Transformer, which extends the classical attention mechanism to multiple layers and heads. To investigate why and how these models work on VQA so well, in this paper we explore the roles of individual heads and layers in Transformer models when handling $12$ different types of questions. Specifically, we manually remove (chop) heads (or layers) from a pre-trained VisualBERT model at a time, and test it on different levels of questions to record its performance. As shown in the interesting echelon shape of the result matrices, experiments reveal different heads and layers are responsible for different question types, with higher-level layers activated by higher-level visual reasoning questions. Based on this observation, we design a dynamic chopping module that can automatically remove heads and layers of the VisualBERT at an instance level when dealing with different questions. Our dynamic chopping module can effectively reduce the parameters of the original model by 50%, while only damaging the accuracy by less than 1% on the VQA task.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言（VL）预训练在许多相关下游任务中显示出巨大的潜力，例如视觉问答（VQA），这是VL领域最流行的问题之一。所有这些预训练模型（例如 VisualBERT、ViLBERT、LXMERT 和 UNITER）都是使用 Transformer 构建的，它将经典的注意力机制扩展到多个层和头。为了研究这些模型在 VQA 上表现良好的原因和方式，在本文中，我们探讨了 Transformer 模型中各个头和层在处理 12 美元不同类型问题时的作用。具体来说，我们一次从预训练的 VisualBERT 模型中手动删除（砍掉）头（或层），并在不同级别的问题上对其进行测试以记录其性能。正如结果矩阵有趣的梯形形状所示，实验表明不同的头和层负责不同的问题类型，较高级别的层由较高级别的视觉推理问题激活。基于这一观察，我们设计了一个动态斩波模块，可以在处理不同问题时在实例级别自动删除 VisualBERT 的头和层。我们的动态斩波模块可以有效地将原始模型的参数减少 50%，而在 VQA 任务上仅损害不到 1% 的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过移除VisualBERT模型中的注意力头和层来优化视觉问答（VQA）任务的模型效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言预训练模型（如VisualBERT）结构复杂，参数冗余，但其内部不同头和层对不同问题类型的贡献尚不明确，需探索高效剪枝方法。
AI.method: 手动移除VisualBERT的单个头或层，测试其在12类问题上的性能变化，分析各层头的作用，并设计动态剪枝模块实现实例级自动移除。
AI.result: 动态剪枝模块使模型参数减少50%，VQA任务准确率仅下降不足1%。
AI.conclusion: 不同层头负责不同复杂度的问题，动态剪枝能有效提升模型效率且保持性能，为视觉问答模型优化提供新思路。

As shown in the interesting echelon shape of the result matrices, experiments reveal different heads and layers are responsible for different question types, with higher-level layers activated by higher-level visual reasoning questions. Based on this observation, we design a dynamic chopping module that can automatically remove heads and layers of the VisualBERT at an instance level when dealing with different questions. Our dynamic chopping module can effectively reduce the parameters of the original model by 50%, while only damaging the accuracy by less than 1% on the VQA task. 视觉和语言（VL）预训练在许多相关下游任务中显示出巨大的潜力，例如视觉问答（VQA），这是VL领域最流行的问题之一。所有这些预训练模型（例如 VisualBERT、ViLBERT、LXMERT 和 UNITER）都是使用 Transformer 构建的，它将经典的注意力机制扩展到多个层和头。为了研究这些模型在 VQA 上表现良好的原因和方式，在本文中，我们探讨了 Transformer 模型中各个头和层在处理 12 美元不同类型问题时的作用。具体来说，我们一次从预训练的 VisualBERT 模型中手动删除（砍掉）头（或层），并在不同级别的问题上对其进行测试以记录其性能。正如结果矩阵有趣的梯形形状所示，实验表明不同的头和层负责不同的问题类型，较高级别的层由较高级别的视觉推理问题激活。基于这一观察，我们设计了一个动态斩波模块，可以在处理不同问题时在实例级别自动删除 VisualBERT 的头和层。我们的动态斩波模块可以有效地将原始模型的参数减少 50%，而在 VQA 任务上仅损害不到 1% 的精度。 本文提出通过移除VisualBERT模型中的注意力头和层来优化视觉问答（VQA）任务的模型效率。 Chenyu Gao,Qi Zhu,Peng Wang,Qi Wu cs.CV

title: DPR-CAE: Capsule Autoencoder with Dynamic Part Representation for Image Parsing
title_zh: DPR-CAE：具有用于图像解析的动态部分表示的胶囊自动编码器
comment: The content of our article needs to be revised, and the content of the paper is not very accurate
comments: The content of our article needs to be revised, and the content of the paper is not very accurate
abstract: Parsing an image into a hierarchy of objects, parts, and relations is important and also challenging in many computer vision tasks. This paper proposes a simple and effective capsule autoencoder to address this issue, called DPR-CAE. In our approach, the encoder parses the input into a set of part capsules, including pose, intensity, and dynamic vector. The decoder introduces a novel dynamic part representation (DPR) by combining the dynamic vector and a shared template bank. These part representations are then regulated by corresponding capsules to composite the final output in an interpretable way. Besides, an extra translation-invariant module is proposed to avoid directly learning the uncertain scene-part relationship in our DPR-CAE, which makes the resulting method achieves a promising performance gain on $rm$-MNIST and $rm$-Fashion-MNIST. % to model the scene-object relationship DPR-CAE can be easily combined with the existing stacked capsule autoencoder and experimental results show it significantly improves performance in terms of unsupervised object classification. Our code is available in the Appendix.
summary: Parsing an image into a hierarchy of objects, parts, and relations is important and also challenging in many computer vision tasks. This paper proposes a simple and effective capsule autoencoder to address this issue, called DPR-CAE. In our approach, the encoder parses the input into a set of part capsules, including pose, intensity, and dynamic vector. The decoder introduces a novel dynamic part representation (DPR) by combining the dynamic vector and a shared template bank. These part representations are then regulated by corresponding capsules to composite the final output in an interpretable way. Besides, an extra translation-invariant module is proposed to avoid directly learning the uncertain scene-part relationship in our DPR-CAE, which makes the resulting method achieves a promising performance gain on $rm$-MNIST and $rm$-Fashion-MNIST. % to model the scene-object relationship DPR-CAE can be easily combined with the existing stacked capsule autoencoder and experimental results show it significantly improves performance in terms of unsupervised object classification. Our code is available in the Appendix.
abstract_zh: 在许多计算机视觉任务中，将图像解析为对象、部分和关系的层次结构非常重要，同时也具有挑战性。本文提出了一种简单有效的胶囊自动编码器来解决这个问题，称为 DPR-CAE。在我们的方法中，编码器将输入解析为一组部分胶囊，包括姿势、强度和动态向量。解码器通过结合动态向量和共享模板库引入了一种新颖的动态部分表示（DPR）。然后，这些部分表示由相应的胶囊调节，以可解释的方式合成最终输出。此外，还提出了一个额外的平移不变模块来避免直接学习 DPR-CAE 中不确定的场景部分关系，这使得所得方法在 $rm$-MNIST 和 $rm$-Fashion-MNIST 上取得了可喜的性能增益。 % 对场景-物体关系进行建模 DPR-CAE 可以轻松地与现有的堆叠胶囊自动编码器相结合，实验结果表明它显着提高了无监督物体分类方面的性能。我们的代码可在附录中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DPR-CAE的胶囊自编码器，用于图像解析任务，通过动态部分表示和可解释的结构提升性能。
AI.motivation: 图像解析需要将输入分解为层次化的物体、部分及关系，但现有方法在处理不确定的场景-部分关系时存在挑战，需设计更有效的模型。
AI.method: 编码器将输入解析为包含姿态、强度和动态向量的部分胶囊；解码器通过结合动态向量与共享模板库生成动态部分表示，并引入平移不变模块避免直接学习不确定关系。
AI.result: 在rm-MNIST和rm-Fashion-MNIST数据集上取得显著性能提升，且与现有堆叠胶囊自编码器结合后，在无监督物体分类任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DPR-CAE通过动态部分表示和结构设计有效解决了图像解析问题，为相关任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: Flattening Multiparameter Hierarchical Clustering Functors
title_zh: 展平多参数层次聚类函子
abstract: We bring together topological data analysis, applied category theory, and machine learning to study multiparameter hierarchical clustering. We begin by introducing a procedure for flattening multiparameter hierarchical clusterings. We demonstrate that this procedure is a functor from a category of multiparameter hierarchical partitions to a category of binary integer programs. We also include empirical results demonstrating its effectiveness. Next, we introduce a Bayesian update algorithm for learning clustering parameters from data. We demonstrate that the composition of this algorithm with our flattening procedure satisfies a consistency property.
summary: We bring together topological data analysis, applied category theory, and machine learning to study multiparameter hierarchical clustering. We begin by introducing a procedure for flattening multiparameter hierarchical clusterings. We demonstrate that this procedure is a functor from a category of multiparameter hierarchical partitions to a category of binary integer programs. We also include empirical results demonstrating its effectiveness. Next, we introduce a Bayesian update algorithm for learning clustering parameters from data. We demonstrate that the composition of this algorithm with our flattening procedure satisfies a consistency property.
abstract_zh: 我们将拓扑数据分析、应用范畴论和机器学习结合起来来研究多参数层次聚类。我们首先介绍一个扁平化多参数层次聚类的过程。我们证明该过程是从多参数分层分区类别到二进制整数程序类别的函子。我们还包括证明其有效性的实证结果。接下来，我们介绍一种用于从数据中学习聚类参数的贝叶斯更新算法。我们证明该算法与我们的展平过程的组合满足一致性属性。

AI.tldr: 本文结合拓扑数据分析、应用范畴论和机器学习，提出将多参数分层聚类转化为二进制整数规划的函子方法，并设计贝叶斯更新算法实现参数学习。
AI.motivation: 多参数分层聚类在处理复杂数据时面临理论框架不统一和计算可扩展性挑战，需融合不同领域方法提升分析能力。
AI.method: 通过构建多参数分层分区到二进制整数规划的函子映射，并结合贝叶斯更新算法实现参数自适应学习，验证组合方法的一致性。
AI.result: 实证表明方法有效，且算法组合后满足理论一致性，证明了跨领域方法融合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多参数聚类提供了新的数学框架，展示了范畴论与机器学习结合在数据分析中的潜力。

title: Perceptual Image Quality Assessment with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行感知图像质量评估
comment: Accepted to NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2021. 1st Place in NTIRE 2021 perceptual IQA challenge. https://github.com/manricheon/IQT
comments: Accepted to NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2021. 1st Place in NTIRE 2021 perceptual IQA challenge. https://github.com/manricheon/IQT
abstract: In this paper, we propose an image quality transformer (IQT) that successfully applies a transformer architecture to a perceptual full-reference image quality assessment (IQA) task. Perceptual representation becomes more important in image quality assessment. In this context, we extract the perceptual feature representations from each of input images using a convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone. The extracted feature maps are fed into the transformer encoder and decoder in order to compare a reference and distorted images. Following an approach of the transformer-based vision models, we use extra learnable quality embedding and position embedding. The output of the transformer is passed to a prediction head in order to predict a final quality score. The experimental results show that our proposed model has an outstanding performance for the standard IQA datasets. For a large-scale IQA dataset containing output images of generative model, our model also shows the promising results. The proposed IQT was ranked first among 13 participants in the NTIRE 2021 perceptual image quality assessment challenge. Our work will be an opportunity to further expand the approach for the perceptual IQA task.
summary: In this paper, we propose an image quality transformer (IQT) that successfully applies a transformer architecture to a perceptual full-reference image quality assessment (IQA) task. Perceptual representation becomes more important in image quality assessment. In this context, we extract the perceptual feature representations from each of input images using a convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone. The extracted feature maps are fed into the transformer encoder and decoder in order to compare a reference and distorted images. Following an approach of the transformer-based vision models, we use extra learnable quality embedding and position embedding. The output of the transformer is passed to a prediction head in order to predict a final quality score. The experimental results show that our proposed model has an outstanding performance for the standard IQA datasets. For a large-scale IQA dataset containing output images of generative model, our model also shows the promising results. The proposed IQT was ranked first among 13 participants in the NTIRE 2021 perceptual image quality assessment challenge. Our work will be an opportunity to further expand the approach for the perceptual IQA task.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种图像质量转换器（IQT），它成功地将转换器架构应用于感知全参考图像质量评估（IQA）任务。感知表征在图像质量评估中变得更加重要。在这种情况下，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）主干从每个输入图像中提取感知特征表示。提取的特征图被馈送到变换器编码器和解码器中，以便比较参考图像和失真图像。遵循基于变压器的视觉模型的方法，我们使用额外的可学习质量嵌入和位置嵌入。转换器的输出被传递到预测头以预测最终质量分数。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型对于标准 IQA 数据集具有出色的性能。对于包含生成模型输出图像的大规模 IQA 数据集，我们的模型也显示了有希望的结果。所提出的 IQT 在 NTIRE 2021 感知图像质量评估挑战赛的 13 名参与者中排名第一。我们的工作将是进一步扩展感知 IQA 任务方法的机会。

AI.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的图像质量评估模型（IQT），用于全参考感知图像质量评估任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在感知特征建模上存在局限，需更有效的模型来提升图像质量评估的准确性。
AI.method: 采用CNN提取感知特征，结合Transformer编码器-解码器结构进行参考与失真图像比较，引入可学习的质量嵌入和位置嵌入，最终通过预测头输出质量评分。
AI.result: 在标准IQA数据集和生成模型输出数据集上均取得优异性能，在NTIRE 2021挑战赛中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 验证了Transformer在感知图像质量评估中的有效性，为后续研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Perceptual Image Quality Assessment with Transformers 使用 Transformer 进行感知图像质量评估 In this paper, we propose an image quality transformer (IQT) that successfully applies a transformer architecture to a perceptual full-reference image quality assessment (IQA) task. Perceptual representation becomes more important in image quality assessment. In this context, we extract the perceptual feature representations from each of input images using a convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone. The extracted feature maps are fed into the transformer encoder and decoder in order to compare a reference and distorted images. Following an approach of the transformer-based vision models, we use extra learnable quality embedding and position embedding. The output of the transformer is passed to a prediction head in order to predict a final quality score. The experimental results show that our proposed model has an outstanding performance for the standard IQA datasets. For a large-scale IQA dataset containing output images of generative model, our model also shows the promising results. The proposed IQT was ranked first among 13 participants in the NTIRE 2021 perceptual image quality assessment challenge. Our work will be an opportunity to further expand the approach for the perceptual IQA task. 在本文中，我们提出了一种图像质量转换器（IQT），它成功地将转换器架构应用于感知全参考图像质量评估（IQA）任务。感知表征在图像质量评估中变得更加重要。在这种情况下，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）主干从每个输入图像中提取感知特征表示。提取的特征图被馈送到变换器编码器和解码器中，以便比较参考图像和失真图像。遵循基于变压器的视觉模型的方法，我们使用额外的可学习质量嵌入和位置嵌入。转换器的输出被传递到预测头以预测最终质量分数。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型对于标准 IQA 数据集具有出色的性能。对于包含生成模型输出图像的大规模 IQA 数据集，我们的模型也显示了有希望的结果。所提出的 IQT 在 NTIRE 2021 感知图像质量评估挑战赛的 13 名参与者中排名第一。我们的工作将是进一步扩展感知 IQA 任务方法的机会。 提出基于Transformer的图像质量评估模型（IQT），用于全参考感知图像质量评估任务。 Manri Cheon,Sung-Jun Yoon,Byungyeon Kang,Junwoo Lee cs.CV,eess.IV

title: CoSformer: Detecting Co-Salient Object with Transformers
title_zh: CoSformer：使用 Transformer 检测共同显着对象
abstract: Co-Salient Object Detection (CoSOD) aims at simulating the human visual system to discover the common and salient objects from a group of relevant images. Recent methods typically develop sophisticated deep learning based models have greatly improved the performance of CoSOD task. But there are still two major drawbacks that need to be further addressed, 1) sub-optimal inter-image relationship modeling; 2) lacking consideration of inter-image separability. In this paper, we propose the Co-Salient Object Detection Transformer (CoSformer) network to capture both salient and common visual patterns from multiple images. By leveraging Transformer architecture, the proposed method address the influence of the input orders and greatly improve the stability of the CoSOD task. We also introduce a novel concept of inter-image separability. We construct a contrast learning scheme to modeling the inter-image separability and learn more discriminative embedding space to distinguish true common objects from noisy objects. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmarks, i.e., CoCA, CoSOD3k, and Cosal2015, demonstrate that our CoSformer outperforms cutting-edge models and achieves the new state-of-the-art. We hope that CoSformer can motivate future research for more visual co-analysis tasks.
summary: Co-Salient Object Detection (CoSOD) aims at simulating the human visual system to discover the common and salient objects from a group of relevant images. Recent methods typically develop sophisticated deep learning based models have greatly improved the performance of CoSOD task. But there are still two major drawbacks that need to be further addressed, 1) sub-optimal inter-image relationship modeling; 2) lacking consideration of inter-image separability. In this paper, we propose the Co-Salient Object Detection Transformer (CoSformer) network to capture both salient and common visual patterns from multiple images. By leveraging Transformer architecture, the proposed method address the influence of the input orders and greatly improve the stability of the CoSOD task. We also introduce a novel concept of inter-image separability. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmarks, i.e., CoCA, CoSOD3k, and Cosal2015, demonstrate that our CoSformer outperforms cutting-edge models and achieves the new state-of-the-art. abstract_zh: 共同显着目标检测（CoSOD）旨在模拟人类视觉系统，从一组相关图像中发现共同且显着的目标。最近的方法通常开发复杂的基于深度学习的模型，极大地提高了 CoSOD 任务的性能。但仍然有两个主要缺点需要进一步解决，1）图像间关系建模次优； 2）缺乏对图像间可分离性的考虑。在本文中，我们提出了共同显着目标检测变压器（CoSformer）网络来从多个图像中捕获显着和常见的视觉模式。通过利用 Transformer 架构，该方法解决了输入顺序的影响，大大提高了 CoSOD 任务的稳定性。我们还引入了图像间可分离性的新概念。我们构建了一种对比学习方案来对图像间可分离性进行建模，并学习更具辨别力的嵌入空间来区分真正的常见对象和噪声对象。对三个具有挑战性的基准（即 CoCA、CoSOD3k 和 Cosal2015）进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 CoSformer 优于尖端模型并达到了新的最先进水平。我们希望 CoSformer 能够激发未来更多视觉协同分析任务的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoSformer网络，利用Transformer架构改进多图像共显著物体检测任务（CoSOD），通过建模跨图像关系和可分性提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CoSOD方法存在跨图像关系建模不完善和缺乏跨图像可分性考虑的缺陷，需进一步提升检测稳定性与准确性。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的CoSformer网络，通过自注意力机制消除输入顺序影响，并引入跨图像可分性概念，结合对比学习构建判别性嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在CoCA、CoSOD3k和Cosal2015三个基准数据集上，CoSformer均超越现有最优模型，达到新的SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: CoSformer为多图像视觉共分析任务提供了新思路，有望推动相关领域研究进展。

title: Cross-lingual hate speech detection based on multilingual domain-specific word embeddings
title_zh: 基于多语言特定领域词嵌入的跨语言仇恨语音检测
abstract: Automatic hate speech detection in online social networks is an important open problem in Natural Language Processing (NLP). Hate speech is a multidimensional issue, strongly dependant on language and cultural factors. Despite its relevance, research on this topic has been almost exclusively devoted to English. Most supervised learning resources, such as labeled datasets and NLP tools, have been created for this same language. Considering that a large portion of users worldwide speak in languages other than English, there is an important need for creating efficient approaches for multilingual hate speech detection. In this work we propose to address the problem of multilingual hate speech detection from the perspective of transfer learning. Our goal is to determine if knowledge from one particular language can be used to classify other language, and to determine effective ways to achieve this. We propose a hate specific data representation and evaluate its effectiveness against general-purpose universal representations most of which, unlike our proposed model, have been trained on massive amounts of data. We focus on a cross-lingual setting, in which one needs to classify hate speech in one language without having access to any labeled data for that language. We show that the use of our simple yet specific multilingual hate representations improves classification results. We explain this with a qualitative analysis showing that our specific representation is able to capture some common patterns in how hate speech presents itself in different languages. Our proposal constitutes, to the best of our knowledge, the first attempt for constructing multilingual specific-task representations. Despite its simplicity, our model outperformed the previous approaches for most of the experimental setups. Our findings can orient future solutions toward the use of domain-specific representations.

abstract_zh: 在线社交网络中的自动仇恨言论检测是自然语言处理（NLP）中的一个重要的开放问题。仇恨言论是一个多层面的问题，很大程度上取决于语言和文化因素。尽管具有相关性，但对该主题的研究几乎完全专注于英语。大多数监督学习资源（例如标记数据集和 NLP 工具）都是针对同一语言创建的。考虑到全球很大一部分用户使用英语以外的语言，因此非常需要创建有效的多语言仇恨言论检测方法。在这项工作中，我们建议从迁移学习的角度解决多语言仇恨语音检测问题。我们的目标是确定一种特定语言的知识是否可以用于对其他语言进行分类，并确定实现这一目标的有效方法。我们提出了一种讨厌的特定数据表示，并根据通用通用表示评估其有效性，其中大多数表示与我们提出的模型不同，是在大量数据上进行训练的。我们专注于跨语言环境，在这种环境中，人们需要对一种语言的仇恨言论进行分类，而无需访问该语言的任何标记数据。我们证明，使用简单而具体的多语言仇恨表示可以改善分类结果。我们通过定性分析来解释这一点，表明我们的具体表示能够捕获仇恨言论在不同语言中的呈现方式的一些常见模式。据我们所知，我们的建议是构建多语言特定任务表示的首次尝试。尽管很简单，但我们的模型在大多数实验设置中都优于以前的方法。我们的研究结果可以将未来的解决方案导向使用特定于领域的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多语言领域特定词嵌入的跨语言仇恨言论检测方法，旨在通过迁移学习解决非英语语言仇恨言论检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有仇恨言论检测研究主要集中在英语，缺乏针对其他语言的有效解决方案，而全球大量用户使用非英语语言，亟需跨语言检测方法。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习框架，构建仇恨言论特定的多语言词嵌入表示，并在无目标语言标注数据的情况下进行跨语言分类，通过定性分析验证表示的有效性。
AI.result: 提出的领域特定表示在多数实验设置中优于现有方法，能捕捉不同语言中仇恨言论的共性模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次尝试构建多语言任务特定表示，证明领域特定嵌入在跨语言仇恨检测中的有效性，为未来研究提供方向。

Our proposal constitutes, to the best of our knowledge, the first attempt for constructing multilingual specific-task representations. Despite its simplicity, our model outperformed the previous approaches for most of the experimental setups. Our findings can orient future solutions toward the use of domain-specific representations. 在线社交网络中的自动仇恨言论检测是自然语言处理（NLP）中的一个重要的开放问题。仇恨言论是一个多层面的问题，很大程度上取决于语言和文化因素。尽管具有相关性，但对该主题的研究几乎完全专注于英语。大多数监督学习资源（例如标记数据集和 NLP 工具）都是针对同一语言创建的。考虑到全球很大一部分用户使用英语以外的语言，因此非常需要创建有效的多语言仇恨言论检测方法。在这项工作中，我们建议从迁移学习的角度解决多语言仇恨语音检测问题。我们的目标是确定一种特定语言的知识是否可以用于对其他语言进行分类，并确定实现这一目标的有效方法。我们提出了一种讨厌的特定数据表示，并根据通用通用表示评估其有效性，其中大多数表示与我们提出的模型不同，是在大量数据上进行训练的。我们专注于跨语言环境，在这种环境中，人们需要对一种语言的仇恨言论进行分类，而无需访问该语言的任何标记数据。我们证明，使用简单而具体的多语言仇恨表示可以改善分类结果。我们通过定性分析来解释这一点，表明我们的具体表示能够捕获仇恨言论在不同语言中的呈现方式的一些常见模式。据我们所知，我们的建议是构建多语言特定任务表示的首次尝试。尽管很简单，但我们的模型在大多数实验设置中都优于以前的方法。我们的研究结果可以将未来的解决方案导向使用特定于领域的表示。 本文提出一种基于多语言领域特定词嵌入的跨语言仇恨言论检测方法，旨在通过迁移学习解决非英语语言仇恨言论检测的挑战。 Aymé Arango,Jorge Pérez,Barbara Poblete cs.CL,cs.AI

title: MOOD: Multi-level Out-of-distribution Detection
title_zh: MOOD：多级分布外检测
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential to prevent anomalous inputs from causing a model to fail during deployment. While improved OOD detection methods have emerged, they often rely on the final layer outputs and require a full feedforward pass for any given input. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, multi-level out-of-distribution detection MOOD, which exploits intermediate classifier outputs for dynamic and efficient OOD inference. We explore and establish a direct relationship between the OOD data complexity and optimal exit level, and show that easy OOD examples can be effectively detected early without propagating to deeper layers. At each exit, the OOD examples can be distinguished through our proposed adjusted energy score, which is both empirically and theoretically suitable for networks with multiple classifiers. We extensively evaluate MOOD across 10 OOD datasets spanning a wide range of complexities. Experiments demonstrate that MOOD achieves up to 71.05% computational reduction in inference, while maintaining competitive OOD detection performance.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential to prevent anomalous inputs from causing a model to fail during deployment. While improved OOD detection methods have emerged, they often rely on the final layer outputs and require a full feedforward pass for any given input. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, multi-level out-of-distribution detection MOOD, which exploits intermediate classifier outputs for dynamic and efficient OOD inference. We explore and establish a direct relationship between the OOD data complexity and optimal exit level, and show that easy OOD examples can be effectively detected early without propagating to deeper layers. At each exit, the OOD examples can be distinguished through our proposed adjusted energy score, which is both empirically and theoretically suitable for networks with multiple classifiers. We extensively evaluate MOOD across 10 OOD datasets spanning a wide range of complexities. Experiments demonstrate that MOOD achieves up to 71.05% computational reduction in inference, while maintaining competitive OOD detection performance.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 检测对于防止异常输入导致模型在部署期间失败至关重要。虽然改进的 OOD 检测方法已经出现，但它们通常依赖于最后一层的输出，并且需要对任何给定输入进行完整的前馈传递。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即多级分布外检测 MOOD，它利用中间分类器输出进行动态且高效的 OOD 推理。我们探索并建立了 OOD 数据复杂性和最佳退出级别之间的直接关系，并表明简单的 OOD 示例可以尽早有效地检测到，而无需传播到更深的层。在每个出口处，OOD 示例可以通过我们提出的调整能量得分来区分，这在经验上和理论上都适合具有多个分类器的网络。我们广泛评估了 10 个涵盖各种复杂性的 OOD 数据集的 MOOD。实验表明，MOOD 的推理计算量减少了高达 71.05%，同时保持了具有竞争力的 OOD 检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MOOD的多级分布外检测框架，旨在提高分布外检测的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的分布外检测方法通常依赖于最终层输出并需要完整的前向传播，这在计算上效率较低。因此，需要一种更高效且动态的检测方法。
AI.method: MOOD框架利用中间分类器的输出进行动态且高效的分布外检测，并提出了一种调整后的能量分数来区分分布外样本。
AI.result: 在10个不同复杂度的分布外数据集上，MOOD实现了高达71.05%的计算量减少，同时保持了竞争力的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: MOOD框架通过利用中间分类器输出和调整能量分数，实现了高效且有效的分布外检测，为实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Carola Sundaramoorthy,Lin Ziwen Kelvin,Mahak Sarin,Shubham Gupta
title: End-to-End Attention-based Image Captioning
title_zh: 基于注意力的端到端图像描述
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of image captioning specifically for molecular translation where the result would be a predicted chemical notation in InChI format for a given molecular structure. Current approaches mainly follow rule-based or CNN+RNN based methodology. However, they seem to underperform on noisy images and images with small number of distinguishable features. To overcome this, we propose an end-to-end transformer model. When compared to attention-based techniques, our proposed model outperforms on molecular datasets.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of image captioning specifically for molecular translation where the result would be a predicted chemical notation in InChI format for a given molecular structure. Current approaches mainly follow rule-based or CNN+RNN based methodology. However, they seem to underperform on noisy images and images with small number of distinguishable features. To overcome this, we propose an end-to-end transformer model. When compared to attention-based techniques, our proposed model outperforms on molecular datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们专门解决了分子翻译的图像字幕问题，其结果将是给定分子结构的 InChI 格式的预测化学符号。当前的方法主要遵循基于规则或基于 CNN+RNN 的方法。然而，它们似乎在噪声图像和具有少量可区分特征的图像上表现不佳。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种端到端变压器模型。与基于注意力的技术相比，我们提出的模型在分子数据集上的表现优于。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的基于注意力机制的图像描述生成模型，专门用于分子结构的图像到InChI化学格式的翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于规则或CNN+RNN的方法在处理噪声图像或特征较少的分子结构图像时表现不佳，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计端到端的Transformer模型，利用自注意力机制直接学习分子图像与InChI表示之间的映射关系。
AI.result: 在分子图像数据集上，该模型相比传统注意力机制方法取得更优的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构有效解决了分子图像描述生成中的特征提取与噪声鲁棒性问题，为化学领域提供新方法。

authors_text: Pola Lydia Lagari,Lefteri H. Tsoukalas,Salar Safarkhani,Isaac E. Lagaris
title: Eliminating Multicollinearity Issues in Neural Network Ensembles: Incremental, Negatively Correlated, Optimal Convex Blending
title_zh: 消除神经网络集成中的多重共线性问题：增量、负相关、最优凸混合
abstract: Given a {features, target} dataset, we introduce an incremental algorithm that constructs an aggregate regressor, using an ensemble of neural networks. It is well known that ensemble methods suffer from the multicollinearity issue, which is the manifestation of redundancy arising mainly due to the common training-dataset. In the present incremental approach, at each stage we optimally blend the aggregate regressor with a newly trained neural network under a convexity constraint which, if necessary, induces negative correlations. Under this framework, collinearity issues do not arise at all, rendering so the method both accurate and robust.
summary: Given a {features, target} dataset, we introduce an incremental algorithm that constructs an aggregate regressor, using an ensemble of neural networks. It is well known that ensemble methods suffer from the multicollinearity issue, which is the manifestation of redundancy arising mainly due to the common training-dataset. In the present incremental approach, at each stage we optimally blend the aggregate regressor with a newly trained neural network under a convexity constraint which, if necessary, induces negative correlations. Under this framework, collinearity issues do not arise at all, rendering so the method both accurate and robust.
abstract_zh: 给定一个{特征，目标}数据集，我们引入一种增量算法，该算法使用神经网络集成来构造聚合回归器。众所周知，集成方法存在多重共线性问题，这是主要由于公共训练数据集而产生的冗余的表现。在目前的增量方法中，在每个阶段，我们在凸性约束下将聚合回归量与新训练的神经网络进行最佳混合，如有必要，会引起负相关。在这个框架下，根本不会出现共线性问题，使得该方法既准确又鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增量算法，通过最优凸组合消除神经网络集成中的多重共线性问题，构建准确稳健的聚合回归器。
AI.motivation: 集成方法因共享训练数据易产生多重共线性，导致冗余和性能下降，需解决此问题以提高准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用增量算法，每阶段在凸约束下最优融合新训练神经网络，必要时引入负相关以消除共线性。
AI.result: 有效消除多重共线性，提升模型准确性和稳健性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸组合和负相关机制成功消除共线性，为神经网络集成提供高效稳健的解决方案。

It is well known that ensemble methods suffer from the multicollinearity issue, which is the manifestation of redundancy arising mainly due to the common training-dataset. In the present incremental approach, at each stage we optimally blend the aggregate regressor with a newly trained neural network under a convexity constraint which, if necessary, induces negative correlations. Under this framework, collinearity issues do not arise at all, rendering so the method both accurate and robust. 给定一个{特征，目标}数据集，我们引入一种增量算法，该算法使用神经网络集成来构造聚合回归器。众所周知，集成方法存在多重共线性问题，这是主要由于公共训练数据集而产生的冗余的表现。在目前的增量方法中，在每个阶段，我们在凸性约束下将聚合回归量与新训练的神经网络进行最佳混合，如有必要，会引起负相关。在这个框架下，根本不会出现共线性问题，使得该方法既准确又鲁棒。 本文提出了一种增量算法，通过最优凸组合消除神经网络集成中的多重共线性问题，构建准确稳健的聚合回归器。 Pola Lydia Lagari,Lefteri H. Tsoukalas,Salar Safarkhani,Isaac E. Lagaris cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

title: Invariant Extended Kalman Filtering Using Two Position Receivers for Extended Pose Estimation
title_zh: 使用两个位置接收器的不变扩展卡尔曼滤波进行扩展姿态估计
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, presented at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, presented at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: This paper considers the use of two position receivers and an inertial measurement unit (IMU) to estimate the position, velocity, and attitude of a rigid body, collectively called extended pose. The measurement model consisting of the position of one receiver and the relative position between the two receivers is left invariant, enabling the use of the invariant extended Kalman filter (IEKF) framework. The IEKF possesses various advantages over the standard multiplicative extended Kalman filter, such as state-estimate-independent Jacobians. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that the two-receiver IEKF approach yields improved estimates over a two-receiver multiplicative extended Kalman filter (MEKF) and a single-receiver IEKF approach. An experiment further validates the proposed approach, confirming that the two-receiver IEKF has improved performance over the other filters considered.
summary: This paper considers the use of two position receivers and an inertial measurement unit (IMU) to estimate the position, velocity, and attitude of a rigid body, collectively called extended pose. The measurement model consisting of the position of one receiver and the relative position between the two receivers is left invariant, enabling the use of the invariant extended Kalman filter (IEKF) framework. The IEKF possesses various advantages over the standard multiplicative extended Kalman filter, such as state-estimate-independent Jacobians. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that the two-receiver IEKF approach yields improved estimates over a two-receiver multiplicative extended Kalman filter (MEKF) and a single-receiver IEKF approach. An experiment further validates the proposed approach, confirming that the two-receiver IEKF has improved performance over the other filters considered.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑使用两个位置接收器和一个惯性测量单元（IMU）来估计刚体的位置、速度和姿态，统称为扩展位姿。由一个接收器的位置和两个接收器之间的相对位置组成的测量模型保持不变，从而可以使用不变的扩展卡尔曼滤波器（IEKF）框架。与标准乘法扩展卡尔曼滤波器（例如状态估计无关的雅可比行列式）相比，IEKF 具有多种优势。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，与两个接收器乘法扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (MEKF) 和单接收器 IEKF 方法相比，两个接收器 IEKF 方法产生了改进的估计。实验进一步验证了所提出的方法，确认双接收器 IEKF 比其他考虑的滤波器具有更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用两个位置接收器和惯性测量单元（IMU）结合不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（IEKF）框架，实现对刚体扩展姿态（位置、速度和姿态）的估计。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波方法（如MEKF）存在雅可比矩阵依赖状态估计的问题，而IEKF具有状态估计无关的雅可比矩阵优势，但需构建合适的不变测量模型。通过增加接收器数量可提升定位鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建包含单接收器位置和双接收器相对位置的不变测量模型，基于IEKF框架进行扩展姿态估计，通过蒙特卡洛仿真和实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真和实验证明，双接收器IEKF在估计精度和鲁棒性上优于双接收器MEKF和单接收器IEKF方法。
AI.conclusion: 双接收器IEKF方法在扩展姿态估计任务中表现出更优性能，验证了不变滤波框架在多传感器融合中的有效性。

title: Pyramid Medical Transformer for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的 Pyramid Medical Transformer
abstract: Deep neural networks have been a prevailing technique in the field of medical image processing. However, the most popular convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based methods for medical image segmentation are imperfect because they model long-range dependencies by stacking layers or enlarging filters. Transformers and the self-attention mechanism are recently proposed to effectively learn long-range dependencies by modeling all pairs of word-to-word attention regardless of their positions. The idea has also been extended to the computer vision field by creating and treating image patches as embeddings. Considering the computation complexity for whole image self-attention, current transformer-based models settle for a rigid partitioning scheme that potentially loses informative relations. Besides, current medical transformers model global context on full resolution images, leading to unnecessary computation costs. To address these issues, we developed a novel method to integrate multi-scale attention and CNN feature extraction using a pyramidal network architecture, namely Pyramid Medical Transformer (PMTrans). The PMTrans captured multi-range relations by working on multi-resolution images. An adaptive partitioning scheme was implemented to retain informative relations and to access different receptive fields efficiently. Experimental results on three medical image datasets (gland segmentation, MoNuSeg, and HECKTOR datasets) showed that PMTrans outperformed the latest CNN-based and transformer-based models for medical image segmentation.
summary: Deep neural networks have been a prevailing technique in the field of medical image processing. However, the most popular convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based methods for medical image segmentation are imperfect because they model long-range dependencies by stacking layers or enlarging filters. Transformers and the self-attention mechanism are recently proposed to effectively learn long-range dependencies by modeling all pairs of word-to-word attention regardless of their positions. The idea has also been extended to the computer vision field by creating and treating image patches as embeddings. Considering the computation complexity for whole image self-attention, current transformer-based models settle for a rigid partitioning scheme that potentially loses informative relations. Besides, current medical transformers model global context on full resolution images, leading to unnecessary computation costs. To address these issues, we developed a novel method to integrate multi-scale attention and CNN feature extraction using a pyramidal network architecture, namely Pyramid Medical Transformer (PMTrans). The PMTrans captured multi-range relations by working on multi-resolution images. An adaptive partitioning scheme was implemented to retain informative relations and to access different receptive fields efficiently. Experimental results on three medical image datasets (gland segmentation, MoNuSeg, and HECKTOR datasets) showed that PMTrans outperformed the latest CNN-based and transformer-based models for medical image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已成为医学图像处理领域的流行技术。然而，最流行的基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的医学图像分割方法并不完美，因为它们通过堆叠层或放大滤波器来模拟长程依赖性。最近提出了 Transformer 和自注意力机制，通过对所有词对词注意力对进行建模（无论其位置如何）来有效学习远程依赖关系。通过创建图像块并将其视为嵌入，该想法也已扩展到计算机视觉领域。考虑到整个图像自注意力的计算复杂性，基于电流互感器的模型采用了可能会丢失信息关系的严格划分方案。此外，当前的医疗变压器在全分辨率图像上模拟全局上下文，导致不必要的计算成本。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种使用金字塔网络架构集成多尺度注意力和 CNN 特征提取的新方法，即金字塔医疗变压器 (PMTrans)。 PMTrans 通过处理多分辨率图像来捕获多范围关系。实施自适应分区方案以保留信息关系并有效地访问不同的感受野。三个医学图像数据集（腺体分割、MoNuSeg 和 HECKTOR 数据集）的实验结果表明，PMTrans 优于最新的基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的医学图像分割模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Pyramid Medical Transformer (PMTrans)的新型网络架构，用于改进医疗图像分割任务中的长距离依赖建模和计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在医疗图像分割中难以有效建模长距离依赖关系，而现有Transformer方法因全分辨率全局注意力计算导致高昂的计算成本，且固定分区方案可能丢失关键信息关联。
AI.method: 设计金字塔网络架构整合多尺度注意力机制与CNN特征提取，通过自适应分区方案在多分辨率图像上捕捉多范围关系，减少冗余计算并保留信息关联。
AI.result: 在三个医疗图像数据集（gland分割、MoNuSeg、HECKTOR）的实验中，PMTrans性能优于最新CNN和Transformer基线模型。
AI.conclusion: PMTrans通过多尺度注意力与自适应分区有效解决了医疗图像分割中的计算效率与长距离依赖建模难题，为该领域提供了新的技术方向。

authors_text: Ewan Dunbar,Mathieu Bernard,Nicolas Hamilakis,Tu Anh Nguyen,Maureen de Seyssel,Patricia Rozé,Morgane Rivière,Eugene Kharitonov,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: The Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2021: Spoken language modelling
title_zh: 2021 年零资源语音挑战：口语建模
comment: Submitted to Interspeech 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.11588
comments: Submitted to Interspeech 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.11588
abstract: We present the Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2021, which asks participants to learn a language model directly from audio, without any text or labels. The challenge is based on the Libri-light dataset, which provides up to 60k hours of audio from English audio books without any associated text. We provide a pipeline baseline system consisting on an encoder based on contrastive predictive coding (CPC), a quantizer ($k$-means) and a standard language model (BERT or LSTM). The metrics evaluate the learned representations at the acoustic (ABX discrimination), lexical (spot-the-word), syntactic (acceptability judgment) and semantic levels (similarity judgment). We present an overview of the eight submitted systems from four groups and discuss the main results.
summary: We present the Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2021, which asks participants to learn a language model directly from audio, without any text or labels. The challenge is based on the Libri-light dataset, which provides up to 60k hours of audio from English audio books without any associated text. We provide a pipeline baseline system consisting on an encoder based on contrastive predictive coding (CPC), a quantizer ($k$-means) and a standard language model (BERT or LSTM). The metrics evaluate the learned representations at the acoustic (ABX discrimination), lexical (spot-the-word), syntactic (acceptability judgment) and semantic levels (similarity judgment). We present an overview of the eight submitted systems from four groups and discuss the main results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 2021 年零资源语音挑战，要求参与者直接从音频中学习语言模型，无需任何文本或标签。该挑战赛基于 Libri-light 数据集，该数据集提供了长达 6 万小时的英语有声读物音频，没有任何关联文本。我们提供了一个管道基线系统，由基于对比预测编码（CPC）的编码器、量化器（$k$-means）和标准语言模型（BERT 或 LSTM）组成。这些指标在声学（ABX 辨别）、词汇（单词识别）、句法（可接受性判断）和语义级别（相似性判断）上评估学习到的表示。我们概述了来自四组的八个提交的系统，并讨论了主要结果。

AI.tldr: 介绍2021年零资源语音挑战赛，要求参与者在无文本和标签的情况下直接从音频中学习语言模型。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型依赖文本数据，但实际中可能缺乏文本资源，因此需要探索仅从音频中学习语言模型的方法，推动语音识别和自然语言处理技术的发展。
AI.method: 采用基于对比预测编码（CPC）的编码器、k-means量化器以及BERT或LSTM标准语言模型构成基线系统，通过语音、词汇、句法和语义层面的指标评估学习到的表示。
AI.result: 共有四个小组提交了八个系统，评估结果展示了不同方法在语音、词汇、句法和语义层面的表现差异，但未明确具体性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 零资源语音挑战赛验证了仅从音频学习语言模型的可行性，未来需进一步优化模型结构和评估方法以提升性能。

search_text: The Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2021: Spoken language modelling 2021 年零资源语音挑战：口语建模 We present the Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2021, which asks participants to learn a language model directly from audio, without any text or labels. The challenge is based on the Libri-light dataset, which provides up to 60k hours of audio from English audio books without any associated text. We provide a pipeline baseline system consisting on an encoder based on contrastive predictive coding (CPC), a quantizer ($k$-means) and a standard language model (BERT or LSTM). The metrics evaluate the learned representations at the acoustic (ABX discrimination), lexical (spot-the-word), syntactic (acceptability judgment) and semantic levels (similarity judgment). We present an overview of the eight submitted systems from four groups and discuss the main results. 我们提出了 2021 年零资源语音挑战，要求参与者直接从音频中学习语言模型，无需任何文本或标签。该挑战赛基于 Libri-light 数据集，该数据集提供了长达 6 万小时的英语有声读物音频，没有任何关联文本。我们提供了一个管道基线系统，由基于对比预测编码（CPC）的编码器、量化器（$k$-means）和标准语言模型（BERT 或 LSTM）组成。这些指标在声学（ABX 辨别）、词汇（单词识别）、句法（可接受性判断）和语义级别（相似性判断）上评估学习到的表示。我们概述了来自四组的八个提交的系统，并讨论了主要结果。 介绍2021年零资源语音挑战赛，要求参与者在无文本和标签的情况下直接从音频中学习语言模型。 Ewan Dunbar,Mathieu Bernard,Nicolas Hamilakis,Tu Anh Nguyen,Maureen de Seyssel,Patricia Rozé,Morgane Rivière,Eugene Kharitonov,Emmanuel Dupoux cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Why should we care about register? Reflections on chatbot language design
title_zh: 我们为什么要关心注册？对聊天机器人语言设计的思考
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2101.11089
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2101.11089
abstract: This position paper discusses the relevance of register as a theoretical framework for chatbot language design. We present the concept of register and discuss how using register-specific language influence the user's perceptions of the interaction with chatbots. Additionally, we point several research opportunities that are important to pursue to establish register as a foundation for advancing chatbot's communication skills.
summary: This position paper discusses the relevance of register as a theoretical framework for chatbot language design. We present the concept of register and discuss how using register-specific language influence the user's perceptions of the interaction with chatbots. Additionally, we point several research opportunities that are important to pursue to establish register as a foundation for advancing chatbot's communication skills.
abstract_zh: 本立场文件讨论了寄存器作为聊天机器人语言设计理论框架的相关性。我们提出了寄存器的概念，并讨论了使用特定于寄存器的语言如何影响用户对与聊天机器人交互的感知。此外，我们还指出了一些对于建立注册作为提高聊天机器人沟通技能的基础非常重要的研究机会。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了语域（register）作为理论框架在聊天机器人语言设计中的相关性，分析其对用户交互感知的影响，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 当前聊天机器人缺乏对语域差异的适应性，导致交互不够自然，需通过理论框架提升其沟通能力。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和文献综述，结合语域概念与聊天机器人交互案例，探讨其语言设计的影响。
AI.result: 论证了语域特定语言对用户交互感知的关键作用，并识别出需进一步研究的核心领域。
AI.conclusion: 语域理论可作为聊天机器人沟通能力进化的基础，未来需通过实证研究验证其应用价值。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Wu,Yu Jiang,Minghao Zhao,Chupeng Cui,Zongmin Yang,Xinhui Xue,Hong Qi
title: Spirit Distillation: A Model Compression Method with Multi-domain Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 烈酒蒸馏：一种多领域知识迁移的模型压缩方法
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.13733
comments: 13 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.13733
abstract: Recent applications pose requirements of both cross-domain knowledge transfer and model compression to machine learning models due to insufficient training data and limited computational resources. In this paper, we propose a new knowledge distillation model, named Spirit Distillation (SD), which is a model compression method with multi-domain knowledge transfer. The compact student network mimics out a representation equivalent to the front part of the teacher network, through which the general knowledge can be transferred from the source domain (teacher) to the target domain (student). To further improve the robustness of the student, we extend SD to Enhanced Spirit Distillation (ESD) in exploiting a more comprehensive knowledge by introducing the proximity domain which is similar to the target domain for feature extraction. Results demonstrate that our method can boost mIOU and high-precision accuracy by 1.4% and 8.2% respectively with 78.2% segmentation variance, and can gain a precise compact network with only 41.8% FLOPs.
summary: Recent applications pose requirements of both cross-domain knowledge transfer and model compression to machine learning models due to insufficient training data and limited computational resources. In this paper, we propose a new knowledge distillation model, named Spirit Distillation (SD), which is a model compression method with multi-domain knowledge transfer. The compact student network mimics out a representation equivalent to the front part of the teacher network, through which the general knowledge can be transferred from the source domain (teacher) to the target domain (student). To further improve the robustness of the student, we extend SD to Enhanced Spirit Distillation (ESD) in exploiting a more comprehensive knowledge by introducing the proximity domain which is similar to the target domain for feature extraction. Results demonstrate that our method can boost mIOU and high-precision accuracy by 1.4% and 8.2% respectively with 78.2% segmentation variance, and can gain a precise compact network with only 41.8% FLOPs.
abstract_zh: 由于训练数据不足和计算资源有限，最近的应用对机器学习模型提出了跨领域知识转移和模型压缩的要求。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的知识蒸馏模型，称为Spirit Distillation（SD），它是一种具有多领域知识迁移的模型压缩方法。紧凑的学生网络模仿了相当于教师网络前部的表示，通过它可以将一般知识从源域（教师）转移到目标域（学生）。为了进一步提高学生的鲁棒性，我们通过引入与特征提取的目标域相似的邻近域，将SD扩展到增强型酒精蒸馏（ESD），以利用更全面的知识。结果表明，我们的方法可以将 mIOU 和高精度准确率分别提高 1.4% 和 8.2%，分割方差为 78.2%，并且可以获得仅 41.8% FLOPs 的精确紧凑网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spirit Distillation (SD)的模型压缩方法，通过多领域知识迁移来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 由于训练数据不足和计算资源有限，现有的机器学习模型需要同时满足跨领域知识迁移和模型压缩的需求。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为Spirit Distillation (SD)的知识蒸馏模型，并扩展为Enhanced Spirit Distillation (ESD)，通过引入相似目标领域的近邻域来提取特征，以提高学生模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在mIOU和高精度准确率上分别提升了1.4%和8.2%，分割方差为78.2%，并且仅需41.8%的FLOPs即可获得精确的紧凑网络。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在模型压缩和跨领域知识迁移方面表现出色，能够有效提升模型性能并减少计算资源消耗。

authors_text: Sinong Wang,Han Fang,Madian Khabsa,Hanzi Mao,Hao Ma
title: Entailment as Few-Shot Learner
title_zh: 作为少样本学习器的蕴涵
abstract: Large pre-trained language models (LMs) have demonstrated remarkable ability as few-shot learners. However, their success hinges largely on scaling model parameters to a degree that makes it challenging to train and serve. In this paper, we propose a new approach, named as EFL, that can turn small LMs into better few-shot learners. The key idea of this approach is to reformulate potential NLP task into an entailment one, and then fine-tune the model with as little as 8 examples. We further demonstrate our proposed method can be: (i) naturally combined with an unsupervised contrastive learning-based data augmentation method; (ii) easily extended to multilingual few-shot learning. A systematic evaluation on 18 standard NLP tasks demonstrates that this approach improves the various existing SOTA few-shot learning methods by 12\%, and yields competitive few-shot performance with 500 times larger models, such as GPT-3.
summary: Large pre-trained language models (LMs) have demonstrated remarkable ability as few-shot learners. However, their success hinges largely on scaling model parameters to a degree that makes it challenging to train and serve. In this paper, we propose a new approach, named as EFL, that can turn small LMs into better few-shot learners. The key idea of this approach is to reformulate potential NLP task into an entailment one, and then fine-tune the model with as little as 8 examples. We further demonstrate our proposed method can be: (i) naturally combined with an unsupervised contrastive learning-based data augmentation method; (ii) easily extended to multilingual few-shot learning. A systematic evaluation on 18 standard NLP tasks demonstrates that this approach improves the various existing SOTA few-shot learning methods by 12\%, and yields competitive few-shot performance with 500 times larger models, such as GPT-3.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型（LM）已经表现出了作为小样本学习者的非凡能力。然而，他们的成功很大程度上取决于将模型参数缩放到一定程度，这使得训练和服务变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 EFL 的新方法，可以将小型 LM 转变为更好的少样本学习器。这种方法的关键思想是将潜在的 NLP 任务重新表述为蕴含任务，然后用最少 8 个示例对模型进行微调。我们进一步证明我们提出的方法可以：（i）自然地与基于无监督对比学习的数据增强方法相结合； (ii) 轻松扩展到多语言小样本学习。对 18 个标准 NLP 任务的系统评估表明，该方法将现有的各种 SOTA 少样本学习方法提高了 12%，并且与 500 倍大的模型（例如 GPT-3）相比，产生了具有竞争力的少样本性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EFL的新方法，通过将自然语言处理任务转化为蕴含任务，使小型语言模型在少样本学习中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在少样本学习中表现优异，但其参数规模导致训练和部署困难，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将潜在NLP任务重构为蕴含任务，仅用8个示例进行微调，并结合无监督对比学习数据增强及多语言扩展。
AI.result: 在18个标准NLP任务中，该方法超越现有最优方法12%，且在小模型上实现接近GPT-3等大模型的少样本性能。
AI.conclusion: EFL通过任务重构显著提升小模型少样本学习能力，兼具高效性与扩展性，为轻量化模型应用提供新方向。

authors_text: KS Krishnapriya,Michael C. King,Kevin W. Bowyer
title: Analysis of Manual and Automated Skin Tone Assignments for Face Recognition Applications
title_zh: 人脸识别应用的手动和自动肤色分配分析
abstract: News reports have suggested that darker skin tone causes an increase in face recognition errors. The Fitzpatrick scale is widely used in dermatology to classify sensitivity to sun exposure and skin tone. In this paper, we analyze a set of manual Fitzpatrick skin type assignments and also employ the individual typology angle to automatically estimate the skin tone from face images. The set of manual skin tone rating experiments shows that there are inconsistencies between human raters that are difficult to eliminate. Efforts to automate skin tone rating suggest that it is particularly challenging on images collected without a calibration object in the scene. However, after the color-correction, the level of agreement between automated and manual approaches is found to be 96% or better for the MORPH images. To our knowledge, this is the first work to: (a) examine the consistency of manual skin tone ratings across observers, (b) document that there is substantial variation in the rating of the same image by different observers even when exemplar images are given for guidance and all images are color-corrected, and (c) compare manual versus automated skin tone ratings.
summary: News reports have suggested that darker skin tone causes an increase in face recognition errors. The Fitzpatrick scale is widely used in dermatology to classify sensitivity to sun exposure and skin tone. In this paper, we analyze a set of manual Fitzpatrick skin type assignments and also employ the individual typology angle to automatically estimate the skin tone from face images. The set of manual skin tone rating experiments shows that there are inconsistencies between human raters that are difficult to eliminate. Efforts to automate skin tone rating suggest that it is particularly challenging on images collected without a calibration object in the scene. However, after the color-correction, the level of agreement between automated and manual approaches is found to be 96% or better for the MORPH images. To our knowledge, this is the first work to: (a) examine the consistency of manual skin tone ratings across observers, (b) document that there is substantial variation in the rating of the same image by different observers even when exemplar images are given for guidance and all images are color-corrected, and (c) compare manual versus automated skin tone ratings.
abstract_zh: 新闻报道表明，较深的肤色会导致面部识别错误增加。菲茨帕特里克量表广泛应用于皮肤科，对阳光照射和肤色的敏感性进行分类。在本文中，我们分析了一组手动菲茨帕特里克皮肤类型分配，并采用个体类型学角度自动估计面部图像的肤色。这组手动肤色评级实验表明，人类评级者之间存在难以消除的不一致。自动肤色评级的努力表明，在场景中没有校准对象的情况下收集的图像尤其具有挑战性。然而，在颜色校正之后，发现 MORPH 图像的自动方法和手动方法之间的一致性达到 96% 或更高。据我们所知，这是第一项工作：（a）检查观察者之间手动肤色评级的一致性，（b）记录不同观察者对同一图像的评级存在很大差异，即使给出示例图像作为指导并且所有图像都经过颜色校正，以及（c）比较手动与自动肤色评级。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了手动与自动皮肤色调分配在人脸识别中的应用，探讨其一致性及准确性。
AI.motivation: 新闻报道指出深色皮肤在人脸识别中易出错，需改进皮肤色调分类方法以提升识别精度。
AI.method: 采用Fitzpatrick量表进行手动皮肤类型评分，并利用个体典型角从面部图像自动估算肤色，对比两者一致性及校正效果。
AI.result: 手动评分存在显著人际差异，自动方法在无校准物体时困难，但经色彩校正后与手动方法在MORPH数据集上达成96%以上一致性。
AI.conclusion: 自动肤色评估在色彩校正后可行，但需解决无校准场景下的挑战，且人际评分差异需被重视。

title: EagerMOT: 3D Multi-Object Tracking via Sensor Fusion
title_zh: EagerMOT：通过传感器融合进行 3D 多目标跟踪
comment: To be published at ICRA 2021. Source code available at https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT
comments: To be published at ICRA 2021. Source code available at https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT
abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) enables mobile robots to perform well-informed motion planning and navigation by localizing surrounding objects in 3D space and time. Existing methods rely on depth sensors (e.g., LiDAR) to detect and track targets in 3D space, but only up to a limited sensing range due to the sparsity of the signal. On the other hand, cameras provide a dense and rich visual signal that helps to localize even distant objects, but only in the image domain. In this paper, we propose EagerMOT, a simple tracking formulation that eagerly integrates all available object observations from both sensor modalities to obtain a well-informed interpretation of the scene dynamics. Using images, we can identify distant incoming objects, while depth estimates allow for precise trajectory localization as soon as objects are within the depth-sensing range. With EagerMOT, we achieve state-of-the-art results across several MOT tasks on the KITTI and NuScenes datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT.
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) enables mobile robots to perform well-informed motion planning and navigation by localizing surrounding objects in 3D space and time. Existing methods rely on depth sensors (e.g., LiDAR) to detect and track targets in 3D space, but only up to a limited sensing range due to the sparsity of the signal. On the other hand, cameras provide a dense and rich visual signal that helps to localize even distant objects, but only in the image domain. In this paper, we propose EagerMOT, a simple tracking formulation that eagerly integrates all available object observations from both sensor modalities to obtain a well-informed interpretation of the scene dynamics. Using images, we can identify distant incoming objects, while depth estimates allow for precise trajectory localization as soon as objects are within the depth-sensing range. With EagerMOT, we achieve state-of-the-art results across several MOT tasks on the KITTI and NuScenes datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 使移动机器人能够通过在 3D 空间和时间中定位周围物体来执行明智的运动规划和导航。现有方法依靠深度传感器（例如 LiDAR）来检测和跟踪 3D 空间中的目标，但由于信号稀疏，只能达到有限的传感范围。另一方面，相机提供密集且丰富的视觉信号，有助于定位远处的物体，但仅限于图像域。在本文中，我们提出了 EagerMOT，这是一种简单的跟踪公式，它热切地集成来自两种传感器模态的所有可用对象观察，以获得对场景动态的明智解释。使用图像，我们可以识别远处的传入物体，而深度估计可以在物体位于深度感应范围内时进行精确的轨迹定位。借助 EagerMOT，我们在 KITTI 和 NuScenes 数据集上的多个 MOT 任务中取得了最先进的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EagerMOT方法，通过融合激光雷达和摄像头传感器数据，实现更精确的3D多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖激光雷达检测目标存在感知范围限制，而摄像头虽能识别远距离目标但缺乏深度信息，需融合多模态数据提升跟踪性能。
AI.method: 设计EagerMOT框架，结合图像识别远距离目标与激光雷达深度数据精确定位，通过实时整合多传感器观测信息优化轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在KITTI和NuScenes数据集上达到SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 传感器融合有效弥补单一模态缺陷，EagerMOT方法在复杂场景下显著提升3D多目标跟踪准确性。

method: 设计EagerMOT框架，结合图像识别远距离目标与激光雷达深度数据精确定位，通过实时整合多传感器观测信息优化轨迹预测。
result: 在KITTI和NuScenes数据集上达到SOTA性能，代码已开源。
conclusion: 传感器融合有效弥补单一模态缺陷，EagerMOT方法在复杂场景下显著提升3D多目标跟踪准确性。
search_text: EagerMOT: 3D Multi-Object Tracking via Sensor Fusion EagerMOT：通过传感器融合进行 3D 多目标跟踪 Multi-object tracking (MOT) enables mobile robots to perform well-informed motion planning and navigation by localizing surrounding objects in 3D space and time. Existing methods rely on depth sensors (e.g., LiDAR) to detect and track targets in 3D space, but only up to a limited sensing range due to the sparsity of the signal. On the other hand, cameras provide a dense and rich visual signal that helps to localize even distant objects, but only in the image domain. In this paper, we propose EagerMOT, a simple tracking formulation that eagerly integrates all available object observations from both sensor modalities to obtain a well-informed interpretation of the scene dynamics. Using images, we can identify distant incoming objects, while depth estimates allow for precise trajectory localization as soon as objects are within the depth-sensing range. With EagerMOT, we achieve state-of-the-art results across several MOT tasks on the KITTI and NuScenes datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT. 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 使移动机器人能够通过在 3D 空间和时间中定位周围物体来执行明智的运动规划和导航。现有方法依靠深度传感器（例如 LiDAR）来检测和跟踪 3D 空间中的目标，但由于信号稀疏，只能达到有限的传感范围。另一方面，相机提供密集且丰富的视觉信号，有助于定位远处的物体，但仅限于图像域。在本文中，我们提出了 EagerMOT，这是一种简单的跟踪公式，它热切地集成来自两种传感器模态的所有可用对象观察，以获得对场景动态的明智解释。使用图像，我们可以识别远处的传入物体，而深度估计可以在物体位于深度感应范围内时进行精确的轨迹定位。借助 EagerMOT，我们在 KITTI 和 NuScenes 数据集上的多个 MOT 任务中取得了最先进的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/aleksandrkim61/EagerMOT 获取。 本文提出EagerMOT方法，通过融合激光雷达和摄像头传感器数据，实现更精确的3D多目标跟踪。 Aleksandr Kim,Aljoša Ošep,Laura Leal-Taixé cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Algorithms for the Line-Constrained Disk Coverage and Related Problems
title_zh: 线路约束磁盘覆盖算法及相关问题
comment: A preliminary version to appear in WADS 2021
comments: A preliminary version to appear in WADS 2021
abstract: Given a set $P$ of $n$ points and a set $S$ of $m$ weighted disks in the plane, the disk coverage problem asks for a subset of disks of minimum total weight that cover all points of $P$. The problem is NP-hard. In this paper, we consider a line-constrained version in which all disks are centered on a line $L$ (while points of $P$ can be anywhere in the plane). We present an $O((m+n)\log(m+n)+κ\log m)$ time algorithm for the problem, where $κ$ is the number of pairs of disks that intersect. Alternatively, we can also solve the problem in $O(nm\log(m+n))$ time. For the unit-disk case where all disks have the same radius, the running time can be reduced to $O((n+m)\log(m+n))$. In addition, we solve in $O((m+n)\log(m+n))$ time the $L_{\infty}$ and $L_1$ cases of the problem, in which the disks are squares and diamonds, respectively. As a by-product, the 1D version of the problem where all points of $P$ are on $L$ and the disks are line segments on $L$ is also solved in $O((m+n)\log(m+n))$ time. We also show that the problem has an $Ω((m+n)\log (m+n))$ time lower bound even for the 1D case. We further demonstrate that our techniques can also be used to solve other geometric coverage problems. For example, given in the plane a set $P$ of $n$ points and a set $S$ of $n$ weighted half-planes, we solve in $O(n^4\log n)$ time the problem of finding a subset of half-planes to cover $P$ so that their total weight is minimized. This improves the previous best algorithm of $O(n^5)$ time by almost a linear factor. If all half-planes are lower ones, then our algorithm runs in $O(n^2\log n)$ time, which improves the previous best algorithm of $O(n^4)$ time by almost a quadratic factor.

Alternatively, we can also solve the problem in $O(nm\log(m+n))$ time. For the unit-disk case where all disks have the same radius, the running time can be reduced to $O((n+m)\log(m+n))$. In addition, we solve in $O((m+n)\log(m+n))$ time the $L_{\infty}$ and $L_1$ cases of the problem, in which the disks are squares and diamonds, respectively. As a by-product, the 1D version of the problem where all points of $P$ are on $L$ and the disks are line segments on $L$ is also solved in $O((m+n)\log(m+n))$ time. We further demonstrate that our techniques can also be used to solve other geometric coverage problems. For example, given in the plane a set $P$ of $n$ points and a set $S$ of $n$ weighted half-planes, we solve in $O(n^4\log n)$ time the problem of finding a subset of half-planes to cover $P$ so that their total weight is minimized. If all half-planes are lower ones, then our algorithm runs in $O(n^2\log n)$ time, which improves the previous best algorithm of $O(n^4)$ time by almost a quadratic factor.
abstract_zh: 给定平面上 $n$ 个点的集合 $P$ 和 $m$ 个加权磁盘的集合 $S$，磁盘覆盖问题要求覆盖 $P$ 所有点的最小总权重的磁盘子集。该问题是 NP 困难的。在本文中，我们考虑一个线约束版本，其中所有圆盘都以线 $L$ 为中心（而 $P$ 的点可以位于平面上的任何位置）。我们提出了该问题的 $O((m+n)\log(m+n)+κ\log m)$ 时间算法，其中 $κ$ 是相交圆盘对的数量。或者，我们也可以在 $O(nm\log(m+n))$ 时间内解决问题。对于所有磁盘具有相同半径的单位磁盘情况，运行时间可以减少到$O((n+m)\log(m+n))$。此外，我们在 $O((m+n)\log(m+n))$ 时间内解决了问题的 $L_{\infty}$ 和 $L_1$ 情况，其中圆盘分别是正方形和菱形。作为副产品，问题的一维版本（$P$ 的所有点都在 $L$ 上，圆盘是 $L$ 上的线段）也在 $O((m+n)\log(m+n))$ 时间内解决。我们还表明，即使对于一维情况，该问题也具有 $Ω((m+n)\log (m+n))$ 时间下限。我们进一步证明我们的技术也可以用于解决其他几何覆盖问题。例如，给定平面中 $n$ 个点的集合 $P$ 和 $n$ 个加权半平面的集合 $S$，我们在 $O(n^4\log n)$ 时间内解决了找到半平面子集来覆盖 $P$ 的问题，从而使它们的总权重最小化。这将之前的最佳算法提高了 $O(n^5)$ 时间，几乎是线性因子。如果所有半平面都是较低的半平面，那么我们的算法运行时间为 $O(n^2\log n)$，这将之前 $O(n^4)$ 时间的最佳算法提高了几乎两倍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在平面几何中，如何使用位于某条直线上的加权圆盘覆盖所有给定点的最优化问题，并提出了多种高效算法。
AI.motivation: 圆盘覆盖问题在计算几何中具有重要应用，但一般情况为NP难。通过限制圆盘中心位于直线上，可降低问题复杂度并探索更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出基于圆盘交集特性的算法，结合分治策略与几何分析，分别处理单位圆盘、L∞/L1范数下的方形/菱形覆盖，并扩展至一维线段覆盖及半平面覆盖问题。
AI.result: 设计了O((m+n)log(m+n))时间复杂度的主算法，改进了单位圆盘及特殊几何形状的覆盖效率，同时将半平面覆盖问题时间复杂度从O(n⁵)降至O(n⁴logn)或O(n²logn)。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何约束条件优化算法设计，在保持覆盖完整性的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为相关几何覆盖问题提供了通用解法框架。

title: Physically Feasible Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 物理上可行的车辆轨迹预测
abstract: Predicting the future motion of actors in a traffic scene is a crucial part of any autonomous driving system. Recent research in this area has focused on trajectory prediction approaches that optimize standard trajectory error metrics. In this work, we describe three important properties -- physical realism guarantees, system maintainability, and sample efficiency -- which we believe are equally important for developing a self-driving system that can operate safely and practically in the real world. Furthermore, we introduce PTNet (PathTrackingNet), a novel approach for vehicle trajectory prediction that is a hybrid of the classical pure pursuit path tracking algorithm and modern graph-based neural networks. By combining a structured robotics technique with a flexible learning approach, we are able to produce a system that not only achieves the same level of performance as other state-of-the-art methods on traditional trajectory error metrics, but also provides strong guarantees about the physical realism of the predicted trajectories while requiring half the amount of data. We believe focusing on this new class of hybrid approaches is an useful direction for developing and maintaining a safety-critical autonomous driving system.
summary: Predicting the future motion of actors in a traffic scene is a crucial part of any autonomous driving system. Recent research in this area has focused on trajectory prediction approaches that optimize standard trajectory error metrics. In this work, we describe three important properties -- physical realism guarantees, system maintainability, and sample efficiency -- which we believe are equally important for developing a self-driving system that can operate safely and practically in the real world. Furthermore, we introduce PTNet (PathTrackingNet), a novel approach for vehicle trajectory prediction that is a hybrid of the classical pure pursuit path tracking algorithm and modern graph-based neural networks. By combining a structured robotics technique with a flexible learning approach, we are able to produce a system that not only achieves the same level of performance as other state-of-the-art methods on traditional trajectory error metrics, but also provides strong guarantees about the physical realism of the predicted trajectories while requiring half the amount of data. We believe focusing on this new class of hybrid approaches is an useful direction for developing and maintaining a safety-critical autonomous driving system.
abstract_zh: 预测交通场景中参与者的未来运动是任何自动驾驶系统的关键部分。该领域的最新研究重点是优化标准轨迹误差指标的轨迹预测方法。在这项工作中，我们描述了三个重要的属性——物理真实性保证、系统可维护性和样本效率——我们相信这对于开发可以在现实世界中安全实用地运行的自动驾驶系统同样重要。此外，我们还介绍了 PTNet（PathTrackingNet），这是一种车辆轨迹预测的新方法，它是经典的纯追踪路径跟踪算法和现代基于图的神经网络的混合。通过将结构化机器人技术与灵活的学习方法相结合，我们能够生产出一个系统，该系统不仅在传统轨迹误差指标上达到与其他最先进方法相同的性能水平，而且还为预测轨迹的物理真实性提供了强有力的保证，同时需要一半的数据量。我们相信，关注这种新型混合方法是开发和维护安全关键型自动驾驶系统的一个有用方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合经典路径跟踪算法与图神经网络的混合方法PTNet，用于实现物理可行的车辆轨迹预测，提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法过度关注误差指标，忽视了物理现实性、系统可维护性和数据效率，而这些对实际自动驾驶系统的安全性和实用性至关重要。
AI.method: 设计PTNet架构，融合纯追踪路径跟踪算法的结构化特性与图神经网络的灵活性，通过混合模型实现轨迹预测。
AI.result: PTNet在传统误差指标上达到SOTA水平，同时确保轨迹物理可行性，并将训练数据需求减少50%。
AI.conclusion: 混合经典控制理论与深度学习的新型方法为构建安全可靠的自动驾驶系统提供了有效技术路径。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合经典路径跟踪算法与图神经网络的混合方法PTNet，用于实现物理可行的车辆轨迹预测，提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和数据效率。
motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法过度关注误差指标，忽视了物理现实性、系统可维护性和数据效率，而这些对实际自动驾驶系统的安全性和实用性至关重要。
method: 设计PTNet架构，融合纯追踪路径跟踪算法的结构化特性与图神经网络的灵活性，通过混合模型实现轨迹预测。
result: PTNet在传统误差指标上达到SOTA水平，同时确保轨迹物理可行性，并将训练数据需求减少50%。
conclusion: 混合经典控制理论与深度学习的新型方法为构建安全可靠的自动驾驶系统提供了有效技术路径。
search_text: Physically Feasible Vehicle Trajectory Prediction 物理上可行的车辆轨迹预测 Predicting the future motion of actors in a traffic scene is a crucial part of any autonomous driving system. Recent research in this area has focused on trajectory prediction approaches that optimize standard trajectory error metrics. In this work, we describe three important properties -- physical realism guarantees, system maintainability, and sample efficiency -- which we believe are equally important for developing a self-driving system that can operate safely and practically in the real world. Furthermore, we introduce PTNet (PathTrackingNet), a novel approach for vehicle trajectory prediction that is a hybrid of the classical pure pursuit path tracking algorithm and modern graph-based neural networks. By combining a structured robotics technique with a flexible learning approach, we are able to produce a system that not only achieves the same level of performance as other state-of-the-art methods on traditional trajectory error metrics, but also provides strong guarantees about the physical realism of the predicted trajectories while requiring half the amount of data. We believe focusing on this new class of hybrid approaches is an useful direction for developing and maintaining a safety-critical autonomous driving system. 预测交通场景中参与者的未来运动是任何自动驾驶系统的关键部分。该领域的最新研究重点是优化标准轨迹误差指标的轨迹预测方法。在这项工作中，我们描述了三个重要的属性——物理真实性保证、系统可维护性和样本效率——我们相信这对于开发可以在现实世界中安全实用地运行的自动驾驶系统同样重要。此外，我们还介绍了 PTNet（PathTrackingNet），这是一种车辆轨迹预测的新方法，它是经典的纯追踪路径跟踪算法和现代基于图的神经网络的混合。通过将结构化机器人技术与灵活的学习方法相结合，我们能够生产出一个系统，该系统不仅在传统轨迹误差指标上达到与其他最先进方法相同的性能水平，而且还为预测轨迹的物理真实性提供了强有力的保证，同时需要一半的数据量。我们相信，关注这种新型混合方法是开发和维护安全关键型自动驾驶系统的一个有用方向。 本文提出一种结合经典路径跟踪算法与图神经网络的混合方法PTNet，用于实现物理可行的车辆轨迹预测，提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和数据效率。 Harshayu Girase,Jerrick Hoang,Sai Yalamanchi,Micol Marchetti-Bowick cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Andrews,Bjorn Burkle,Yi-fan Chen,Davide DiCroce,Sergei Gleyzer,Ulrich Heintz,Meenakshi Narain,Manfred Paulini,Nikolas Pervan,Yusef Shafi,Wei Sun,Emanuele Usai,Kun Yang
title: End-to-End Jet Classification of Boosted Top Quarks with the CMS Open Data
title_zh: 使用 CMS 开放数据对增强顶夸克进行端到端喷射分类
abstract: We describe a novel application of the end-to-end deep learning technique to the task of discriminating top quark-initiated jets from those originating from the hadronization of a light quark or a gluon. The end-to-end deep learning technique combines deep learning algorithms and low-level detector representation of the high-energy collision event. In this study, we use low-level detector information from the simulated CMS Open Data samples to construct the top jet classifiers. To optimize classifier performance we progressively add low-level information from the CMS tracking detector, including pixel detector reconstructed hits and impact parameters, and demonstrate the value of additional tracking information even when no new spatial structures are added. Relying only on calorimeter energy deposits and reconstructed pixel detector hits, the end-to-end classifier achieves an AUC score of 0.975$\pm$0.002 for the task of classifying boosted top quark jets. After adding derived track quantities, the classifier AUC score increases to 0.9824$\pm$0.0013, serving as the first performance benchmark for these CMS Open Data samples. We additionally provide a timing performance comparison of different processor unit architectures for training the network.
summary: We describe a novel application of the end-to-end deep learning technique to the task of discriminating top quark-initiated jets from those originating from the hadronization of a light quark or a gluon. The end-to-end deep learning technique combines deep learning algorithms and low-level detector representation of the high-energy collision event. In this study, we use low-level detector information from the simulated CMS Open Data samples to construct the top jet classifiers. To optimize classifier performance we progressively add low-level information from the CMS tracking detector, including pixel detector reconstructed hits and impact parameters, and demonstrate the value of additional tracking information even when no new spatial structures are added. Relying only on calorimeter energy deposits and reconstructed pixel detector hits, the end-to-end classifier achieves an AUC score of 0.975$\pm$0.002 for the task of classifying boosted top quark jets. After adding derived track quantities, the classifier AUC score increases to 0.9824$\pm$0.0013, serving as the first performance benchmark for these CMS Open Data samples. We additionally provide a timing performance comparison of different processor unit architectures for training the network.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了端到端深度学习技术的一种新颖应用，用于区分顶夸克引发的喷流与源自轻夸克或胶子强子化的喷流。端到端深度学习技术结合了深度学习算法和高能碰撞事件的低级检测器表示。在本研究中，我们使用来自模拟 CMS 开放数据样本的低级探测器信息来构建顶部射流分类器。为了优化分类器性能，我们逐步添加来自 CMS 跟踪检测器的低级信息，包括像素检测器重建的命中和影响参数，并展示附加跟踪信息的价值，即使没有添加新的空间结构也是如此。仅依靠热量计能量沉积和重建的像素探测器命中，端到端分类器在对升压顶夸克喷流进行分类的任务中获得了 0.975$\pm$0.002 的 AUC 分数。添加导出的轨迹数量后，分类器 AUC 分数增加到 0.9824$\pm$0.0013，作为这些 CMS 开放数据样本的第一个性能基准。我们还提供了用于训练网络的不同处理器单元架构的时序性能比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端深度学习方法，用于区分顶夸克喷注与轻子夸克或胶子喷注，并利用CMS开放数据进行验证。
AI.motivation: 传统喷注分类方法在高能物理实验中存在局限性，需通过深度学习结合低级探测器信息提升分类精度，以支持如希格斯玻色子等新粒子的发现。
AI.method: 基于模拟的CMS开放数据，整合深度学习算法与低级探测器信息（如像素探测器重建击中点和影响参数），逐步优化分类器性能，并对比不同处理器架构的训练效率。
AI.result: 仅使用量能器能量沉积和像素探测器击中点时，分类器AUC达0.975±0.002；加入轨迹信息后AUC提升至0.9824±0.0013，首次为CMS开放数据建立性能基准。
AI.conclusion: 端到端深度学习有效提升了顶夸克喷注分类精度，轨迹信息的引入显著优化性能，同时为CMS开放数据的机器学习应用提供了硬件加速参考。
