authors_text: Junhua Chen,Haiyan Zeng,Chong Zhang,Zhenwei Shi,Andre Dekker,Leonard Wee,Inigo Bermejo
title: Lung Cancer Diagnosis Using Deep Attention Based on Multiple Instance Learning and Radiomics
title_zh: 基于多实例学习和放射组学的深度注意力肺癌诊断
abstract: Early diagnosis of lung cancer is a key intervention for the treatment of lung cancer computer aided diagnosis (CAD) can play a crucial role. However, most published CAD methods treat lung cancer diagnosis as a lung nodule classification problem, which does not reflect clinical practice, where clinicians diagnose a patient based on a set of images of nodules, instead of one specific nodule. Besides, the low interpretability of the output provided by these methods presents an important barrier for their adoption. In this article, we treat lung cancer diagnosis as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem in order to better reflect the diagnosis process in the clinical setting and for the higher interpretability of the output. We chose radiomics as the source of input features and deep attention-based MIL as the classification algorithm.The attention mechanism provides higher interpretability by estimating the importance of each instance in the set for the final diagnosis.In order to improve the model's performance in a small imbalanced dataset, we introduce a new bag simulation method for MIL.The results show that our method can achieve a mean accuracy of 0.807 with a standard error of the mean (SEM) of 0.069, a recall of 0.870 (SEM 0.061), a positive predictive value of 0.928 (SEM 0.078), a negative predictive value of 0.591 (SEM 0.155) and an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.842 (SEM 0.074), outperforming other MIL methods.Additional experiments show that the proposed oversampling strategy significantly improves the model's performance. In addition, our experiments show that our method provides an indication of the importance of each nodule in determining the diagnosis, which combined with the well-defined radiomic features, make the results more interpretable and acceptable for doctors and patients.
summary: Early diagnosis of lung cancer is a key intervention for the treatment of lung cancer computer aided diagnosis (CAD) can play a crucial role. However, most published CAD methods treat lung cancer diagnosis as a lung nodule classification problem, which does not reflect clinical practice, where clinicians diagnose a patient based on a set of images of nodules, instead of one specific nodule. Besides, the low interpretability of the output provided by these methods presents an important barrier for their adoption. In this article, we treat lung cancer diagnosis as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem in order to better reflect the diagnosis process in the clinical setting and for the higher interpretability of the output. We chose radiomics as the source of input features and deep attention-based MIL as the classification algorithm.The attention mechanism provides higher interpretability by estimating the importance of each instance in the set for the final diagnosis.In order to improve the model's performance in a small imbalanced dataset, we introduce a new bag simulation method for MIL.The results show that our method can achieve a mean accuracy of 0.807 with a standard error of the mean (SEM) of 0.069, a recall of 0.870 (SEM 0.061), a positive predictive value of 0.928 (SEM 0.078), a negative predictive value of 0.591 (SEM 0.155) and an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.842 (SEM 0.074), outperforming other MIL methods.Additional experiments show that the proposed oversampling strategy significantly improves the model's performance. In addition, our experiments show that our method provides an indication of the importance of each nodule in determining the diagnosis, which combined with the well-defined radiomic features, make the results more interpretable and acceptable for doctors and patients.
abstract_zh: 肺癌的早期诊断是干预治疗的关键，计算机辅助诊断（CAD）可以发挥至关重要的作用。然而，大多数已发表的 CAD 方法将肺癌诊断视为肺结节分类问题，这并不能反映临床实践，即临床医生根据一组结节图像而不是一个特定结节来诊断患者。此外，这些方法提供的输出的可解释性较低，这对其采用构成了重要障碍。在本文中，我们将肺癌诊断视为多实例学习（MIL）问题，以便更好地反映临床环境中的诊断过程以及输出的更高可解释性。我们选择放射组学作为输入特征的来源，并选择基于深度注意力的 MIL 作为分类算法。注意力机制通过估计集合中每个实例对最终诊断的重要性来提供更高的可解释性。为了提高模型在小型不平衡数据集中的性能，我们引入了一种新的 MIL 包模拟方法。结果表明，我们的方法可以实现 0.807 的平均准确度，平均标准误差 (SEM) 为 0.069，召回率0.870（SEM 0.061），阳性预测值为0.928（SEM 0.078），阴性预测值为0.591（SEM 0.155），曲线下面积（AUC）为0.842（SEM 0.074），优于其他MIL方法。额外的实验表明，所提出的过采样策略显着提高了模型的性能。此外，我们的实验表明，我们的方法提供了每个结节在确定诊断中的重要性的指示，与明确的放射学特征相结合，使结果更易于医生和患者解释和接受。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度注意力机制和放射组学的多实例学习方法，用于改进肺癌的临床诊断流程和模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机辅助诊断方法将肺癌诊断简化为单个结节分类，与临床实际中基于多结节影像集合的诊断流程不符，且缺乏模型可解释性，阻碍了临床应用。
AI.method: 采用放射组学提取影像特征，结合深度注意力机制的多实例学习（MIL）框架，并引入新的袋模拟方法处理小样本不平衡数据，通过注意力机制量化各结节对诊断结果的贡献度。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上达到平均准确率0.807（SEM 0.069）、召回率0.870（SEM 0.061）、AUC 0.842（SEM 0.074），优于其他MIL方法；过采样策略显著提升模型性能，并能通过注意力权重指示关键结节。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多实例学习更贴近临床诊断流程，结合放射组学特征与注意力机制的可解释性，为医生提供更可信的诊断依据，具有临床应用潜力。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过多实例学习更贴近临床诊断流程，结合放射组学特征与注意力机制的可解释性，为医生提供更可信的诊断依据，具有临床应用潜力。

motivation: 现有计算机辅助诊断方法将肺癌诊断简化为单个结节分类，与临床实际中基于多结节影像集合的诊断流程不符，且缺乏模型可解释性，阻碍了临床应用。
method: 采用放射组学提取影像特征，结合深度注意力机制的多实例学习（MIL）框架，并引入新的袋模拟方法处理小样本不平衡数据，通过注意力机制量化各结节对诊断结果的贡献度。
result: 在测试数据集上达到平均准确率0.807（SEM 0.069）、召回率0.870（SEM 0.061）、AUC 0.842（SEM 0.074），优于其他MIL方法；过采样策略显著提升模型性能，并能通过注意力权重指示关键结节。
conclusion: 该方法通过多实例学习更贴近临床诊断流程，结合放射组学特征与注意力机制的可解释性，为医生提供更可信的诊断依据，具有临床应用潜力。
search_text: Lung Cancer Diagnosis Using Deep Attention Based on Multiple Instance Learning and Radiomics 基于多实例学习和放射组学的深度注意力肺癌诊断 Early diagnosis of lung cancer is a key intervention for the treatment of lung cancer computer aided diagnosis (CAD) can play a crucial role. However, most published CAD methods treat lung cancer diagnosis as a lung nodule classification problem, which does not reflect clinical practice, where clinicians diagnose a patient based on a set of images of nodules, instead of one specific nodule. Besides, the low interpretability of the output provided by these methods presents an important barrier for their adoption. In this article, we treat lung cancer diagnosis as a multiple instance learning (MIL) problem in order to better reflect the diagnosis process in the clinical setting and for the higher interpretability of the output. We chose radiomics as the source of input features and deep attention-based MIL as the classification algorithm.The attention mechanism provides higher interpretability by estimating the importance of each instance in the set for the final diagnosis.In order to improve the model's performance in a small imbalanced dataset, we introduce a new bag simulation method for MIL.The results show that our method can achieve a mean accuracy of 0.807 with a standard error of the mean (SEM) of 0.069, a recall of 0.870 (SEM 0.061), a positive predictive value of 0.928 (SEM 0.078), a negative predictive value of 0.591 (SEM 0.155) and an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.842 (SEM 0.074), outperforming other MIL methods.Additional experiments show that the proposed oversampling strategy significantly improves the model's performance. In addition, our experiments show that our method provides an indication of the importance of each nodule in determining the diagnosis, which combined with the well-defined radiomic features, make the results more interpretable and acceptable for doctors and patients. 肺癌的早期诊断是干预治疗的关键，计算机辅助诊断（CAD）可以发挥至关重要的作用。然而，大多数已发表的 CAD 方法将肺癌诊断视为肺结节分类问题，这并不能反映临床实践，即临床医生根据一组结节图像而不是一个特定结节来诊断患者。此外，这些方法提供的输出的可解释性较低，这对其采用构成了重要障碍。在本文中，我们将肺癌诊断视为多实例学习（MIL）问题，以便更好地反映临床环境中的诊断过程以及输出的更高可解释性。我们选择放射组学作为输入特征的来源，并选择基于深度注意力的 MIL 作为分类算法。注意力机制通过估计集合中每个实例对最终诊断的重要性来提供更高的可解释性。为了提高模型在小型不平衡数据集中的性能，我们引入了一种新的 MIL 包模拟方法。结果表明，我们的方法可以实现 0.807 的平均准确度，平均标准误差 (SEM) 为 0.069，召回率0.870（SEM 0.061），阳性预测值为0.928（SEM 0.078），阴性预测值为0.591（SEM 0.155），曲线下面积（AUC）为0.842（SEM 0.074），优于其他MIL方法。额外的实验表明，所提出的过采样策略显着提高了模型的性能。此外，我们的实验表明，我们的方法提供了每个结节在确定诊断中的重要性的指示，与明确的放射学特征相结合，使结果更易于医生和患者解释和接受。 本文提出一种基于深度注意力机制和放射组学的多实例学习方法，用于改进肺癌的临床诊断流程和模型可解释性。 Junhua Chen,Haiyan Zeng,Chong Zhang,Zhenwei Shi,Andre Dekker,Leonard Wee,Inigo Bermejo eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Turing Completeness and Sid Meier's Civilization
title_zh: 图灵完备性和席德·梅尔的文明
abstract: We prove that three strategy video games from the Sid Meier's Civilization series: Sid Meier's Civilization: Beyond Earth, Sid Meier's Civilization V, and Sid Meier's Civilization VI, are Turing complete. We achieve this by building three universal Turing machines-one for each game-using only the elements present in the games, and using their internal rules and mechanics as the transition function. The existence of such machines imply that under the assumptions made, the games are undecidable. We show constructions of these machines within a running game session, and we provide a sample execution of an algorithm-the three-state Busy Beaver-with one of our machines.
summary: We prove that three strategy video games from the Sid Meier's Civilization series: Sid Meier's Civilization: Beyond Earth, Sid Meier's Civilization V, and Sid Meier's Civilization VI, are Turing complete. We achieve this by building three universal Turing machines-one for each game-using only the elements present in the games, and using their internal rules and mechanics as the transition function. The existence of such machines imply that under the assumptions made, the games are undecidable. We show constructions of these machines within a running game session, and we provide a sample execution of an algorithm-the three-state Busy Beaver-with one of our machines.
abstract_zh: 我们证明《席德·梅尔的文明》系列中的三款策略视频游戏：《席德·梅尔的文明：超越地球》、《席德·梅尔的文明 V》和《席德·梅尔的文明 VI》是图灵完备的。我们通过构建三个通用图灵机（每个游戏一个）来实现这一目标，仅使用游戏中存在的元素，并使用它们的内部规则和机制作为转换函数。此类机器的存在意味着在所做的假设下，博弈是不可判定的。我们在运行的游戏会话中展示了这些机器的构造，并且我们提供了使用我们的一台机器执行算法（三态 Busy Beaver）的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了《文明》系列三款游戏具有图灵完备性，通过构建通用图灵机并利用游戏内部规则实现计算过程。
AI.motivation: 探索策略游戏是否具备理论计算机科学中的计算完备性，揭示游戏机制与计算理论的潜在关联。
AI.method: 在游戏内构建三台通用图灵机，利用游戏元素和规则作为状态转换函数，通过实际游戏会话演示算法执行。
AI.result: 成功证明三款《文明》游戏在理论假设下具备图灵完备性，并演示了三状态忙 Beaver 算法的执行过程。
AI.conclusion: 游戏机制可模拟通用计算模型，表明复杂策略游戏可能蕴含无限计算可能性，为游戏设计与计算理论交叉研究提供新视角。

title: What is Going on Inside Recurrent Meta Reinforcement Learning Agents?
title_zh: 循环元强化学习代理内部发生了什么？
comment: Accepted to the Never-Ending Reinforcement Learning Workshop at ICLR 2021
comments: Accepted to the Never-Ending Reinforcement Learning Workshop at ICLR 2021
abstract: Recurrent meta reinforcement learning (meta-RL) agents are agents that employ a recurrent neural network (RNN) for the purpose of "learning a learning algorithm". After being trained on a pre-specified task distribution, the learned weights of the agent's RNN are said to implement an efficient learning algorithm through their activity dynamics, which allows the agent to quickly solve new tasks sampled from the same distribution. However, due to the black-box nature of these agents, the way in which they work is not yet fully understood. In this study, we shed light on the internal working mechanisms of these agents by reformulating the meta-RL problem using the Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) framework. We hypothesize that the learned activity dynamics is acting as belief states for such agents. Several illustrative experiments suggest that this hypothesis is true, and that recurrent meta-RL agents can be viewed as agents that learn to act optimally in partially observable environments consisting of multiple related tasks. This view helps in understanding their failure cases and some interesting model-based results reported in the literature.
summary: Recurrent meta reinforcement learning (meta-RL) agents are agents that employ a recurrent neural network (RNN) for the purpose of "learning a learning algorithm". After being trained on a pre-specified task distribution, the learned weights of the agent's RNN are said to implement an efficient learning algorithm through their activity dynamics, which allows the agent to quickly solve new tasks sampled from the same distribution. However, due to the black-box nature of these agents, the way in which they work is not yet fully understood. In this study, we shed light on the internal working mechanisms of these agents by reformulating the meta-RL problem using the Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) framework. We hypothesize that the learned activity dynamics is acting as belief states for such agents. Several illustrative experiments suggest that this hypothesis is true, and that recurrent meta-RL agents can be viewed as agents that learn to act optimally in partially observable environments consisting of multiple related tasks. This view helps in understanding their failure cases and some interesting model-based results reported in the literature.
abstract_zh: 循环元强化学习（meta-RL）代理是采用循环神经网络（RNN）来“学习学习算法”的代理。在预先指定的任务分布上进行训练后，智能体 RNN 的学习权重据说可以通过其活动动态实现高效的学习算法，从而使智能体能够快速解决从同一分布采样的新任务。然而，由于这些代理的黑盒性质，它们的工作方式尚未完全了解。在这项研究中，我们通过使用部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）框架重新表述元强化学习问题，揭示了这些智能体的内部工作机制。我们假设学习到的活动动态充当此类代理的信念状态。几个说明性的实验表明这个假设是正确的，并且循环元强化学习代理可以被视为学习在由多个相关任务组成的部分可观察环境中采取最佳行动的代理。这种观点有助于理解他们的失败案例和文献中报告的一些有趣的基于模型的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文通过将元强化学习问题重新表述为部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）框架，揭示了循环元强化学习代理的内部工作机制。
AI.motivation: 循环元强化学习代理的黑箱特性使得其内部工作原理尚未被充分理解，需探索其如何通过活动动态实现高效学习算法。
AI.method: 采用POMDP框架重新定义元强化学习问题，假设代理的RNN活动动态充当信念状态，并通过实验验证该假设。
AI.result: 实验表明，循环元强化学习代理可被视为在包含多个相关任务的部分可观测环境中学习最优行动的智能体，解释了其失败案例及模型相关结果。
AI.conclusion: 将循环元强化学习代理视为基于POMDP的信念状态学习器，有助于理解其机制与局限性，为模型设计提供理论依据。

authors_text: Priyanka Patel,Chun-Hao P. Huang,Joachim Tesch,David T. Hoffmann,Shashank Tripathi,Michael J. Black
title: AGORA: Avatars in Geography Optimized for Regression Analysis
title_zh: AGORA：针对回归分析优化的地理头像
abstract: While the accuracy of 3D human pose estimation from images has steadily improved on benchmark datasets, the best methods still fail in many real-world scenarios. This suggests that there is a domain gap between current datasets and common scenes containing people. To obtain ground-truth 3D pose, current datasets limit the complexity of clothing, environmental conditions, number of subjects, and occlusion. Moreover, current datasets evaluate sparse 3D joint locations corresponding to the major joints of the body, ignoring the hand pose and the face shape. To evaluate the current state-of-the-art methods on more challenging images, and to drive the field to address new problems, we introduce AGORA, a synthetic dataset with high realism and highly accurate ground truth. Here we use 4240 commercially-available, high-quality, textured human scans in diverse poses and natural clothing; this includes 257 scans of children. We create reference 3D poses and body shapes by fitting the SMPL-X body model (with face and hands) to the 3D scans, taking into account clothing. We create around 14K training and 3K test images by rendering between 5 and 15 people per image using either image-based lighting or rendered 3D environments, taking care to make the images physically plausible and photoreal. In total, AGORA consists of 173K individual person crops. We evaluate existing state-of-the-art methods for 3D human pose estimation on this dataset and find that most methods perform poorly on images of children. Hence, we extend the SMPL-X model to better capture the shape of children. Additionally, we fine-tune methods on AGORA and show improved performance on both AGORA and 3DPW, confirming the realism of the dataset. We provide all the registered 3D reference training data, rendered images, and a web-based evaluation site at https://agora.is.tue.mpg.de/.
summary: While the accuracy of 3D human pose estimation from images has steadily improved on benchmark datasets, the best methods still fail in many real-world scenarios. This suggests that there is a domain gap between current datasets and common scenes containing people. To obtain ground-truth 3D pose, current datasets limit the complexity of clothing, environmental conditions, number of subjects, and occlusion. Moreover, current datasets evaluate sparse 3D joint locations corresponding to the major joints of the body, ignoring the hand pose and the face shape. To evaluate the current state-of-the-art methods on more challenging images, and to drive the field to address new problems, we introduce AGORA, a synthetic dataset with high realism and highly accurate ground truth. In total, AGORA consists of 173K individual person crops. We evaluate existing state-of-the-art methods for 3D human pose estimation on this dataset and find that most methods perform poorly on images of children. Hence, we extend the SMPL-X model to better capture the shape of children. Additionally, we fine-tune methods on AGORA and show improved performance on both AGORA and 3DPW, confirming the realism of the dataset. We provide all the registered 3D reference training data, rendered images, and a web-based evaluation site at https://agora.is.tue.mpg.de/.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于图像的 3D 人体姿势估计的准确性在基准数据集上稳步提高，但最好的方法在许多现实场景中仍然失败。这表明当前数据集和包含人物的常见场景之间存在域差距。为了获得真实的 3D 姿势，当前数据集限制了服装、环境条件、受试者数量和遮挡的复杂性。此外，当前数据集评估与身体主要关节相对应的稀疏 3D 关节位置，忽略手部姿势和面部形状。为了在更具挑战性的图像上评估当前最先进的方法，并推动该领域解决新问题，我们引入了 AGORA，一个具有高真实性和高度准确的地面事实的合成数据集。在这里，我们使用了 4240 个商业上可用的、高质量、有纹理的、不同姿势和自然服装的人体扫描；其中包括 257 份儿童扫描。我们通过将 SMPL-X 身体模型（带有脸部和手部）与 3D 扫描进行拟合，并考虑到服装，来创建参考 3D 姿势和身体形状。我们使用基于图像的照明或渲染的 3D 环境渲染每张图像 5 到 15 个人，创建大约 14K 训练图像和 3K 测试图像，并注意使图像在物理上合理且真实。 AGORA 总共由 173K 个个体作物组成。我们在此数据集上评估了现有最先进的 3D 人体姿势估计方法，发现大多数方法在儿童图像上表现不佳。因此，我们扩展了 SMPL-X 模型以更好地捕捉儿童的形状。此外，我们对 AGORA 上的方法进行了微调，并在 AGORA 和 3DPW 上展示了改进的性能，证实了数据集的真实性。我们提供所有注册的 3D 参考训练数据、渲染图像和基于网络的评估网站：https://agora.is.tue.mpg.de/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGORA数据集，通过合成高真实感图像和精确的3D姿态标注，解决现有3D人体姿态估计方法在真实场景中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在服装复杂度、环境条件、遮挡等因素限制，导致3D姿态估计方法在实际场景中表现不佳，尤其对儿童姿态识别存在明显缺陷。
AI.method: 基于4240个高质量人体扫描数据构建包含儿童的多样化数据集，利用SMPL-X模型拟合3D姿态和体型，并通过物理真实渲染生成173K张图像，涵盖多人场景与复杂光照条件。
AI.result: 实验表明现有方法在儿童图像上表现较差，改进后的SMPL-X儿童模型在AGORA和3DPW数据集上均取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: AGORA数据集有效弥补了真实场景数据的不足，其高真实感和全面性为3D人体姿态估计研究提供了新基准。

authors_text: Shreyas Hampali,Sayan Deb Sarkar,Mahdi Rad,Vincent Lepetit
title: Keypoint Transformer: Solving Joint Identification in Challenging Hands and Object Interactions for Accurate 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: Keypoint Transformer：解决具有挑战性的手部和物体交互中的关节识别，以实现准确的 3D 姿势估计
abstract: We propose a robust and accurate method for estimating the 3D poses of two hands in close interaction from a single color image. This is a very challenging problem, as large occlusions and many confusions between the joints may happen. State-of-the-art methods solve this problem by regressing a heatmap for each joint, which requires solving two problems simultaneously: localizing the joints and recognizing them. In this work, we propose to separate these tasks by relying on a CNN to first localize joints as 2D keypoints, and on self-attention between the CNN features at these keypoints to associate them with the corresponding hand joint. The resulting architecture, which we call "Keypoint Transformer", is highly efficient as it achieves state-of-the-art performance with roughly half the number of model parameters on the InterHand2.6M dataset. We also show it can be easily extended to estimate the 3D pose of an object manipulated by one or two hands with high performance. Moreover, we created a new dataset of more than 75,000 images of two hands manipulating an object fully annotated in 3D and will make it publicly available.
summary: We propose a robust and accurate method for estimating the 3D poses of two hands in close interaction from a single color image. This is a very challenging problem, as large occlusions and many confusions between the joints may happen. State-of-the-art methods solve this problem by regressing a heatmap for each joint, which requires solving two problems simultaneously: localizing the joints and recognizing them. In this work, we propose to separate these tasks by relying on a CNN to first localize joints as 2D keypoints, and on self-attention between the CNN features at these keypoints to associate them with the corresponding hand joint. The resulting architecture, which we call "Keypoint Transformer", is highly efficient as it achieves state-of-the-art performance with roughly half the number of model parameters on the InterHand2.6M dataset. We also show it can be easily extended to estimate the 3D pose of an object manipulated by one or two hands with high performance. Moreover, we created a new dataset of more than 75,000 images of two hands manipulating an object fully annotated in 3D and will make it publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种稳健且准确的方法，用于从单一彩色图像中估计密切交互的两只手的 3D 姿势。这是一个非常具有挑战性的问题，因为关节之间可能会发生大的闭塞和许多混乱。最先进的方法通过回归每个关节的热图来解决这个问题，这需要同时解决两个问题：定位关节并识别它们。在这项工作中，我们建议通过依靠 CNN 首先将关节定位为 2D 关键点，并依靠这些关键点处的 CNN 特征之间的自注意力将它们与相应的手关节相关联，来分离这些任务。由此产生的架构（我们称之为“Keypoint Transformer”）非常高效，因为它在 InterHand2.6M 数据集上以大约一半的模型参数数量实现了最先进的性能。我们还表明，它可以轻松扩展，以高性能地估计由一只或两只手操纵的物体的 3D 姿态。此外，我们创建了一个新数据集，其中包含 75,000 多张两只手操作物体的图像，并完全以 3D 注释，并将其公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Keypoint Transformer的方法，用于从单张彩色图像中准确估计两个相互作用的手部的3D姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过回归热图同时解决关节定位和识别问题，导致效率低下且难以处理手部交互中的遮挡和关节混淆问题。
AI.method: 采用CNN首先定位2D关键点，再通过关键点处的自注意力机制关联对应手部关节，分离定位与识别任务，形成高效架构。
AI.result: 在InterHand2.6M数据集上以约一半参数量达到SOTA性能，并扩展至单/双手法操控物体的3D姿态估计，同时发布包含75,000张全注释图像的新数据集。
AI.conclusion: Keypoint Transformer通过解耦任务显著提升效率与准确性，其方法可扩展至物体姿态估计，新数据集将推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Krittika D'Silva,Jordan Cambe,Anastasios Noulas,Cecilia Mascolo,Adam Waksman
title: Modelling Urban Dynamics with Multi-Modal Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 使用多模态图卷积网络对城市动态进行建模
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.13981
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.13981
abstract: Modelling the dynamics of urban venues is a challenging task as it is multifaceted in nature. Demand is a function of many complex and nonlinear features such as neighborhood composition, real-time events, and seasonality. Recent advances in Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have had promising results as they build a graphical representation of a system and harness the potential of deep learning architectures. However, there has been limited work using GCNs in a temporal setting to model dynamic dependencies of the network. Further, within the context of urban environments, there has been no prior work using dynamic GCNs to support venue demand analysis and prediction. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning framework which aims to better model the popularity and growth of urban venues. Using a longitudinal dataset from location technology platform Foursquare, we model individual venues and venue types across London and Paris. First, representing cities as connected networks of venues, we quantify their structure and note a strong community structure in these retail networks, an observation that highlights the interplay of cooperative and competitive forces that emerge in local ecosystems of retail businesses. Next, we present our deep learning architecture which integrates both spatial and topological features into a temporal model which predicts the demand of a venue at the subsequent time-step. Our experiments demonstrate that our model can learn spatio-temporal trends of venue demand and consistently outperform baseline models. Relative to state-of-the-art deep learning models, our model reduces the RSME by ~ 28% in London and ~ 13% in Paris. Our approach highlights the power of complex network measures and GCNs in building prediction models for urban environments. The model could have numerous applications within the retail sector to better model venue demand and growth.
summary: Modelling the dynamics of urban venues is a challenging task as it is multifaceted in nature. Demand is a function of many complex and nonlinear features such as neighborhood composition, real-time events, and seasonality. Recent advances in Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have had promising results as they build a graphical representation of a system and harness the potential of deep learning architectures. However, there has been limited work using GCNs in a temporal setting to model dynamic dependencies of the network. Further, within the context of urban environments, there has been no prior work using dynamic GCNs to support venue demand analysis and prediction. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning framework which aims to better model the popularity and growth of urban venues. Using a longitudinal dataset from location technology platform Foursquare, we model individual venues and venue types across London and Paris. First, representing cities as connected networks of venues, we quantify their structure and note a strong community structure in these retail networks, an observation that highlights the interplay of cooperative and competitive forces that emerge in local ecosystems of retail businesses. Next, we present our deep learning architecture which integrates both spatial and topological features into a temporal model which predicts the demand of a venue at the subsequent time-step. Our experiments demonstrate that our model can learn spatio-temporal trends of venue demand and consistently outperform baseline models. Relative to state-of-the-art deep learning models, our model reduces the RSME by ~ 28% in London and ~ 13% in Paris. Our approach highlights the power of complex network measures and GCNs in building prediction models for urban environments. The model could have numerous applications within the retail sector to better model venue demand and growth.
abstract_zh: 对城市场馆的动态进行建模是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它本质上是多方面的。需求是许多复杂和非线性特征的函数，例如邻里组成、实时事件和季节性。图卷积网络（GCN）的最新进展已经取得了有希望的结果，因为它们构建了系统的图形表示并利用了深度学习架构的潜力。然而，在时间环境中使用 GCN 来模拟网络的动态依赖关系的工作还很有限。此外，在城市环境的背景下，之前还没有使用动态 GCN 来支持场馆需求分析和预测的工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架，旨在更好地模拟城市场馆的受欢迎程度和增长。使用定位技术平台 Foursquare 的纵向数据集，我们对伦敦和巴黎的各个场馆和场馆类型进行了建模。首先，将城市表示为相互连接的场所网络，我们量化其结构并注意到这些零售网络中强大的社区结构，这一观察结果强调了当地零售企业生态系统中出现的合作力量和竞争力量的相互作用。接下来，我们提出我们的深度学习架构，它将空间和拓扑特征集成到一个时间模型中，该模型可以预测后续时间步骤的场地需求。我们的实验表明，我们的模型可以学习场地需求的时空趋势，并始终优于基线模型。相对于最先进的深度学习模型，我们的模型将伦敦的 RSME 降低了约 28%，在巴黎将 RSME 降低了约 13%。我们的方法强调了复杂网络测量和 GCN 在构建城市环境预测模型方面的力量。该模型可以在零售行业中得到广泛应用，以更好地模拟场地需求和增长。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态图卷积网络（GCN）的深度学习框架，用于建模城市场所的需求动态预测。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络（GCN）在时间序列建模和城市场所需求分析方面存在不足，缺乏对动态依赖关系和空间拓扑特征的有效整合。
AI.method: 利用Foursquare平台的纵向数据，将城市建模为场所网络，结合空间结构与拓扑特征设计多模态GCN模型，捕捉场所需求的时空演化规律。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在伦敦和巴黎的数据集上分别将RMSE降低约28%和13%，显著优于现有深度学习基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 多模态GCN有效融合了城市网络的复杂结构特征，为零售场所需求预测提供了新方法，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Text2Video: Text-driven Talking-head Video Synthesis with Personalized Phoneme-Pose Dictionary
title_zh: Text2Video：带有个性化音素姿势字典的文本驱动的头部视频合成
abstract: With the advance of deep learning technology, automatic video generation from audio or text has become an emerging and promising research topic. In this paper, we present a novel approach to synthesize video from the text. The method builds a phoneme-pose dictionary and trains a generative adversarial network (GAN) to generate video from interpolated phoneme poses. Compared to audio-driven video generation algorithms, our approach has a number of advantages: 1) It only needs a fraction of the training data used by an audio-driven approach; 2) It is more flexible and not subject to vulnerability due to speaker variation; 3) It significantly reduces the preprocessing, training and inference time. We perform extensive experiments to compare the proposed method with state-of-the-art talking face generation methods on a benchmark dataset and datasets of our own. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our approach.
summary: With the advance of deep learning technology, automatic video generation from audio or text has become an emerging and promising research topic. In this paper, we present a novel approach to synthesize video from the text. The method builds a phoneme-pose dictionary and trains a generative adversarial network (GAN) to generate video from interpolated phoneme poses. Compared to audio-driven video generation algorithms, our approach has a number of advantages: 1) It only needs a fraction of the training data used by an audio-driven approach; 2) It is more flexible and not subject to vulnerability due to speaker variation; 3) It significantly reduces the preprocessing, training and inference time. We perform extensive experiments to compare the proposed method with state-of-the-art talking face generation methods on a benchmark dataset and datasets of our own. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our approach.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习技术的进步，从音频或文本自动生成视频已成为一个新兴且有前景的研究课题。在本文中，我们提出了一种从文本合成视频的新颖方法。该方法构建音素姿势字典并训练生成对抗网络（GAN）以根据插值音素姿势生成视频。与音频驱动的视频生成算法相比，我们的方法具有许多优点：1）它只需要音频驱动方法使用的训练数据的一小部分； 2）更加灵活，不会因为说话人的变化而受到影响； 3）显着减少了预处理、训练和推理时间。我们进行了大量的实验，在基准数据集和我们自己的数据集上将所提出的方法与最先进的说话人脸生成方法进行比较。结果证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本驱动的个性化语音-姿态字典的 talking-head 视频生成方法，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）实现从文本到视频的合成。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动的视频生成方法依赖大量数据、易受说话人差异影响且耗时较长，需提出更高效、灵活的文本驱动方案。
AI.method: 构建个性化音素-姿态字典，训练生成对抗网络（GAN）通过插值音素姿态生成视频，减少数据需求与计算开销。
AI.result: 在基准数据集及自建数据集上实验表明，该方法在生成效果、数据效率及推理速度上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过文本直接驱动视频生成，在数据效率、鲁棒性及计算效率方面具有显著优势，为个性化视频合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiao-Yun Zhou,Bolin Lai,Weijian Li,Yirui Wang,Kang Zheng,Fakai Wang,Chihung Lin,Le Lu,Lingyun Huang,Mei Han,Guotong Xie,Jing Xiao,Kuo Chang-Fu,Adam Harrison,Shun Miao
title: Scalable Semi-supervised Landmark Localization for X-ray Images using Few-shot Deep Adaptive Graph
title_zh: 使用少样本深度自适应图对 X 射线图像进行可扩展的半监督地标定位
abstract: Landmark localization plays an important role in medical image analysis. Learning based methods, including CNN and GCN, have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance. However, most of these methods are fully-supervised and heavily rely on manual labeling of a large training dataset. In this paper, based on a fully-supervised graph-based method, DAG, we proposed a semi-supervised extension of it, termed few-shot DAG, \ie five-shot DAG. It first trains a DAG model on the labeled data and then fine-tunes the pre-trained model on the unlabeled data with a teacher-student SSL mechanism. In addition to the semi-supervised loss, we propose another loss using JS divergence to regulate the consistency of the intermediate feature maps. We extensively evaluated our method on pelvis, hand and chest landmark detection tasks. Our experiment results demonstrate consistent and significant improvements over previous methods.
summary: Landmark localization plays an important role in medical image analysis. Learning based methods, including CNN and GCN, have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance. However, most of these methods are fully-supervised and heavily rely on manual labeling of a large training dataset. In this paper, based on a fully-supervised graph-based method, DAG, we proposed a semi-supervised extension of it, termed few-shot DAG, \ie five-shot DAG. It first trains a DAG model on the labeled data and then fine-tunes the pre-trained model on the unlabeled data with a teacher-student SSL mechanism. In addition to the semi-supervised loss, we propose another loss using JS divergence to regulate the consistency of the intermediate feature maps. We extensively evaluated our method on pelvis, hand and chest landmark detection tasks. Our experiment results demonstrate consistent and significant improvements over previous methods.
abstract_zh: 地标定位在医学图像分析中起着重要作用。基于学习的方法，包括 CNN 和 GCN，已经展示了最先进的性能。然而，这些方法大多数都是完全监督的，并且严重依赖于大型训练数据集的手动标记。在本文中，基于完全监督的基于图的方法 DAG，我们提出了它的半监督扩展，称为少样本 DAG，即五样本 DAG。它首先在标记数据上训练 DAG 模型，然后使用师生 SSL 机制对未标记数据上的预训练模型进行微调。除了半监督损失之外，我们还提出了另一种损失，使用 JS 散度来调节中间特征图的一致性。我们在骨盆、手和胸部标志检测任务上广泛评估了我们的方法。我们的实验结果表明比以前的方法有一致且显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量标注数据的半监督图神经网络方法，用于X光图像中的关键点定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量标注数据，而医学图像标注成本高昂且耗时，需开发减少标注依赖的半监督学习方案。
AI.method: 基于全监督图模型DAG，扩展为半监督版本（five-shot DAG），结合教师-学生SSL机制与JS散度损失函数，利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在骨盆、手部和胸部关键点检测任务中，相比现有方法取得显著且一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习结合JS散度约束能有效提升小样本场景下的医学图像关键点定位精度。

search_text: Scalable Semi-supervised Landmark Localization for X-ray Images using Few-shot Deep Adaptive Graph 使用少样本深度自适应图对 X 射线图像进行可扩展的半监督地标定位 Landmark localization plays an important role in medical image analysis. Learning based methods, including CNN and GCN, have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance. However, most of these methods are fully-supervised and heavily rely on manual labeling of a large training dataset. In this paper, based on a fully-supervised graph-based method, DAG, we proposed a semi-supervised extension of it, termed few-shot DAG, \ie five-shot DAG. It first trains a DAG model on the labeled data and then fine-tunes the pre-trained model on the unlabeled data with a teacher-student SSL mechanism. In addition to the semi-supervised loss, we propose another loss using JS divergence to regulate the consistency of the intermediate feature maps. We extensively evaluated our method on pelvis, hand and chest landmark detection tasks. Our experiment results demonstrate consistent and significant improvements over previous methods. 地标定位在医学图像分析中起着重要作用。基于学习的方法，包括 CNN 和 GCN，已经展示了最先进的性能。然而，这些方法大多数都是完全监督的，并且严重依赖于大型训练数据集的手动标记。在本文中，基于完全监督的基于图的方法 DAG，我们提出了它的半监督扩展，称为少样本 DAG，即五样本 DAG。它首先在标记数据上训练 DAG 模型，然后使用师生 SSL 机制对未标记数据上的预训练模型进行微调。除了半监督损失之外，我们还提出了另一种损失，使用 JS 散度来调节中间特征图的一致性。我们在骨盆、手和胸部标志检测任务上广泛评估了我们的方法。我们的实验结果表明比以前的方法有一致且显着的改进。 本文提出一种基于少量标注数据的半监督图神经网络方法，用于X光图像中的关键点定位。 Xiao-Yun Zhou,Bolin Lai,Weijian Li,Yirui Wang,Kang Zheng,Fakai Wang,Chihung Lin,Le Lu,Lingyun Huang,Mei Han,Guotong Xie,Jing Xiao,Kuo Chang-Fu,Adam Harrison,Shun Miao cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Debora Caldarola,Massimiliano Mancini,Fabio Galasso,Marco Ciccone,Emanuele Rodolà,Barbara Caputo
title: Cluster-driven Graph Federated Learning over Multiple Domains
title_zh: 集群驱动的多领域图联邦学习
comment: Accepted to CVPR21 Workshop Learning from Limited or Imperfect Data (L^2ID)
comments: Accepted to CVPR21 Workshop Learning from Limited or Imperfect Data (L^2ID)
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) deals with learning a central model (i.e. the server) in privacy-constrained scenarios, where data are stored on multiple devices (i.e. the clients). The central model has no direct access to the data, but only to the updates of the parameters computed locally by each client. This raises a problem, known as statistical heterogeneity, because the clients may have different data distributions (i.e. domains). This is only partly alleviated by clustering the clients. Clustering may reduce heterogeneity by identifying the domains, but it deprives each cluster model of the data and supervision of others. Here we propose a novel Cluster-driven Graph Federated Learning (FedCG). In FedCG, clustering serves to address statistical heterogeneity, while Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) enable sharing knowledge across them. FedCG: i) identifies the domains via an FL-compliant clustering and instantiates domain-specific modules (residual branches) for each domain; ii) connects the domain-specific modules through a GCN at training to learn the interactions among domains and share knowledge; and iii) learns to cluster unsupervised via teacher-student classifier-training iterations and to address novel unseen test domains via their domain soft-assignment scores. Thanks to the unique interplay of GCN over clusters, FedCG achieves the state-of-the-art on multiple FL benchmarks.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) deals with learning a central model (i.e. the server) in privacy-constrained scenarios, where data are stored on multiple devices (i.e. the clients). The central model has no direct access to the data, but only to the updates of the parameters computed locally by each client. This raises a problem, known as statistical heterogeneity, because the clients may have different data distributions (i.e. domains). This is only partly alleviated by clustering the clients. Clustering may reduce heterogeneity by identifying the domains, but it deprives each cluster model of the data and supervision of others. Here we propose a novel Cluster-driven Graph Federated Learning (FedCG). In FedCG, clustering serves to address statistical heterogeneity, while Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) enable sharing knowledge across them. FedCG: i) identifies the domains via an FL-compliant clustering and instantiates domain-specific modules (residual branches) for each domain; ii) connects the domain-specific modules through a GCN at training to learn the interactions among domains and share knowledge; and iii) learns to cluster unsupervised via teacher-student classifier-training iterations and to address novel unseen test domains via their domain soft-assignment scores. Thanks to the unique interplay of GCN over clusters, FedCG achieves the state-of-the-art on multiple FL benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）涉及在隐私受限的场景中学习中心模型（即服务器），其中数据存储在多个设备（即客户端）上。中央模型无法直接访问数据，而只能访问每个客户端本地计算的参数的更新。这引发了一个称为统计异质性的问题，因为客户端可能具有不同的数据分布（即域）。通过对客户端进行聚类只能部分缓解这种情况。聚类可以通过识别域来减少异质性，但它剥夺了每个聚类模型的数据和对其他模型的监督。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的集群驱动的图联邦学习（FedCG）。在 FedCG 中，聚类用于解决统计异质性，而图卷积网络 (GCN) 则可以在它们之间共享知识。 FedCG：i) 通过符合 FL 的集群来识别域，并为每个域实例化特定于域的模块（剩余分支）； ii) 在训练时通过 GCN 连接特定领域的模块，以学习领域之间的交互并共享知识； iii) 通过师生分类器训练迭代学习无监督聚类，并通过领域软分配分数解决新的未见过的测试领域。得益于 GCN 在集群上的独特相互作用，FedCG 在多个 FL 基准测试中实现了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于聚类的图联邦学习方法FedCG，旨在解决多领域联邦学习中的统计异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习在处理跨领域数据分布差异时存在局限性，聚类虽能部分缓解异质性，但限制了不同领域间的知识共享。
AI.method: FedCG通过FL合规聚类识别领域，构建领域特异性模块，并利用图卷积网络（GCN）连接模块实现跨领域知识共享，同时通过师生分类器迭代实现无监督聚类和新领域适应。
AI.result: FedCG在多个联邦学习基准测试中达到最先进水平，有效提升了跨领域异质数据下的模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 将聚类与图神经网络结合，能够有效应对联邦学习中的领域异质性挑战，为跨领域协同学习提供新思路。

title: The Logic of Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络的逻辑
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are deep learning architectures for machine learning problems on graphs. It has recently been shown that the expressiveness of GNNs can be characterised precisely by the combinatorial Weisfeiler-Leman algorithms and by finite variable counting logics. The correspondence has even led to new, higher-order GNNs corresponding to the WL algorithm in higher dimensions. The purpose of this paper is to explain these descriptive characterisations of GNNs.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are deep learning architectures for machine learning problems on graphs. It has recently been shown that the expressiveness of GNNs can be characterised precisely by the combinatorial Weisfeiler-Leman algorithms and by finite variable counting logics. The correspondence has even led to new, higher-order GNNs corresponding to the WL algorithm in higher dimensions. The purpose of this paper is to explain these descriptive characterisations of GNNs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是针对图机器学习问题的深度学习架构。最近的研究表明，GNN 的表达能力可以通过组合 Weisfeiler-Leman 算法和有限变量计数逻辑来精确表征。这种对应关系甚至催生了与更高维度的 WL 算法相对应的新的高阶 GNN。本文的目的是解释 GNN 的这些描述性特征。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解释图神经网络（GNNs）的描述性表征，即通过组合数学逻辑和有限变量计数逻辑精确刻画其表达能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在图数据处理中表现出色，但其理论表达能力的系统性表征仍需深入研究，以指导模型设计与应用边界分析。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立GNNs与组合Weisfeiler-Leman算法及有限变量计数逻辑的对应关系，并推广至高阶GNNs的多维WL算法。
AI.result: 揭示了GNNs的表达能力与逻辑复杂度的数学关联，提出了对应高维WL算法的新型高阶GNN架构。
AI.conclusion: 通过逻辑视角深化了对GNNs理论本质的理解，为模型设计提供了数学工具，并指明了更高阶图网络的研究方向。

The purpose of this paper is to explain these descriptive characterisations of GNNs. 图神经网络（GNN）是针对图机器学习问题的深度学习架构。最近的研究表明，GNN 的表达能力可以通过组合 Weisfeiler-Leman 算法和有限变量计数逻辑来精确表征。这种对应关系甚至催生了与更高维度的 WL 算法相对应的新的高阶 GNN。本文的目的是解释 GNN 的这些描述性特征。 本文旨在解释图神经网络（GNNs）的描述性表征，即通过组合数学逻辑和有限变量计数逻辑精确刻画其表达能力。 Martin Grohe cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.LO

title: AttendSeg: A Tiny Attention Condenser Neural Network for Semantic Segmentation on the Edge
title_zh: attendSeg：用于边缘语义分割的微型注意力集中神经网络
abstract: In this study, we introduce \textbf{AttendSeg}, a low-precision, highly compact deep neural network tailored for on-device semantic segmentation. AttendSeg possesses a self-attention network architecture comprising of light-weight attention condensers for improved spatial-channel selective attention at a very low complexity. The unique macro-architecture and micro-architecture design properties of AttendSeg strike a strong balance between representational power and efficiency, achieved via a machine-driven design exploration strategy tailored specifically for the task at hand. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed AttendSeg can achieve segmentation accuracy comparable to much larger deep neural networks with greater complexity while possessing a significantly lower architecture and computational complexity (requiring as much as >27x fewer MACs, >72x fewer parameters, and >288x lower weight memory requirements), making it well-suited for TinyML applications on the edge.
summary: In this study, we introduce \textbf{AttendSeg}, a low-precision, highly compact deep neural network tailored for on-device semantic segmentation. AttendSeg possesses a self-attention network architecture comprising of light-weight attention condensers for improved spatial-channel selective attention at a very low complexity. The unique macro-architecture and micro-architecture design properties of AttendSeg strike a strong balance between representational power and efficiency, achieved via a machine-driven design exploration strategy tailored specifically for the task at hand. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed AttendSeg can achieve segmentation accuracy comparable to much larger deep neural networks with greater complexity while possessing a significantly lower architecture and computational complexity (requiring as much as >27x fewer MACs, >72x fewer parameters, and >288x lower weight memory requirements), making it well-suited for TinyML applications on the edge.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们引入了 \textbf{AttendSeg}，这是一种专为设备上语义分割量身定制的低精度、高度紧凑的深度神经网络。 attendSeg 拥有一个由轻量级注意力冷凝器组成的自注意力网络架构，可以以非常低的复杂度改进空间通道选择性注意力。 attendSeg 独特的宏观架构和微架构设计特性在表征能力和效率之间取得了强有力的平衡，这是通过专门针对当前任务量身定制的机器驱动设计探索策略来实现的。实验结果表明，所提出的 attendSeg 可以实现与更大、更复杂的深度神经网络相当的分割精度，同时具有显着降低的架构和计算复杂性（需要的 MAC 数量减少 27 倍以上，参数数量减少 72 倍以上，权重内存要求降低 288 倍以上），使其非常适合边缘的 TinyML 应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AttendSeg的轻量级自注意力神经网络，用于边缘设备上的语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型复杂度高、资源消耗大，难以满足边缘设备对低计算量和低内存的需求。
AI.method: 设计包含轻量级注意力浓缩器的自注意力网络架构，通过机器驱动的优化策略平衡模型表现力与计算效率。
AI.result: 在保持分割精度接近大模型的同时，AttendSeg的计算量（MACs）减少27倍、参数量减少72倍、权重内存需求降低288倍。
AI.conclusion: AttendSeg凭借极高的计算效率和紧凑结构，成为适用于边缘端TinyML场景的语义分割理想方案。

title: Learning in Feedforward Neural Networks Accelerated by Transfer Entropy
title_zh: 通过传递熵加速前馈神经网络的学习
abstract: Current neural networks architectures are many times harder to train because of the increasing size and complexity of the used datasets. Our objective is to design more efficient training algorithms utilizing causal relationships inferred from neural networks. The transfer entropy (TE) was initially introduced as an information transfer measure used to quantify the statistical coherence between events (time series). Later, it was related to causality, even if they are not the same. There are only few papers reporting applications of causality or TE in neural networks. Our contribution is an information-theoretical method for analyzing information transfer between the nodes of feedforward neural networks. The information transfer is measured by the TE of feedback neural connections. Intuitively, TE measures the relevance of a connection in the network and the feedback amplifies this connection. We introduce a backpropagation type training algorithm that uses TE feedback connections to improve its performance.
summary: Current neural networks architectures are many times harder to train because of the increasing size and complexity of the used datasets. Our objective is to design more efficient training algorithms utilizing causal relationships inferred from neural networks. The transfer entropy (TE) was initially introduced as an information transfer measure used to quantify the statistical coherence between events (time series). Later, it was related to causality, even if they are not the same. There are only few papers reporting applications of causality or TE in neural networks. Our contribution is an information-theoretical method for analyzing information transfer between the nodes of feedforward neural networks. The information transfer is measured by the TE of feedback neural connections. Intuitively, TE measures the relevance of a connection in the network and the feedback amplifies this connection. We introduce a backpropagation type training algorithm that uses TE feedback connections to improve its performance.
abstract_zh: 由于所使用的数据集的大小和复杂性不断增加，当前的神经网络架构的训练难度要高出很多倍。我们的目标是利用从神经网络推断的因果关系设计更有效的训练算法。传递熵 (TE) 最初是作为一种信息传递度量引入的，用于量化事件（时间序列）之间的统计一致性。后来就和因果关系联系起来了，即使它们并不相同。报道因果关系或 TE 在神经网络中的应用的论文很少。我们的贡献是一种用于分析前馈神经网络节点之间信息传输的信息论方法。信息传递通过反馈神经连接的 TE 来衡量。直观地说，TE 测量网络中连接的相关性，并且反馈会放大该连接。我们引入了一种反向传播型训练算法，该算法使用 TE 反馈连接来提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 设计利用转移熵（TE）分析前馈神经网络节点间信息传递的高效训练算法，以提升训练效率
AI.motivation: 解决大规模复杂数据集下神经网络训练效率低的问题，通过引入因果关系和转移熵提升训练效率
AI.method: 基于信息论的方法，通过反馈连接的转移熵量化神经网络节点间的信息传递，改进反向传播算法
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效提升前馈神经网络的训练效率和性能
AI.conclusion: 提出结合转移熵与因果关系的新型训练算法，为神经网络高效训练提供理论支持和方法创新

title: D-VAL: An automatic functional equivalence validation tool for planning domain models
title_zh: D-VAL：用于规划领域模型的自动功能等效性验证工具
abstract: This paper introduces an approach to validate the functional equivalence of planning domain models. Validating the functional equivalence of planning domain models is the problem of formally confirming that two planning domain models can be used to solve the same set of problems for any set of objects. The need for techniques to validate the functional equivalence of planning domain models has been highlighted in previous research and has applications in model learning, development and extension. We prove the soundness and completeness of our method. We also develop D-VAL, an automatic functional equivalence validation tool for planning domain models. Empirical evaluation shows that D-VAL validates the functional equivalence of all examined domains in less than 43 seconds. Additionally, we provide a benchmark to evaluate the feasibility and performance of this and future related work.
summary: This paper introduces an approach to validate the functional equivalence of planning domain models. Validating the functional equivalence of planning domain models is the problem of formally confirming that two planning domain models can be used to solve the same set of problems for any set of objects. The need for techniques to validate the functional equivalence of planning domain models has been highlighted in previous research and has applications in model learning, development and extension. We prove the soundness and completeness of our method. We also develop D-VAL, an automatic functional equivalence validation tool for planning domain models. Empirical evaluation shows that D-VAL validates the functional equivalence of all examined domains in less than 43 seconds. Additionally, we provide a benchmark to evaluate the feasibility and performance of this and future related work.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种验证规划领域模型功能等价性的方法。验证规划域模型的功能等价性是正式确认两个规划域模型可用于解决任何一组对象的同一组问题的问题。先前的研究已经强调了对验证规划领域模型功能等价性的技术的需求，并在模型学习、开发和扩展中得到应用。我们证明了我们方法的合理性和完整性。我们还开发了 D-VAL，一种用于规划领域模型的自动功能等效性验证工具。实证评估表明，D-VAL 在不到 43 秒的时间内验证了所有检查域的功能等效性。此外，我们还提供了一个基准来评估本次及未来相关工作的可行性和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动验证规划领域模型功能等价性的工具D-VAL，通过形式化方法确认两个模型是否能解决相同的问题集。
AI.motivation: 验证规划领域模型的功能等价性在模型学习、开发和扩展中具有重要应用价值，但此前缺乏有效技术手段。
AI.method: 通过证明方法的正确性与完备性，开发了D-VAL工具，利用基准测试验证模型等价性。
AI.result: D-VAL在43秒内验证了所有测试领域模型的等价性，并提供了评估该技术及未来研究的基准。
AI.conclusion: D-VAL有效解决了规划领域模型功能等价性验证问题，为后续研究提供了可复用的基准和工具支持。

The need for techniques to validate the functional equivalence of planning domain models has been highlighted in previous research and has applications in model learning, development and extension. We prove the soundness and completeness of our method. We also develop D-VAL, an automatic functional equivalence validation tool for planning domain models. Empirical evaluation shows that D-VAL validates the functional equivalence of all examined domains in less than 43 seconds. Additionally, we provide a benchmark to evaluate the feasibility and performance of this and future related work. 本文介绍了一种验证规划领域模型功能等价性的方法。验证规划域模型的功能等价性是正式确认两个规划域模型可用于解决任何一组对象的同一组问题的问题。先前的研究已经强调了对验证规划领域模型功能等价性的技术的需求，并在模型学习、开发和扩展中得到应用。我们证明了我们方法的合理性和完整性。我们还开发了 D-VAL，一种用于规划领域模型的自动功能等效性验证工具。实证评估表明，D-VAL 在不到 43 秒的时间内验证了所有检查域的功能等效性。此外，我们还提供了一个基准来评估本次及未来相关工作的可行性和性能。 本文提出了一种自动验证规划领域模型功能等价性的工具D-VAL，通过形式化方法确认两个模型是否能解决相同的问题集。 Anas Shrinah,Derek Long,Kerstin Eder cs.AI

authors_text: Hannah Bast,Johannes Kalmbach,Theresa Klumpp,Florian Kramer,Niklas Schnelle
title: Efficient SPARQL Autocompletion via SPARQL
title_zh: 通过 SPARQL 进行高效的 SPARQL 自动补全
abstract: We show how to achieve fast autocompletion for SPARQL queries on very large knowledge bases. At any position in the body of a SPARQL query, the autocompletion suggests matching subjects, predicates, or objects. The suggestions are context-sensitive in the sense that they lead to a non-empty result and are ranked by their relevance to the part of the query already typed. The suggestions can be narrowed down by prefix search on the names and aliases of the desired subject, predicate, or object. All suggestions are themselves obtained via SPARQL queries, which we call autocompletion queries. For existing SPARQL engines, these queries are impractically slow on large knowledge bases. We present various algorithmic and engineering improvements of an existing SPARQL engine such that these autocompletion queries are executed efficiently. We provide an extensive evaluation of a variety of suggestion methods on three large knowledge bases, including Wikidata (6.9B triples). We explore the trade-off between the relevance of the suggestions and the processing time of the autocompletion queries. We compare our results with two widely used SPARQL engines, Virtuoso and Blazegraph. On Wikidata, we achieve fully sensitive suggestions with sub-second response times for over 90% of a large and diverse set of thousands of autocompletion queries. Materials for full reproducibility, an interactive evaluation web app, and a demo are available on: https://ad.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/publications .
summary: We show how to achieve fast autocompletion for SPARQL queries on very large knowledge bases. At any position in the body of a SPARQL query, the autocompletion suggests matching subjects, predicates, or objects. The suggestions are context-sensitive in the sense that they lead to a non-empty result and are ranked by their relevance to the part of the query already typed. The suggestions can be narrowed down by prefix search on the names and aliases of the desired subject, predicate, or object. All suggestions are themselves obtained via SPARQL queries, which we call autocompletion queries. For existing SPARQL engines, these queries are impractically slow on large knowledge bases. We present various algorithmic and engineering improvements of an existing SPARQL engine such that these autocompletion queries are executed efficiently. We provide an extensive evaluation of a variety of suggestion methods on three large knowledge bases, including Wikidata (6.9B triples). We explore the trade-off between the relevance of the suggestions and the processing time of the autocompletion queries. We compare our results with two widely used SPARQL engines, Virtuoso and Blazegraph. On Wikidata, we achieve fully sensitive suggestions with sub-second response times for over 90% of a large and diverse set of thousands of autocompletion queries. Materials for full reproducibility, an interactive evaluation web app, and a demo are available on: https://ad.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/publications .
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何在非常大的知识库上实现 SPARQL 查询的快速自动完成。在 SPARQL 查询正文中的任何位置，自动完成功能都会建议匹配的主语、谓词或宾语。这些建议是上下文相关的，因为它们会产生非空结果，并根据与已键入的查询部分的相关性进行排名。可以通过对所需主语、谓语或宾语的名称和别名进行前缀搜索来缩小建议范围。所有建议本身都是通过 SPARQL 查询获得的，我们称之为自动完成查询。对于现有的 SPARQL 引擎，这些查询在大型知识库上速度慢得不切实际。我们提出了现有 SPARQL 引擎的各种算法和工程改进，以便高效执行这些自动完成查询。我们对三个大型知识库（包括维基数据（6.9B 三元组））上的各种建议方法进行了广泛的评估。我们探索建议的相关性和自动完成查询的处理时间之间的权衡。我们将我们的结果与两种广泛使用的 SPARQL 引擎 Virtuoso 和 Blazegraph 进行比较。在维基数据上，我们为数千个大型且多样化的自动完成查询中的 90% 以上提供了完全敏感的建议，响应时间为亚秒级。完全可重复性的材料、交互式评估网络应用程序和演示可在以下网址获取：https://ad.informatik.uni-freiburg.de/publications。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过优化SPARQL引擎实现大规模知识库中SPARQL查询高效自动补全的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有SPARQL引擎在处理大规模知识库时，自动补全查询效率低下，无法满足实际需求。
AI.method: 通过改进SPARQL引擎的算法与工程实现，优化自动补全查询的执行效率，并结合上下文相关性排序与前缀搜索策略。
AI.result: 在Wikidata等知识库上实现90%以上查询的亚秒级响应，补全建议兼具相关性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了补全建议的相关性与计算开销，在大规模知识库场景下显著优于Virtuoso和Blazegraph等主流引擎。

authors_text: Kaveh Akbarzadeh-Sherbaf,Mikaeel Bahmani,Danial Ghiaseddin,Saeed Safari,Abdol-Hossein Vahabie
title: A Novel Approximate Hamming Weight Computing for Spiking Neural Networks: an FPGA Friendly Architecture
title_zh: 一种新颖的尖峰神经网络近似汉明权计算：FPGA 友好架构
abstract: Hamming weights of sparse and long binary vectors are important modules in many scientific applications, particularly in spiking neural networks that are of our interest. To improve both area and latency of their FPGA implementations, we propose a method inspired from synaptic transmission failure for exploiting FPGA lookup tables to compress long input vectors. To evaluate the effectiveness of this approach, we count the number of `1's of the compressed vector using a simple linear adder. We classify the compressors into shallow ones with up to two levels of lookup tables and deep ones with more than two levels. The architecture generated by this approach shows up to 82% and 35% reductions for different configurations of shallow compressors in area and latency respectively. Moreover, our simulation results show that calculating the Hamming weight of a 1024-bit vector of a spiking neural network by the use of only deep compressors preserves the chaotic behavior of the network while slightly impacts on the learning performance.
summary: Hamming weights of sparse and long binary vectors are important modules in many scientific applications, particularly in spiking neural networks that are of our interest. To improve both area and latency of their FPGA implementations, we propose a method inspired from synaptic transmission failure for exploiting FPGA lookup tables to compress long input vectors. To evaluate the effectiveness of this approach, we count the number of `1's of the compressed vector using a simple linear adder. We classify the compressors into shallow ones with up to two levels of lookup tables and deep ones with more than two levels. The architecture generated by this approach shows up to 82% and 35% reductions for different configurations of shallow compressors in area and latency respectively. Moreover, our simulation results show that calculating the Hamming weight of a 1024-bit vector of a spiking neural network by the use of only deep compressors preserves the chaotic behavior of the network while slightly impacts on the learning performance.
abstract_zh: 稀疏和长二元向量的汉明权重是许多科学应用中的重要模块，特别是在我们感兴趣的尖峰神经网络中。为了改善 FPGA 实现的面积和延迟，我们提出了一种受突触传输失败启发的方法，用于利用 FPGA 查找表来压缩长输入向量。为了评估这种方法的有效性，我们使用简单的线性加法器计算压缩向量中“1”的数量。我们将压缩器分为具有最多两级查找表的浅层压缩器和具有两层以上查找表的深层压缩器。通过这种方法生成的架构显示，浅压缩器的不同配置在面积和延迟方面分别减少了高达 82% 和 35%。此外，我们的模拟结果表明，仅使用深度压缩器计算尖峰神经网络的 1024 位向量的汉明权重保留了网络的混沌行为，同时对学习性能产生了轻微影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对脉冲神经网络（SNN）的FPGA友好型架构，通过压缩二进制输入向量来高效计算汉明重量。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络中的汉明重量计算需要处理长且稀疏的二进制向量，传统方法在FPGA实现中存在面积和延迟瓶颈，需优化计算效率。
AI.method: 受突触传递失败机制启发，利用FPGA查找表（LUT）压缩输入向量，并分类为浅层（最多两层LUT）和深层（多于两层LUT）压缩器，通过线性加法器统计压缩后向量的1的个数。
AI.result: 浅层压缩器在面积和延迟上分别减少82%和35%；深层压缩器在保持网络混沌行为的同时，仅轻微影响学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低FPGA资源消耗，同时维持SNN功能，为高效硬件实现提供可行方案。

authors_text: Fangzheng Lin,Jiesheng Yang,Jiangpeng Shu,Raimar J. Scherer
title: Crack Semantic Segmentation using the U-Net with Full Attention Strategy
title_zh: 使用具有充分注意策略的 U-Net 破解语义分割
abstract: Structures suffer from the emergence of cracks, therefore, crack detection is always an issue with much concern in structural health monitoring. Along with the rapid progress of deep learning technology, image semantic segmentation, an active research field, offers another solution, which is more effective and intelligent, to crack detection Through numerous artificial neural networks have been developed to address the preceding issue, corresponding explorations are never stopped improving the quality of crack detection. This paper presents a novel artificial neural network architecture named Full Attention U-net for image semantic segmentation. The proposed architecture leverages the U-net as the backbone and adopts the Full Attention Strategy, which is a synthesis of the attention mechanism and the outputs from each encoding layer in skip connection. Subject to the hardware in training, the experiments are composed of verification and validation. In verification, 4 networks including U-net, Attention U-net, Advanced Attention U-net, and Full Attention U-net are tested through cell images for a competitive study. With respect to mean intersection-over-unions and clarity of edge identification, the Full Attention U-net performs best in verification, and is hence applied for crack semantic segmentation in validation to demonstrate its effectiveness.

Along with the rapid progress of deep learning technology, image semantic segmentation, an active research field, offers another solution, which is more effective and intelligent, to crack detection Through numerous artificial neural networks have been developed to address the preceding issue, corresponding explorations are never stopped improving the quality of crack detection. This paper presents a novel artificial neural network architecture named Full Attention U-net for image semantic segmentation. The proposed architecture leverages the U-net as the backbone and adopts the Full Attention Strategy, which is a synthesis of the attention mechanism and the outputs from each encoding layer in skip connection. In verification, 4 networks including U-net, Attention U-net, Advanced Attention U-net, and Full Attention U-net are tested through cell images for a competitive study. With respect to mean intersection-over-unions and clarity of edge identification, the Full Attention U-net performs best in verification, and is hence applied for crack semantic segmentation in validation to demonstrate its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 结构容易出现裂缝，因此裂缝检测一直是结构健康监测中备受关注的问题。随着深度学习技术的快速进步，图像语义分割这个活跃的研究领域为裂纹检测提供了另一种更有效、更智能的解决方案。为了解决上述问题，人们开发了大量的人工神经网络，相应的探索也从未停止，以提高裂纹检测的质量。本文提出了一种名为 Full Attention U-net 的新型人工神经网络架构，用于图像语义分割。所提出的架构利用 U-net 作为骨干，并采用完全注意力策略，该策略是注意力机制和跳跃连接中每个编码层的输出的综合。根据训练中的硬件情况，实验分为验证和验证。在验证中，通过细胞图像测试了U-net、Attention U-net、Advanced Attention U-net和Full Attention U-net等4个网络，以进行竞争性研究。在平均交并和边缘识别清晰度方面，Full Attention U-net 在验证中表现最好，因此应用于验证中的裂纹语义分割以证明其有效性。

AI.motivation: 现有裂缝检测方法在准确性和边缘识别清晰度上存在不足，需更有效的解决方案
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构，融合全注意力机制与跳跃连接中的各编码层输出，提升特征提取与细节保留能力
AI.result: 在验证实验中，Full Attention U-Net在平均交并比（mIoU）和边缘识别清晰度上优于其他对比网络
AI.conclusion: 全注意力策略有效提升了裂缝语义分割的性能，验证了其在结构健康监测中的应用潜力

search_text: Crack Semantic Segmentation using the U-Net with Full Attention Strategy 使用具有充分注意策略的 U-Net 破解语义分割 Structures suffer from the emergence of cracks, therefore, crack detection is always an issue with much concern in structural health monitoring. Along with the rapid progress of deep learning technology, image semantic segmentation, an active research field, offers another solution, which is more effective and intelligent, to crack detection Through numerous artificial neural networks have been developed to address the preceding issue, corresponding explorations are never stopped improving the quality of crack detection. This paper presents a novel artificial neural network architecture named Full Attention U-net for image semantic segmentation. The proposed architecture leverages the U-net as the backbone and adopts the Full Attention Strategy, which is a synthesis of the attention mechanism and the outputs from each encoding layer in skip connection. Subject to the hardware in training, the experiments are composed of verification and validation. In verification, 4 networks including U-net, Attention U-net, Advanced Attention U-net, and Full Attention U-net are tested through cell images for a competitive study. With respect to mean intersection-over-unions and clarity of edge identification, the Full Attention U-net performs best in verification, and is hence applied for crack semantic segmentation in validation to demonstrate its effectiveness. 结构容易出现裂缝，因此裂缝检测一直是结构健康监测中备受关注的问题。随着深度学习技术的快速进步，图像语义分割这个活跃的研究领域为裂纹检测提供了另一种更有效、更智能的解决方案。为了解决上述问题，人们开发了大量的人工神经网络，相应的探索也从未停止，以提高裂纹检测的质量。本文提出了一种名为 Full Attention U-net 的新型人工神经网络架构，用于图像语义分割。所提出的架构利用 U-net 作为骨干，并采用完全注意力策略，该策略是注意力机制和跳跃连接中每个编码层的输出的综合。根据训练中的硬件情况，实验分为验证和验证。在验证中，通过细胞图像测试了U-net、Attention U-net、Advanced Attention U-net和Full Attention U-net等4个网络，以进行竞争性研究。在平均交并和边缘识别清晰度方面，Full Attention U-net 在验证中表现最好，因此应用于验证中的裂纹语义分割以证明其有效性。 提出一种基于全注意力策略的U-Net网络架构，用于提高裂缝语义分割的准确性 Fangzheng Lin,Jiesheng Yang,Jiangpeng Shu,Raimar J. Scherer cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Unsupervised Layered Image Decomposition into Object Prototypes
title_zh: 无监督分层图像分解为对象原型
abstract: We present an unsupervised learning framework for decomposing images into layers of automatically discovered object models. Contrary to recent approaches that model image layers with autoencoder networks, we represent them as explicit transformations of a small set of prototypical images. Our model has three main components: (i) a set of object prototypes in the form of learnable images with a transparency channel, which we refer to as sprites; (ii) differentiable parametric functions predicting occlusions and transformation parameters necessary to instantiate the sprites in a given image; (iii) a layered image formation model with occlusion for compositing these instances into complete images including background. By jointly learning the sprites and occlusion/transformation predictors to reconstruct images, our approach not only yields accurate layered image decompositions, but also identifies object categories and instance parameters. We first validate our approach by providing results on par with the state of the art on standard multi-object synthetic benchmarks (Tetrominoes, Multi-dSprites, CLEVR6). We then demonstrate the applicability of our model to real images in tasks that include clustering (SVHN, GTSRB), cosegmentation (Weizmann Horse) and object discovery from unfiltered social network images. To the best of our knowledge, our approach is the first layered image decomposition algorithm that learns an explicit and shared concept of object type, and is robust enough to be applied to real images.
summary: We present an unsupervised learning framework for decomposing images into layers of automatically discovered object models. Contrary to recent approaches that model image layers with autoencoder networks, we represent them as explicit transformations of a small set of prototypical images. Our model has three main components: (i) a set of object prototypes in the form of learnable images with a transparency channel, which we refer to as sprites; (ii) differentiable parametric functions predicting occlusions and transformation parameters necessary to instantiate the sprites in a given image; (iii) a layered image formation model with occlusion for compositing these instances into complete images including background. By jointly learning the sprites and occlusion/transformation predictors to reconstruct images, our approach not only yields accurate layered image decompositions, but also identifies object categories and instance parameters. We first validate our approach by providing results on par with the state of the art on standard multi-object synthetic benchmarks (Tetrominoes, Multi-dSprites, CLEVR6). We then demonstrate the applicability of our model to real images in tasks that include clustering (SVHN, GTSRB), cosegmentation (Weizmann Horse) and object discovery from unfiltered social network images. To the best of our knowledge, our approach is the first layered image decomposition algorithm that learns an explicit and shared concept of object type, and is robust enough to be applied to real images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个无监督学习框架，用于将图像分解为自动发现的对象模型层。与最近使用自动编码器网络对图像层进行建模的方法相反，我们将它们表示为一小组原型图像的显式变换。我们的模型具有三个主要组成部分：（i）一组具有透明通道的可学习图像形式的对象原型，我们将其称为精灵； (ii) 可微分参数函数，用于预测实例化给定图像中的精灵所需的遮挡和变换参数； (iii)具有遮挡的分层图像形成模型，用于将这些实例合成为包括背景的完整图像。通过联合学习精灵和遮挡/变换预测器来重建图像，我们的方法不仅可以产生准确的分层图像分解，还可以识别对象类别和实例参数。我们首先通过在标准多对象合成基准（Tetrominoes、Multi-dSprites、CLEVR6）上提供与最新技术水平相当的结果来验证我们的方法。然后，我们展示了我们的模型对真实图像任务的适用性，包括聚类（SVHN、GTSRB）、协同分割（Weizmann Horse）和从未过滤的社交网络图像中发现对象。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个分层图像分解算法，它学习明确且共享的对象类型概念，并且足够强大，可以应用于真实图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习框架，将图像分解为自动发现的对象原型层。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用自编码器建模图像层，但无法显式学习对象原型。本文旨在通过显式变换小规模原型图像，实现更准确的图像分层分解。
AI.method: 方法包含三部分：(i) 带透明通道的可学习原型图像（sprites）；(ii) 预测遮挡和变换参数的可微分函数；(iii) 带遮挡的分层图像合成模型。通过联合学习原型与预测器实现图像重建。
AI.result: 在合成基准（Tetrominoes等）和真实图像任务（聚类、共分割等）中表现优异，首次实现跨真实图像的显式对象类型共享概念学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式原型学习和遮挡建模，在无监督场景下实现了优于现有方法的图像分层分解与对象发现能力。

Contrary to recent approaches that model image layers with autoencoder networks, we represent them as explicit transformations of a small set of prototypical images. Our model has three main components: (i) a set of object prototypes in the form of learnable images with a transparency channel, which we refer to as sprites; (ii) differentiable parametric functions predicting occlusions and transformation parameters necessary to instantiate the sprites in a given image; (iii) a layered image formation model with occlusion for compositing these instances into complete images including background. By jointly learning the sprites and occlusion/transformation predictors to reconstruct images, our approach not only yields accurate layered image decompositions, but also identifies object categories and instance parameters. We first validate our approach by providing results on par with the state of the art on standard multi-object synthetic benchmarks (Tetrominoes, Multi-dSprites, CLEVR6). We then demonstrate the applicability of our model to real images in tasks that include clustering (SVHN, GTSRB), cosegmentation (Weizmann Horse) and object discovery from unfiltered social network images. To the best of our knowledge, our approach is the first layered image decomposition algorithm that learns an explicit and shared concept of object type, and is robust enough to be applied to real images. 我们提出了一个无监督学习框架，用于将图像分解为自动发现的对象模型层。与最近使用自动编码器网络对图像层进行建模的方法相反，我们将它们表示为一小组原型图像的显式变换。我们的模型具有三个主要组成部分：（i）一组具有透明通道的可学习图像形式的对象原型，我们将其称为精灵； (ii) 可微分参数函数，用于预测实例化给定图像中的精灵所需的遮挡和变换参数； (iii)具有遮挡的分层图像形成模型，用于将这些实例合成为包括背景的完整图像。通过联合学习精灵和遮挡/变换预测器来重建图像，我们的方法不仅可以产生准确的分层图像分解，还可以识别对象类别和实例参数。我们首先通过在标准多对象合成基准（Tetrominoes、Multi-dSprites、CLEVR6）上提供与最新技术水平相当的结果来验证我们的方法。然后，我们展示了我们的模型对真实图像任务的适用性，包括聚类（SVHN、GTSRB）、协同分割（Weizmann Horse）和从未过滤的社交网络图像中发现对象。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个分层图像分解算法，它学习明确且共享的对象类型概念，并且足够强大，可以应用于真实图像。 本文提出一种无监督学习框架，将图像分解为自动发现的对象原型层。 Tom Monnier,Elliot Vincent,Jean Ponce,Mathieu Aubry cs.CV

authors_text: Fangzhou Han,Shuquan Ye,Mingming He,Menglei Chai,Jing Liao
title: Exemplar-Based 3D Portrait Stylization
title_zh: 基于范例的 3D 肖像风格化
abstract: Exemplar-based portrait stylization is widely attractive and highly desired. Despite recent successes, it remains challenging, especially when considering both texture and geometric styles. In this paper, we present the first framework for one-shot 3D portrait style transfer, which can generate 3D face models with both the geometry exaggerated and the texture stylized while preserving the identity from the original content. It requires only one arbitrary style image instead of a large set of training examples for a particular style, provides geometry and texture outputs that are fully parameterized and disentangled, and enables further graphics applications with the 3D representations. The framework consists of two stages. In the first geometric style transfer stage, we use facial landmark translation to capture the coarse geometry style and guide the deformation of the dense 3D face geometry. In the second texture style transfer stage, we focus on performing style transfer on the canonical texture by adopting a differentiable renderer to optimize the texture in a multi-view framework. Experiments show that our method achieves robustly good results on different artistic styles and outperforms existing methods. We also demonstrate the advantages of our method via various 2D and 3D graphics applications. Project page is https://halfjoe.github.io/projs/3DPS/index.html.
summary: Exemplar-based portrait stylization is widely attractive and highly desired. Despite recent successes, it remains challenging, especially when considering both texture and geometric styles. In this paper, we present the first framework for one-shot 3D portrait style transfer, which can generate 3D face models with both the geometry exaggerated and the texture stylized while preserving the identity from the original content. It requires only one arbitrary style image instead of a large set of training examples for a particular style, provides geometry and texture outputs that are fully parameterized and disentangled, and enables further graphics applications with the 3D representations. The framework consists of two stages. In the first geometric style transfer stage, we use facial landmark translation to capture the coarse geometry style and guide the deformation of the dense 3D face geometry. In the second texture style transfer stage, we focus on performing style transfer on the canonical texture by adopting a differentiable renderer to optimize the texture in a multi-view framework. Experiments show that our method achieves robustly good results on different artistic styles and outperforms existing methods. We also demonstrate the advantages of our method via various 2D and 3D graphics applications. Project page is https://halfjoe.github.io/projs/3DPS/index.html.
abstract_zh: 基于范例的肖像风格化具有广泛的吸引力和强烈的需求。尽管最近取得了成功，但它仍然具有挑战性，特别是在考虑纹理和几何风格时。在本文中，我们提出了第一个一次性 3D 肖像风格迁移框架，它可以生成具有几何夸张和纹理风格化的 3D 面部模型，同时保留原始内容的身份。它只需要一个任意风格的图像，而不是特定风格的大量训练示例，提供完全参数化和解开的几何和纹理输出，并支持使用 3D 表示进行进一步的图形应用。该框架由两个阶段组成。在第一个几何风格转换阶段，我们使用面部标志平移来捕获粗糙的几何风格并引导密集的 3D 面部几何形状的变形。在第二个纹理风格转移阶段，我们专注于通过采用可微渲染器对规范纹理进行风格转移，以在多视图框架中优化纹理。实验表明，我们的方法在不同的艺术风格上取得了良好的结果，并且优于现有的方法。我们还通过各种 2D 和 3D 图形应用程序展示了我们的方法的优点。项目页面为 https://halfjoe.github.io/projs/3DPS/index.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单个示例图像的3D人像风格化框架，能够同时保持身份信息并生成具有夸张几何形状和风格化纹理的3D人脸模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理3D人像的纹理和几何风格化时存在挑战，且通常需要大量训练数据而非单个示例图像。
AI.method: 框架分两阶段：第一阶段通过面部关键点翻译捕捉粗粒度几何风格并变形密集3D几何；第二阶段采用可微分渲染器在多视角框架中优化规范纹理。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种艺术风格下表现稳健，优于现有方法，并通过2D/3D图形应用验证了优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了参数化且解耦的几何与纹理输出，为3D风格化提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法实现了参数化且解耦的几何与纹理输出，为3D风格化提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

search_text: Exemplar-Based 3D Portrait Stylization 基于范例的 3D 肖像风格化 Exemplar-based portrait stylization is widely attractive and highly desired. Despite recent successes, it remains challenging, especially when considering both texture and geometric styles. In this paper, we present the first framework for one-shot 3D portrait style transfer, which can generate 3D face models with both the geometry exaggerated and the texture stylized while preserving the identity from the original content. It requires only one arbitrary style image instead of a large set of training examples for a particular style, provides geometry and texture outputs that are fully parameterized and disentangled, and enables further graphics applications with the 3D representations. The framework consists of two stages. In the first geometric style transfer stage, we use facial landmark translation to capture the coarse geometry style and guide the deformation of the dense 3D face geometry. In the second texture style transfer stage, we focus on performing style transfer on the canonical texture by adopting a differentiable renderer to optimize the texture in a multi-view framework. Experiments show that our method achieves robustly good results on different artistic styles and outperforms existing methods. We also demonstrate the advantages of our method via various 2D and 3D graphics applications. Project page is https://halfjoe.github.io/projs/3DPS/index.html. 基于范例的肖像风格化具有广泛的吸引力和强烈的需求。尽管最近取得了成功，但它仍然具有挑战性，特别是在考虑纹理和几何风格时。在本文中，我们提出了第一个一次性 3D 肖像风格迁移框架，它可以生成具有几何夸张和纹理风格化的 3D 面部模型，同时保留原始内容的身份。它只需要一个任意风格的图像，而不是特定风格的大量训练示例，提供完全参数化和解开的几何和纹理输出，并支持使用 3D 表示进行进一步的图形应用。该框架由两个阶段组成。在第一个几何风格转换阶段，我们使用面部标志平移来捕获粗糙的几何风格并引导密集的 3D 面部几何形状的变形。在第二个纹理风格转移阶段，我们专注于通过采用可微渲染器对规范纹理进行风格转移，以在多视图框架中优化纹理。实验表明，我们的方法在不同的艺术风格上取得了良好的结果，并且优于现有的方法。我们还通过各种 2D 和 3D 图形应用程序展示了我们的方法的优点。项目页面为 https://halfjoe.github.io/projs/3DPS/index.html。 本文提出一种基于单个示例图像的3D人像风格化框架，能够同时保持身份信息并生成具有夸张几何形状和风格化纹理的3D人脸模型。 Fangzhou Han,Shuquan Ye,Mingming He,Menglei Chai,Jing Liao cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Christoph Feichtenhofer,Haoqi Fan,Bo Xiong,Ross Girshick,Kaiming He
title: A Large-Scale Study on Unsupervised Spatiotemporal Representation Learning
title_zh: 无监督时空表示学习的大规模研究
abstract: We present a large-scale study on unsupervised spatiotemporal representation learning from videos. With a unified perspective on four recent image-based frameworks, we study a simple objective that can easily generalize all these methods to space-time. Our objective encourages temporally-persistent features in the same video, and in spite of its simplicity, it works surprisingly well across: (i) different unsupervised frameworks, (ii) pre-training datasets, (iii) downstream datasets, and (iv) backbone architectures. We draw a series of intriguing observations from this study, e.g., we discover that encouraging long-spanned persistency can be effective even if the timespan is 60 seconds. In addition to state-of-the-art results in multiple benchmarks, we report a few promising cases in which unsupervised pre-training can outperform its supervised counterpart. Code is made available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/SlowFast
summary: We present a large-scale study on unsupervised spatiotemporal representation learning from videos. With a unified perspective on four recent image-based frameworks, we study a simple objective that can easily generalize all these methods to space-time. Our objective encourages temporally-persistent features in the same video, and in spite of its simplicity, it works surprisingly well across: (i) different unsupervised frameworks, (ii) pre-training datasets, (iii) downstream datasets, and (iv) backbone architectures. We draw a series of intriguing observations from this study, e.g., we discover that encouraging long-spanned persistency can be effective even if the timespan is 60 seconds. In addition to state-of-the-art results in multiple benchmarks, we report a few promising cases in which unsupervised pre-training can outperform its supervised counterpart. Code is made available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/SlowFast
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项关于从视频中进行无监督时空表示学习的大规模研究。通过对最近四种基于图像的框架的统一视角，我们研究了一个简单的目标，可以轻松地将所有这些方法推广到时空。我们的目标鼓励在同一视频中使用时间持久的特征，尽管它很简单，但它在以下方面表现得非常好：(i) 不同的无监督框架，(ii) 预训练数据集，(iii) 下游数据集，以及 (iv) 主干架构。我们从这项研究中得出了一系列有趣的观察结果，例如，我们发现，即使时间跨度为 60 秒，鼓励长期坚持也可以是有效的。除了多个基准中最先进的结果之外，我们还报告了一些有希望的案例，其中无监督预训练可以优于有监督预训练。代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/SlowFast 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督时空表征学习的统一方法，通过鼓励视频中时间持久性特征，在多个任务和数据集上取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督学习方法在时空数据上的泛化能力有限，缺乏简单有效的统一目标来适应不同框架和任务。
AI.method: 设计一个跨框架的统一目标函数，通过强制同一视频中时间持久性特征，将图像领域方法扩展到时空领域。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到SOTA，发现60秒时长有效性，部分场景下无监督预训练优于监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 简单的时间持久性目标具有广泛适用性，无监督学习在时空表征任务中展现潜力。

authors_text: Moustafa Meshry,Saksham Suri,Larry S. Davis,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Learned Spatial Representations for Few-shot Talking-Head Synthesis
title_zh: 学习少镜头说话头合成的空间表示
abstract: We propose a novel approach for few-shot talking-head synthesis. While recent works in neural talking heads have produced promising results, they can still produce images that do not preserve the identity of the subject in source images. We posit this is a result of the entangled representation of each subject in a single latent code that models 3D shape information, identity cues, colors, lighting and even background details. In contrast, we propose to factorize the representation of a subject into its spatial and style components. Our method generates a target frame in two steps. First, it predicts a dense spatial layout for the target image. Second, an image generator utilizes the predicted layout for spatial denormalization and synthesizes the target frame. We experimentally show that this disentangled representation leads to a significant improvement over previous methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: We propose a novel approach for few-shot talking-head synthesis. While recent works in neural talking heads have produced promising results, they can still produce images that do not preserve the identity of the subject in source images. We posit this is a result of the entangled representation of each subject in a single latent code that models 3D shape information, identity cues, colors, lighting and even background details. In contrast, we propose to factorize the representation of a subject into its spatial and style components. Our method generates a target frame in two steps. First, it predicts a dense spatial layout for the target image. Second, an image generator utilizes the predicted layout for spatial denormalization and synthesizes the target frame. We experimentally show that this disentangled representation leads to a significant improvement over previous methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的少镜头说话合成方法。虽然最近关于神经说话头的研究取得了有希望的结果，但它们仍然可以生成不保留源图像中主体身份的图像。我们认为这是每个主题在单个潜在代码中纠缠表示的结果，该潜在代码对 3D 形状信息、身份线索、颜色、照明甚至背景细节进行建模。相比之下，我们建议将主题的表征分解为其空间和风格组件。我们的方法分两步生成目标帧。首先，它预测目标图像的密集空间布局。其次，图像生成器利用预测的布局进行空间反规范化并合成目标帧。我们通过实验表明，这种解开的表示在数量和质量上都比以前的方法有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种少样本 talking-head 合成方法，通过解耦空间和风格表示以更好保留主体身份
AI.motivation: 现有方法因潜在代码纠缠多种信息（如形状、身份等）导致生成图像无法保留主体身份，需解耦表示以解决此问题
AI.method: 将主体表示分解为空间布局和风格组件，分两步生成目标帧：先预测空间布局，再利用布局进行空间归一化生成图像
AI.result: 实验表明该解耦表示方法在定量和定性评估中均显著优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 解耦空间与风格表示能有效提升少样本 talking-head 合成中主体身份保留效果，验证了解耦表示的优势
