The analysis operator associated with such a frame, is a (highly) redundant Gabor transform, which we use as a sparsifying transform in denoising procedure. We conduct computational experiments on real-world speech data, using as baseline three Gabor transforms generated by state-of-the-art window vectors in time-frequency analysis and compare their performance to the proposed Gabor transform. The results show that our proposed redundant Gabor transform outperforms all others, consistently for all signals. 在本文中，我们解决了语音去噪问题，即从给定的语音信号中去除高斯、粉红和蓝色加性噪声。我们的方法基于原始语音信号的冗余、分析稀疏表示。我们选择 Zauner 酉矩阵的特征向量，并在环境维度的某些假设下，将其用作窗口向量来生成 Spark 缺陷 Gabor 框架。与此类框架相关的分析算子是（高度）冗余的 Gabor 变换，我们将其用作去噪过程中的稀疏变换。我们对真实世界的语音数据进行计算实验，使用时频分析中最先进的窗口向量生成的三个 Gabor 变换作为基线，并将其性能与所提出的 Gabor 变换进行比较。结果表明，我们提出的冗余 Gabor 变换优于所有其他变换，对于所有信号而言一致。 本文提出一种稳健的冗余Gabor变换方法，用于去除语音信号中的高斯、粉红和蓝噪声。 Vasiliki Kouni,Holger Rauhut,Theoharis Theoharis cs.SD,cs.IT,eess.AS

title: Towards a practical lip-to-speech conversion system using deep neural networks and mobile application frontend
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络和移动应用前端的实用唇语转换系统
abstract: Articulatory-to-acoustic (forward) mapping is a technique to predict speech using various articulatory acquisition techniques as input (e.g. ultrasound tongue imaging, MRI, lip video). The advantage of lip video is that it is easily available and affordable: most modern smartphones have a front camera. There are already a few solutions for lip-to-speech synthesis, but they mostly concentrate on offline training and inference. In this paper, we propose a system built from a backend for deep neural network training and inference and a fronted as a form of a mobile application. Our initial evaluation shows that the scenario is feasible: a top-5 classification accuracy of 74% is combined with feedback from the mobile application user, making sure that the speaking impaired might be able to communicate with this solution.
summary: Articulatory-to-acoustic (forward) mapping is a technique to predict speech using various articulatory acquisition techniques as input (e.g. ultrasound tongue imaging, MRI, lip video). The advantage of lip video is that it is easily available and affordable: most modern smartphones have a front camera. There are already a few solutions for lip-to-speech synthesis, but they mostly concentrate on offline training and inference. In this paper, we propose a system built from a backend for deep neural network training and inference and a fronted as a form of a mobile application. Our initial evaluation shows that the scenario is feasible: a top-5 classification accuracy of 74% is combined with feedback from the mobile application user, making sure that the speaking impaired might be able to communicate with this solution.
abstract_zh: 发音到声学（前向）映射是一种使用各种发音采集技术作为输入（例如超声舌成像、MRI、唇部视频）来预测语音的技术。唇形视频的优势在于它易于获取且价格实惠：大多数现代智能手机都配有前置摄像头。唇语合成已经有一些解决方案，但它们主要集中在离线训练和推理上。在本文中，我们提出了一个从用于深度神经网络训练和推理的后端和作为移动应用程序形式的前端构建的系统。我们的初步评估表明该场景是可行的：74% 的前 5 分类准确率与移动应用程序用户的反馈相结合，确保语言障碍者能够使用该解决方案进行交流。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度神经网络和移动应用前端的实用唇语到语音转换系统。
AI.motivation: 现有唇语合成方案多为离线训练，缺乏实际应用的便捷性。利用手机摄像头获取唇部视频具有低成本和易获取的优势，可为言语障碍者提供沟通工具。
AI.method: 构建包含深度神经网络训练推理后端与移动应用前端的系统，通过唇部视频输入实现语音合成，并集成用户反馈机制。
AI.result: 初步评估显示系统可行，达到74%的top-5分类准确率，用户反馈证实其潜在沟通价值。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了基于唇部视频的语音转换可行性，为言语障碍者提供了新型沟通方案，需进一步优化准确率和实时性。

authors_text: Linguo Li,Minsi Wang,Bingbing Ni,Hang Wang,Jiancheng Yang,Wenjun Zhang
title: 3D Human Action Representation Learning via Cross-View Consistency Pursuit
title_zh: 通过跨视图一致性追求进行 3D 人类动作表征学习
abstract: In this work, we propose a Cross-view Contrastive Learning framework for unsupervised 3D skeleton-based action Representation (CrosSCLR), by leveraging multi-view complementary supervision signal. CrosSCLR consists of both single-view contrastive learning (SkeletonCLR) and cross-view consistent knowledge mining (CVC-KM) modules, integrated in a collaborative learning manner. It is noted that CVC-KM works in such a way that high-confidence positive/negative samples and their distributions are exchanged among views according to their embedding similarity, ensuring cross-view consistency in terms of contrastive context, i.e., similar distributions. Extensive experiments show that CrosSCLR achieves remarkable action recognition results on NTU-60 and NTU-120 datasets under unsupervised settings, with observed higher-quality action representations. Our code is available at https://github.com/LinguoLi/CrosSCLR.
summary: In this work, we propose a Cross-view Contrastive Learning framework for unsupervised 3D skeleton-based action Representation (CrosSCLR), by leveraging multi-view complementary supervision signal. CrosSCLR consists of both single-view contrastive learning (SkeletonCLR) and cross-view consistent knowledge mining (CVC-KM) modules, integrated in a collaborative learning manner. It is noted that CVC-KM works in such a way that high-confidence positive/negative samples and their distributions are exchanged among views according to their embedding similarity, ensuring cross-view consistency in terms of contrastive context, i.e., similar distributions. Extensive experiments show that CrosSCLR achieves remarkable action recognition results on NTU-60 and NTU-120 datasets under unsupervised settings, with observed higher-quality action representations. Our code is available at https://github.com/LinguoLi/CrosSCLR.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过利用多视图互补监督信号，提出了一种用于无监督 3D 基于骨架的动作表示的跨视图对比学习框架（CrosSCLR）。 CrossSCLR由单视图对比学习（SkeletonCLR）和跨视图一致性知识挖掘（CVC-KM）模块组成，以协作学习的方式集成。值得注意的是，CVC-KM 的工作方式是根据嵌入相似性在视图之间交换高置信度正/负样本及其分布，从而确保对比上下文（即相似分布）方面的跨视图一致性。大量实验表明，CrosSCLR 在无监督设置下的 NTU-60 和 NTU-120 数据集上取得了显着的动作识别结果，并观察到了更高质量的动作表示。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/LinguoLi/CrosSCLR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角一致性的无监督3D骨骼动作表示学习框架CrosSCLR，通过单视角对比学习和跨视角知识挖掘模块提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无监督3D动作表示学习中难以有效利用多视角互补信息，导致表示质量不足。
AI.method: 设计包含单视角对比学习模块SkeletonCLR和跨视角一致性知识挖掘模块CVC-KM的联合学习框架，通过视角间高置信度样本分布交换实现对比上下文一致性。
AI.result: 在NTU-60和NTU-120数据集上达到SOTA的无监督动作识别准确率，生成更高质量的动作表示。
AI.conclusion: 跨视角一致性约束能有效提升无监督3D动作表示学习效果，为后续动作理解任务提供可靠特征表示。

authors_text: Mark T Keane,Eoin M Kenny,Mohammed Temraz,Derek Greene,Barry Smyth
title: Twin Systems for DeepCBR: A Menagerie of Deep Learning and Case-Based Reasoning Pairings for Explanation and Data Augmentation
title_zh: DeepCBR 的双系统：用于解释和数据增强的深度学习和基于案例的推理配对的动物园
abstract: Recently, it has been proposed that fruitful synergies may exist between Deep Learning (DL) and Case Based Reasoning (CBR); that there are insights to be gained by applying CBR ideas to problems in DL (what could be called DeepCBR). In this paper, we report on a program of research that applies CBR solutions to the problem of Explainable AI (XAI) in the DL. We describe a series of twin-systems pairings of opaque DL models with transparent CBR models that allow the latter to explain the former using factual, counterfactual and semi-factual explanation strategies. This twinning shows that functional abstractions of DL (e.g., feature weights, feature importance and decision boundaries) can be used to drive these explanatory solutions. We also raise the prospect that this research also applies to the problem of Data Augmentation in DL, underscoring the fecundity of these DeepCBR ideas.
summary: Recently, it has been proposed that fruitful synergies may exist between Deep Learning (DL) and Case Based Reasoning (CBR); that there are insights to be gained by applying CBR ideas to problems in DL (what could be called DeepCBR). In this paper, we report on a program of research that applies CBR solutions to the problem of Explainable AI (XAI) in the DL. We describe a series of twin-systems pairings of opaque DL models with transparent CBR models that allow the latter to explain the former using factual, counterfactual and semi-factual explanation strategies. This twinning shows that functional abstractions of DL (e.g., feature weights, feature importance and decision boundaries) can be used to drive these explanatory solutions. We also raise the prospect that this research also applies to the problem of Data Augmentation in DL, underscoring the fecundity of these DeepCBR ideas.
abstract_zh: 最近，有人提出深度学习（DL）和基于案例的推理（CBR）之间可能存在富有成效的协同作用；通过将 CBR 思想应用于 DL 问题（可以称为 DeepCBR）可以获得一些见解。在本文中，我们报告了一项研究计划，该计划将 CBR 解决方案应用于深度学习中的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 问题。我们描述了一系列不透明深度学习模型与透明 CBR 模型的双系统配对，允许后者使用事实、反事实和半事实解释策略来解释前者。这种孪生表明深度学习的功能抽象（例如特征权重、特征重要性和决策边界）可用于驱动这些解释性解决方案。我们还提出了这项研究也适用于深度学习中的数据增强问题的前景，强调了这些 DeepCBR 想法的丰富性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与案例推理（CBR）的双系统框架，旨在增强深度学习模型的可解释性并探索其在数据增强中的应用。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型通常被视为黑箱，缺乏可解释性，而案例推理（CBR）具有透明性，可提供解释。本文旨在通过结合两者，提升模型的可解释性，并探索其在数据增强中的潜力。
AI.method: 通过构建DL与CBR的双系统配对，利用CBR模型解释DL模型的决策过程，采用事实、反事实及半事实解释策略，并基于DL的特征权重、决策边界等抽象功能进行解释。
AI.result: 实验表明，该双系统框架能够有效解释深度学习模型的决策，同时为数据增强提供了新思路，验证了DeepCBR方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: DeepCBR方法通过结合DL与CBR，有效提升了模型的可解释性，并为数据增强提供了新途径，未来可进一步探索其在其他领域的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与案例推理（CBR）的双系统框架，旨在增强深度学习模型的可解释性并探索其在数据增强中的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 深度学习模型通常被视为黑箱，缺乏可解释性，而案例推理（CBR）具有透明性，可提供解释。本文旨在通过结合两者，提升模型的可解释性，并探索其在数据增强中的潜力。
ai_content.method: 通过构建DL与CBR的双系统配对，利用CBR模型解释DL模型的决策过程，采用事实、反事实及半事实解释策略，并基于DL的特征权重、决策边界等抽象功能进行解释。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该双系统框架能够有效解释深度学习模型的决策，同时为数据增强提供了新思路，验证了DeepCBR方法的可行性。
ai_content.conclusion: DeepCBR方法通过结合DL与CBR，有效提升了模型的可解释性，并为数据增强提供了新途径，未来可进一步探索其在其他领域的应用。

search_text: Twin Systems for DeepCBR: A Menagerie of Deep Learning and Case-Based Reasoning Pairings for Explanation and Data Augmentation DeepCBR 的双系统：用于解释和数据增强的深度学习和基于案例的推理配对的动物园 Recently, it has been proposed that fruitful synergies may exist between Deep Learning (DL) and Case Based Reasoning (CBR); that there are insights to be gained by applying CBR ideas to problems in DL (what could be called DeepCBR). In this paper, we report on a program of research that applies CBR solutions to the problem of Explainable AI (XAI) in the DL. We describe a series of twin-systems pairings of opaque DL models with transparent CBR models that allow the latter to explain the former using factual, counterfactual and semi-factual explanation strategies. This twinning shows that functional abstractions of DL (e.g., feature weights, feature importance and decision boundaries) can be used to drive these explanatory solutions. We also raise the prospect that this research also applies to the problem of Data Augmentation in DL, underscoring the fecundity of these DeepCBR ideas. 最近，有人提出深度学习（DL）和基于案例的推理（CBR）之间可能存在富有成效的协同作用；通过将 CBR 思想应用于 DL 问题（可以称为 DeepCBR）可以获得一些见解。在本文中，我们报告了一项研究计划，该计划将 CBR 解决方案应用于深度学习中的可解释人工智能 (XAI) 问题。我们描述了一系列不透明深度学习模型与透明 CBR 模型的双系统配对，允许后者使用事实、反事实和半事实解释策略来解释前者。这种孪生表明深度学习的功能抽象（例如特征权重、特征重要性和决策边界）可用于驱动这些解释性解决方案。我们还提出了这项研究也适用于深度学习中的数据增强问题的前景，强调了这些 DeepCBR 想法的丰富性。 本文提出了一种结合深度学习与案例推理（CBR）的双系统框架，旨在增强深度学习模型的可解释性并探索其在数据增强中的应用。 Mark T Keane,Eoin M Kenny,Mohammed Temraz,Derek Greene,Barry Smyth cs.AI

title: Deterministic Algorithms for the Hidden Subgroup Problem
title_zh: 隐藏子群问题的确定性算法
comment: v3: 14 pages. Added some details. Minor edits for clarity. Close to published version. v2: 14 pages. Added references to past and recent related work, added new algorithms partially resolving an open question from the previous version. v1: 7 pages
comments: v3: 14 pages. Added some details. Minor edits for clarity. Close to published version. v2: 14 pages. Added references to past and recent related work, added new algorithms partially resolving an open question from the previous version. v1: 7 pages
abstract: We present deterministic algorithms for the Hidden Subgroup Problem. The first algorithm, for abelian groups, achieves the same asymptotic worst-case query complexity as the optimal randomized algorithm, namely O($\sqrt{ n}\,$), where $n$ is the order of the group. The analogous algorithm for non-abelian groups comes within a $\sqrt{ \log n}$ factor of the optimal randomized query complexity. The best known randomized algorithm for the Hidden Subgroup Problem has expected query complexity that is sensitive to the input, namely O($\sqrt{ n/m}\,$), where $m$ is the order of the hidden subgroup. In the first version of this article (arXiv:2104.14436v1 [cs.DS]), we asked if there is a deterministic algorithm whose query complexity has a similar dependence on the order of the hidden subgroup. Prompted by this question, Ye and Li (arXiv:2110.00827v1 [cs.DS]) present deterministic algorithms for abelian groups which solve the problem with O($\sqrt{ n/m }\,$ ) queries, and find the hidden subgroup with O($\sqrt{ n (\log m) / m} + \log m$) queries. Moreover, they exhibit instances which show that in general, the deterministic query complexity of the problem may be o($\sqrt{ n/m } \,$), and that of finding the entire subgroup may also be o($\sqrt{ n/m } \,$) or even $ω(\sqrt{ n/m } \,)$. We present a different deterministic algorithm for the Hidden Subgroup Problem that also has query complexity O($\sqrt{ n/m }\,$) for abelian groups. The algorithm is arguably simpler. Moreover, it works for non-abelian groups, and has query complexity O($\sqrt{ (n/m) \log (n/m) }\,$) for a large class of instances, such as those over supersolvable groups. We build on this to design deterministic algorithms to find the hidden subgroup for all abelian and some non-abelian instances, at the cost of a $\log m$ multiplicative factor increase in the query complexity.

abstract_zh: 我们提出了隐藏子群问题的确定性算法。第一个算法，对于阿贝尔群，实现了与最优随机算法相同的渐近最坏情况查询复杂度，即 O($\sqrt{ n}\,$)，其中 $n$ 是群的阶数。非交换群的类似算法位于最佳随机查询复杂度的 $\sqrt{ \log n}$ 因子内。隐藏子组问题最著名的随机算法具有对输入敏感的预期查询复杂性，即 O($\sqrt{ n/m}\,$)，其中 $m$ 是隐藏子组的阶数。在本文的第一个版本（arXiv:2104.14436v1 [cs.DS]）中，我们询问是否存在一种确定性算法，其查询复杂度对隐藏子组的顺序具有类似的依赖性。在这个问题的提示下，Ye 和 Li (arXiv:2110.00827v1 [cs.DS]) 提出了阿贝尔群的确定性算法，该算法通过 O($\sqrt{ n/m }\,$ ) 查询解决问题，并通过 O($\sqrt{ n (\log m) / m} + \log m$) 查询找到隐藏子群。此外，它们展示的实例表明，一般来说，问题的确定性查询复杂度可能是 o($\sqrt{ n/m } \,$)，而查找整个子组的复杂度也可能是 o($\sqrt{ n/m } \,$) 甚至 $ω(\sqrt{ n/m } \,)$。我们为隐藏子群问题提出了一种不同的确定性算法，该算法对于交换群的查询复杂度也为 O($\sqrt{ n/m }\,$)。该算法可以说更简单。此外，它适用于非交换群，并且对于一大类实例（例如超可解群的实例），查询复杂度为 O($\sqrt{ (n/m) \log (n/m) }\,$)。我们在此基础上设计确定性算法，以查找所有阿贝尔实例和一些非阿贝尔实例的隐藏子组，代价是查询复杂性增加 $\log m$ 乘法因子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了解决隐藏子群问题的确定性算法，针对阿贝尔群和非阿贝尔群分别实现了不同的查询复杂度。
AI.motivation: 已知随机化算法的查询复杂度依赖于隐藏子群的阶m，作者希望设计确定性算法以达到类似复杂度，并解决现有算法在非阿贝尔群上的局限性。
AI.method: 基于Ye和Li的算法改进，提出更简洁的确定性算法，针对阿贝尔群和非阿贝尔群（如超可解群）设计不同复杂度的查询策略。
AI.result: 阿贝尔群算法复杂度为O(√(n/m))，非阿贝尔群为O(√((n/m) log(n/m)))；找到完整子群的复杂度增加log m因子，且存在实例证明确定性复杂度可能低于随机化算法。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在简单性和适用性上优于现有方法，为确定性解决HSP提供了理论支持，尤其在超可解群等非阿贝尔场景中具有潜力。

The first algorithm, for abelian groups, achieves the same asymptotic worst-case query complexity as the optimal randomized algorithm, namely O($\sqrt{ n}\,$), where $n$ is the order of the group. The analogous algorithm for non-abelian groups comes within a $\sqrt{ \log n}$ factor of the optimal randomized query complexity. The best known randomized algorithm for the Hidden Subgroup Problem has expected query complexity that is sensitive to the input, namely O($\sqrt{ n/m}\,$), where $m$ is the order of the hidden subgroup. Moreover, it works for non-abelian groups, and has query complexity O($\sqrt{ (n/m) \log (n/m) }\,$) for a large class of instances, such as those over supersolvable groups. title: Customizable Reference Runtime Monitoring of Neural Networks using Resolution Boxes
title_zh: 使用解析框对神经网络进行可定制的参考运行时监控
abstract: Classification neural networks fail to detect inputs that do not fall inside the classes they have been trained for. Runtime monitoring techniques on the neuron activation pattern can be used to detect such inputs. We present an approach for monitoring classification systems via data abstraction. Data abstraction relies on the notion of box with a resolution. Box-based abstraction consists in representing a set of values by its minimal and maximal values in each dimension. We augment boxes with a notion of resolution and define their clustering coverage, which is intuitively a quantitative metric that indicates the abstraction quality. This allows studying the effect of different clustering parameters on the constructed boxes and estimating an interval of sub-optimal parameters. Moreover, we automatically construct monitors that leverage both the correct and incorrect behaviors of a system. This allows checking the size of the monitor abstractions and analyzing the separability of the network. Monitors are obtained by combining the sub-monitors of each class of the system placed at some selected layers. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our clustering coverage estimation and show how to assess the effectiveness and precision of monitors according to the selected clustering parameter and monitored layers.
summary: Classification neural networks fail to detect inputs that do not fall inside the classes they have been trained for. Runtime monitoring techniques on the neuron activation pattern can be used to detect such inputs. We present an approach for monitoring classification systems via data abstraction. Data abstraction relies on the notion of box with a resolution. Box-based abstraction consists in representing a set of values by its minimal and maximal values in each dimension. We augment boxes with a notion of resolution and define their clustering coverage, which is intuitively a quantitative metric that indicates the abstraction quality. This allows studying the effect of different clustering parameters on the constructed boxes and estimating an interval of sub-optimal parameters. Moreover, we automatically construct monitors that leverage both the correct and incorrect behaviors of a system. This allows checking the size of the monitor abstractions and analyzing the separability of the network. Monitors are obtained by combining the sub-monitors of each class of the system placed at some selected layers. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our clustering coverage estimation and show how to assess the effectiveness and precision of monitors according to the selected clustering parameter and monitored layers.
abstract_zh: 分类神经网络无法检测到不属于其训练类别的输入。神经元激活模式的运行时监控技术可用于检测此类输入。我们提出了一种通过数据抽象来监控分类系统的方法。数据抽象依赖于具有分辨率的盒子的概念。基于框的抽象在于通过每个维度中的最小值和最大值来表示一组值。我们用分辨率的概念来增强框，并定义它们的聚类覆盖范围，这直观地是一个指示抽象质量的定量指标。这允许研究不同聚类参数对构建的框的影响并估计次优参数的间隔。此外，我们自动构建利用系统正确和错误行为的监视器。这允许检查监视器抽象的大小并分析网络的可分离性。监视器是通过组合放置在某些选定层的系统每一类的子监视器而获得的。我们的实验证明了聚类覆盖率估计的有效性，并展示了如何根据所选的聚类参数和监控层来评估监控器的有效性和精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分辨率框的神经网络运行时监控方法，通过数据抽象和聚类覆盖率指标检测分类系统的异常输入。
AI.motivation: 分类神经网络无法识别训练类别外的输入，需通过运行时监控保障系统安全性，尤其在关键应用场景中。
AI.method: 引入带分辨率的区间框表示数据抽象，定义聚类覆盖率量化抽象质量，结合正确与错误行为构建监控器，并在选定网络层组合子监控器。
AI.result: 实验验证了聚类覆盖率估计的有效性，展示了监控器效果与精度随聚类参数和监控层选择的变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效评估监控器性能，为设计高精度神经网络运行时监控系统提供理论支持与实践指导。

search_text: Customizable Reference Runtime Monitoring of Neural Networks using Resolution Boxes 使用解析框对神经网络进行可定制的参考运行时监控 Classification neural networks fail to detect inputs that do not fall inside the classes they have been trained for. Runtime monitoring techniques on the neuron activation pattern can be used to detect such inputs. We present an approach for monitoring classification systems via data abstraction. Data abstraction relies on the notion of box with a resolution. Box-based abstraction consists in representing a set of values by its minimal and maximal values in each dimension. We augment boxes with a notion of resolution and define their clustering coverage, which is intuitively a quantitative metric that indicates the abstraction quality. This allows studying the effect of different clustering parameters on the constructed boxes and estimating an interval of sub-optimal parameters. Moreover, we automatically construct monitors that leverage both the correct and incorrect behaviors of a system. This allows checking the size of the monitor abstractions and analyzing the separability of the network. Monitors are obtained by combining the sub-monitors of each class of the system placed at some selected layers. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our clustering coverage estimation and show how to assess the effectiveness and precision of monitors according to the selected clustering parameter and monitored layers. 分类神经网络无法检测到不属于其训练类别的输入。神经元激活模式的运行时监控技术可用于检测此类输入。我们提出了一种通过数据抽象来监控分类系统的方法。数据抽象依赖于具有分辨率的盒子的概念。基于框的抽象在于通过每个维度中的最小值和最大值来表示一组值。我们用分辨率的概念来增强框，并定义它们的聚类覆盖范围，这直观地是一个指示抽象质量的定量指标。这允许研究不同聚类参数对构建的框的影响并估计次优参数的间隔。此外，我们自动构建利用系统正确和错误行为的监视器。这允许检查监视器抽象的大小并分析网络的可分离性。监视器是通过组合放置在某些选定层的系统每一类的子监视器而获得的。我们的实验证明了聚类覆盖率估计的有效性，并展示了如何根据所选的聚类参数和监控层来评估监控器的有效性和精度。 本文提出一种基于分辨率框的神经网络运行时监控方法，通过数据抽象和聚类覆盖率指标检测分类系统的异常输入。 Changshun Wu,Yliès Falcone,Saddek Bensalem cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Machine-Learning Assisted Optimization Strategies for Phase Change Materials Embedded within Electronic Packages
title_zh: 电子封装内嵌入相变材料的机器学习辅助优化策略
abstract: Leveraging the latent heat of phase change materials (PCMs) can reduce the peak temperatures and transient variations in temperature in electronic devices. But as the power levels increase, the thermal conduction pathway from the heat source to the heat sink limits the effectiveness of these systems. In this work, we evaluate embedding the PCM within the silicon device layer of an electronic device to minimize the thermal resistance between the source and the PCM to minimize this thermal resistance and enhance the thermal performance of the device. The geometry and material properties of the embedded PCM regions are optimized using a combination of parametric and machine learning algorithms. For a fixed geometry, considering commercially available materials, Solder 174 significantly outperforms other organic and metallic PCMs. Also with a fixed geometry, the optimal melting points to minimize the peak temperature is higher than the optimal melting point to minimize the amplitude of the transient temperature oscillation, and both optima increase with increasing heater power. Extending beyond conventional optimization strategies, genetic algorithms and particle swarm optimization with and without neural network surrogate models are used to enable optimization of many geometric and material properties. For the test case evaluated, the optimized geometries and properties are similar between all ML-assisted algorithms, but the computational time depends on the technique. Ultimately, the optimized design with embedded phase change materials reduces the maximum temperature rise by 19% and the fluctuations by up to 88% compared to devices without PCM.
summary: Leveraging the latent heat of phase change materials (PCMs) can reduce the peak temperatures and transient variations in temperature in electronic devices. But as the power levels increase, the thermal conduction pathway from the heat source to the heat sink limits the effectiveness of these systems. In this work, we evaluate embedding the PCM within the silicon device layer of an electronic device to minimize the thermal resistance between the source and the PCM to minimize this thermal resistance and enhance the thermal performance of the device. The geometry and material properties of the embedded PCM regions are optimized using a combination of parametric and machine learning algorithms. For a fixed geometry, considering commercially available materials, Solder 174 significantly outperforms other organic and metallic PCMs. Also with a fixed geometry, the optimal melting points to minimize the peak temperature is higher than the optimal melting point to minimize the amplitude of the transient temperature oscillation, and both optima increase with increasing heater power. Extending beyond conventional optimization strategies, genetic algorithms and particle swarm optimization with and without neural network surrogate models are used to enable optimization of many geometric and material properties. For the test case evaluated, the optimized geometries and properties are similar between all ML-assisted algorithms, but the computational time depends on the technique. Ultimately, the optimized design with embedded phase change materials reduces the maximum temperature rise by 19% and the fluctuations by up to 88% compared to devices without PCM.
abstract_zh: 利用相变材料 (PCM) 的潜热可以降低电子设备中的峰值温度和瞬态温度变化。但随着功率水平的增加，从热源到散热器的热传导路径限制了这些系统的有效性。在这项工作中，我们评估了将 PCM 嵌入电子设备的硅器件层中，以最大限度地减少源和 PCM 之间的热阻，从而最大限度地减少这种热阻并增强设备的热性能。嵌入式 PCM 区域的几何形状和材料属性通过参数化和机器学习算法的组合进行优化。对于固定几何形状，考虑到市售材料，Solder 174 的性能明显优于其他有机和金属 PCM。同样，对于固定的几何形状，最小化峰值温度的最佳熔点高于最小化瞬态温度振荡幅度的最佳熔点，并且两个最佳值都随着加热器功率的增加而增加。超越传统的优化策略，使用遗传算法和带有或不带有神经网络代理模型的粒子群优化来实现许多几何和材料属性的优化。对于评估的测试用例，所有机器学习辅助算法的优化几何结构和属性都相似，但计算时间取决于技术。最终，与没有 PCM 的设备相比，嵌入相变材料的优化设计将最大温升降低了 19%，波动降低了高达 88%。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合参数化和机器学习算法优化嵌入式相变材料（PCM）的几何结构和材料属性，以提升电子设备的热管理性能。
AI.motivation: 随着电子设备功率提升，传统热传导路径限制了相变材料（PCM）的降温效果，需通过优化PCM嵌入设计降低热阻并减少温度波动。
AI.method: 采用参数化分析与机器学习方法（包括遗传算法、粒子群优化及神经网络代理模型），对PCM的几何结构和材料属性进行多目标优化。
AI.result: 优化后的嵌入式PCM设计使最大温升降低19%，温度波动减少88%；Solder 174材料在固定几何结构下表现最优，且不同优化算法结果相近但计算效率存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习辅助的PCM嵌入式优化显著提升了电子设备的热性能，未来可进一步探索材料与结构的协同优化策略。

authors_text: Xin Guo,Zhongming Jin,Chong Chen,Helei Nie,Jianqiang Huang,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He,Xiansheng Hua
title: Discriminative-Generative Dual Memory Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 判别生成双内存视频异常检测
abstract: Recently, people tried to use a few anomalies for video anomaly detection (VAD) instead of only normal data during the training process. A side effect of data imbalance occurs when a few abnormal data face a vast number of normal data. The latest VAD works use triplet loss or data re-sampling strategy to lessen this problem. However, there is still no elaborately designed structure for discriminative VAD with a few anomalies. In this paper, we propose a DiscRiminative-gEnerative duAl Memory (DREAM) anomaly detection model to take advantage of a few anomalies and solve data imbalance. We use two shallow discriminators to tighten the normal feature distribution boundary along with a generator for the next frame prediction. Further, we propose a dual memory module to obtain a sparse feature representation in both normality and abnormality space. As a result, DREAM not only solves the data imbalance problem but also learn a reasonable feature space. Further theoretical analysis shows that our DREAM also works for the unknown anomalies. Comparing with the previous methods on UCSD Ped1, UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, and ShanghaiTech, our model outperforms all the baselines with no extra parameters. The ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of our dual memory module and discriminative-generative network.
summary: Recently, people tried to use a few anomalies for video anomaly detection (VAD) instead of only normal data during the training process. A side effect of data imbalance occurs when a few abnormal data face a vast number of normal data. The latest VAD works use triplet loss or data re-sampling strategy to lessen this problem. However, there is still no elaborately designed structure for discriminative VAD with a few anomalies. In this paper, we propose a DiscRiminative-gEnerative duAl Memory (DREAM) anomaly detection model to take advantage of a few anomalies and solve data imbalance. We use two shallow discriminators to tighten the normal feature distribution boundary along with a generator for the next frame prediction. Further, we propose a dual memory module to obtain a sparse feature representation in both normality and abnormality space. As a result, DREAM not only solves the data imbalance problem but also learn a reasonable feature space. Further theoretical analysis shows that our DREAM also works for the unknown anomalies. Comparing with the previous methods on UCSD Ped1, UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, and ShanghaiTech, our model outperforms all the baselines with no extra parameters. The ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of our dual memory module and discriminative-generative network.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们尝试在训练过程中使用一些异常数据来进行视频异常检测（VAD），而不是仅使用正常数据。当少数异常数据面对大量正常数据时，就会出现数据不平衡的副作用。最新的 VAD 工作使用三元组损失或数据重采样策略来减轻这个问题。然而，目前还没有精心设计的判别性 VAD 结构，但存在一些异常情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种 DiscRiminative-gEnerative duAl Memory (DREAM) 异常检测模型，以利用一些异常并解决数据不平衡问题。我们使用两个浅鉴别器来收紧正态特征分布边界以及用于下一帧预测的生成器。此外，我们提出了一种双存储模块来获得正常和异常空间中的稀疏特征表示。结果，DREAM不仅解决了数据不平衡问题，还学习到了合理的特征空间。进一步的理论分析表明，我们的DREAM也适用于未知异常。与之前在 UCSD Ped1、UCSD Ped2、CUHK Avenue 和 ShanghaiTech 上的方法相比，我们的模型在没有额外参数的情况下优于所有基线。消融研究证明了我们的双记忆模块和判别生成网络的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DREAM的视频异常检测模型，通过利用少量异常数据解决数据不平衡问题，并学习合理的特征空间。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用少量异常数据进行视频异常检测时，因数据不平衡问题导致效果受限，且缺乏专门设计的结构来提升判别能力。
AI.method: 设计双记忆模块与判别-生成网络，使用两个浅层判别器收紧正常特征边界，生成器预测下一帧，双记忆模块在正常与异常空间中提取稀疏特征。
AI.result: 在UCSD Ped1/2、CUHK Avenue和ShanghaiTech数据集上优于所有基线方法，且无额外参数；理论分析表明模型适用于未知异常。
AI.conclusion: DREAM通过双记忆模块和判别-生成结构有效缓解数据不平衡问题，学习到合理特征空间，对已知和未知异常均具有良好检测能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DREAM的视频异常检测模型，通过利用少量异常数据解决数据不平衡问题，并学习合理的特征空间。

ai_content.method: 设计双记忆模块与判别-生成网络，使用两个浅层判别器收紧正常特征边界，生成器预测下一帧，双记忆模块在正常与异常空间中提取稀疏特征。
ai_content.result: 在UCSD Ped1/2、CUHK Avenue和ShanghaiTech数据集上优于所有基线方法，且无额外参数；理论分析表明模型适用于未知异常。
ai_content.conclusion: DREAM通过双记忆模块和判别-生成结构有效缓解数据不平衡问题，学习到合理特征空间，对已知和未知异常均具有良好检测能力。

search_text: Discriminative-Generative Dual Memory Video Anomaly Detection 判别生成双内存视频异常检测 Recently, people tried to use a few anomalies for video anomaly detection (VAD) instead of only normal data during the training process. A side effect of data imbalance occurs when a few abnormal data face a vast number of normal data. The latest VAD works use triplet loss or data re-sampling strategy to lessen this problem. However, there is still no elaborately designed structure for discriminative VAD with a few anomalies. In this paper, we propose a DiscRiminative-gEnerative duAl Memory (DREAM) anomaly detection model to take advantage of a few anomalies and solve data imbalance. We use two shallow discriminators to tighten the normal feature distribution boundary along with a generator for the next frame prediction. Further, we propose a dual memory module to obtain a sparse feature representation in both normality and abnormality space. As a result, DREAM not only solves the data imbalance problem but also learn a reasonable feature space. Further theoretical analysis shows that our DREAM also works for the unknown anomalies. Comparing with the previous methods on UCSD Ped1, UCSD Ped2, CUHK Avenue, and ShanghaiTech, our model outperforms all the baselines with no extra parameters. The ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of our dual memory module and discriminative-generative network. 最近，人们尝试在训练过程中使用一些异常数据来进行视频异常检测（VAD），而不是仅使用正常数据。当少数异常数据面对大量正常数据时，就会出现数据不平衡的副作用。最新的 VAD 工作使用三元组损失或数据重采样策略来减轻这个问题。然而，目前还没有精心设计的判别性 VAD 结构，但存在一些异常情况。在本文中，我们提出了一种 DiscRiminative-gEnerative duAl Memory (DREAM) 异常检测模型，以利用一些异常并解决数据不平衡问题。我们使用两个浅鉴别器来收紧正态特征分布边界以及用于下一帧预测的生成器。此外，我们提出了一种双存储模块来获得正常和异常空间中的稀疏特征表示。结果，DREAM不仅解决了数据不平衡问题，还学习到了合理的特征空间。进一步的理论分析表明，我们的DREAM也适用于未知异常。与之前在 UCSD Ped1、UCSD Ped2、CUHK Avenue 和 ShanghaiTech 上的方法相比，我们的模型在没有额外参数的情况下优于所有基线。消融研究证明了我们的双记忆模块和判别生成网络的有效性。 本文提出一种名为DREAM的视频异常检测模型，通过利用少量异常数据解决数据不平衡问题，并学习合理的特征空间。 Xin Guo,Zhongming Jin,Chong Chen,Helei Nie,Jianqiang Huang,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He,Xiansheng Hua cs.CV

title: Predicate Invention by Learning From Failures
title_zh: 通过从失败中学习来发明谓词
abstract: Discovering novel high-level concepts is one of the most important steps needed for human-level AI. In inductive logic programming (ILP), discovering novel high-level concepts is known as predicate invention (PI). Although seen as crucial since the founding of ILP, PI is notoriously difficult and most ILP systems do not support it. In this paper, we introduce POPPI, an ILP system that formulates the PI problem as an answer set programming problem. Our experiments show that (i) PI can drastically improve learning performance when useful, (ii) PI is not too costly when unnecessary, and (iii) POPPI can substantially outperform existing ILP systems.
summary: Discovering novel high-level concepts is one of the most important steps needed for human-level AI. In inductive logic programming (ILP), discovering novel high-level concepts is known as predicate invention (PI). Although seen as crucial since the founding of ILP, PI is notoriously difficult and most ILP systems do not support it. In this paper, we introduce POPPI, an ILP system that formulates the PI problem as an answer set programming problem. Our experiments show that (i) PI can drastically improve learning performance when useful, (ii) PI is not too costly when unnecessary, and (iii) POPPI can substantially outperform existing ILP systems.
abstract_zh: 发现新颖的高级概念是人类水平人工智能所需的最重要的步骤之一。在归纳逻辑编程 (ILP) 中，发现新颖的高级概念被称为谓词发明 (PI)。尽管自 ILP 成立以来 PI 就被视为至关重要，但 PI 非常困难，而且大多数 ILP 系统都不支持它。在本文中，我们介绍了 POPPI，这是一种 ILP 系统，它将 PI 问题表述为答案集编程问题。我们的实验表明，(i) PI 在有用时可以极大地提高学习性能，(ii) PI 在不必要时成本也不会太高，(iii) POPPI 可以大大优于现有的 ILP 系统。

AI.tldr: 提出POPPI系统，通过将谓词发明问题转化为答案集编程问题，以提升归纳逻辑编程的学习性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ILP系统难以有效实现谓词发明（PI），而PI对于发现新高层概念和提升AI性能至关重要，亟需有效方法。
AI.method: 设计POPPI系统，将谓词发明问题建模为答案集编程问题，从而有效学习新谓词。
AI.result: 实验表明，谓词发明能显著提升学习效果且成本可控，POPPI在性能上明显优于现有ILP系统。
AI.conclusion: POPPI系统有效解决了谓词发明难题，为实现人类水平的AI提供了新的归纳逻辑编程方法。

authors_text: Panyanat Aonpong,Yutaro Iwamoto,Xian-Hua Han,Lanfen Lin,Yen-Wei Chen
title: Genotype-Guided Radiomics Signatures for Recurrence Prediction of Non-Small-Cell Lung Cancer
title_zh: 用于非小细胞肺癌复发预测的基因型引导放射组学特征
abstract: Non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) is a serious disease and has a high recurrence rate after the surgery. Recently, many machine learning methods have been proposed for recurrence prediction. The methods using gene data have high prediction accuracy but require high cost. Although the radiomics signatures using only CT image are not expensive, its accuracy is relatively low. In this paper, we propose a genotype-guided radiomics method (GGR) for obtaining high prediction accuracy with low cost. We used a public radiogenomics dataset of NSCLC, which includes CT images and gene data. The proposed method is a two-step method, which consists of two models. The first model is a gene estimation model, which is used to estimate the gene expression from radiomics features and deep features extracted from computer tomography (CT) image. The second model is used to predict the recurrence using the estimated gene expression data. The proposed GGR method designed based on hybrid features which is combination of handcrafted-based and deep learning-based. The experiments demonstrated that the prediction accuracy can be improved significantly from 78.61% (existing radiomics method) and 79.14% (deep learning method) to 83.28% by the proposed GGR.
summary: Non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) is a serious disease and has a high recurrence rate after the surgery. Recently, many machine learning methods have been proposed for recurrence prediction. The methods using gene data have high prediction accuracy but require high cost. Although the radiomics signatures using only CT image are not expensive, its accuracy is relatively low. In this paper, we propose a genotype-guided radiomics method (GGR) for obtaining high prediction accuracy with low cost. We used a public radiogenomics dataset of NSCLC, which includes CT images and gene data. The proposed method is a two-step method, which consists of two models. The first model is a gene estimation model, which is used to estimate the gene expression from radiomics features and deep features extracted from computer tomography (CT) image. The second model is used to predict the recurrence using the estimated gene expression data. The proposed GGR method designed based on hybrid features which is combination of handcrafted-based and deep learning-based. The experiments demonstrated that the prediction accuracy can be improved significantly from 78.61% (existing radiomics method) and 79.14% (deep learning method) to 83.28% by the proposed GGR.
abstract_zh: 非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）是一种严重的疾病，术后复发率很高。最近，人们提出了许多机器学习方法来进行复发预测。利用基因数据的方法预测精度较高，但成本较高。虽然仅使用CT图像的放射组学特征并不昂贵，但其准确性相对较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种基因型引导放射组学方法（GGR），以低成本获得高预测精度。我们使用了 NSCLC 的公共放射基因组学数据集，其中包括 CT 图像和基因数据。所提出的方法是两步法，由两个模型组成。第一个模型是基因估计模型，用于根据从计算机断层扫描（CT）图像中提取的放射组学特征和深层特征来估计基因表达。第二个模型用于使用估计的基因表达数据来预测复发。所提出的 GGR 方法基于混合特征设计，结合了基于手工制作和基于深度学习的特征。实验表明，所提出的GGR可以将预测精度从78.61％（现有放射组学方法）和79.14％（深度学习方法）显着提高到83.28％。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合基因数据和影像特征的基因型引导放射组学方法（GGR），用于提高非小细胞肺癌术后复发预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有复发预测方法或依赖高成本的基因数据，或仅使用CT影像导致准确性不足，需开发低成本且高精度的预测模型。
AI.method: 采用两阶段模型：首先通过放射组学特征与深度学习特征估计基因表达，再利用估计的基因数据预测复发，融合手工特征与深度学习特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，GGR方法将预测准确率从传统放射组学方法的78.61%和深度学习方法的79.14%提升至83.28%。
AI.conclusion: GGR方法通过整合基因信息与影像特征，在降低检测成本的同时显著提升了复发预测性能。

authors_text: Haoguang Yang,Mythra V. Balakuntala,Abigayle E. Moser,Jhon J. Quiñones,Ali Doosttalab,Antonio Esquivel-Puentes,Tanya Purwar,Luciano Castillo,Nina Mahmoudian,Richard M. Voyles
title: Enhancing Safety of Students with Mobile Air Filtration during School Reopening from COVID-19
title_zh: 在 COVID-19 学校重新开学期间，通过移动空气过滤增强学生的安全
comment: Manuscript accepted by 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Manuscript accepted by 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: The paper discusses how robots enable occupant-safe continuous protection for students when schools reopen. Conventionally, fixed air filters are not used as a key pandemic prevention method for public indoor spaces because they are unable to trap the airborne pathogens in time in the entire room. However, by combining the mobility of a robot with air filtration, the efficacy of cleaning up the air around multiple people is largely increased. A disinfection co-robot prototype is thus developed to provide continuous and occupant-friendly protection to people gathering indoors, specifically for students in a classroom scenario. In a static classroom with students sitting in a grid pattern, the mobile robot is able to serve up to 14 students per cycle while reducing the worst-case pathogen dosage by 20%, and with higher robustness compared to a static filter. The extent of robot protection is optimized by tuning the passing distance and speed, such that a robot is able to serve more people given a threshold of worst-case dosage a person can receive.

However, by combining the mobility of a robot with air filtration, the efficacy of cleaning up the air around multiple people is largely increased. abstract_zh: 该论文讨论了学校重新开放时机器人如何为学生提供持续的人身安全保护。传统上，固定式空气过滤器不作为公共室内空间的重要防疫手段，因为它们无法及时将空气中的病原体截留在整个房间内。然而，通过将机器人的移动性与空气过滤相结合，可以大大提高净化多人周围空气的效率。因此开发了消毒协作机器人原型，为聚集在室内的人们（特别是教室里的学生）提供持续且对乘员友好的保护。在学生以网格形式坐着的静态教室中，移动机器人每个周期最多可为 14 名学生提供服务，同时将最坏情况下的病原体剂量减少 20%，并且与静态过滤器相比具有更高的鲁棒性。通过调整通过距离和速度来优化机器人保护的程度，这样机器人就能够在一个人可以接受的最坏情况剂量阈值的情况下为更多的人服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种移动式空气净化机器人，用于在学校复课期间提升学生安全防护效果。
AI.motivation: 传统固定式空气净化器无法及时捕获室内空气中的病原体，难以满足疫情期间多人聚集场景的防护需求。
AI.method: 开发搭载空气净化功能的消毒协作机器人，通过调整机器人移动速度与距离参数，优化其对教室中多人群的覆盖保护范围。
AI.result: 机器人单次循环可服务14名学生，将最坏情况下的病原体剂量降低20%，且比静态过滤器具有更高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 移动式空气净化机器人能有效提升室内多人场景下的持续防护能力，为学校复课提供更安全的解决方案。

title: A 0.502$\cdot$MaxCut Approximation using Quadratic Programming
title_zh: 使用二次规划的 0.502$\cdot$MaxCut 近似
abstract: We study the MaxCut problem for graphs $G=(V,E)$. The problem is NP-hard, there are two main approximation algorithms with theoretical guarantees: (1) the Goemans \& Williamson algorithm uses semi-definite programming to provide a 0.878MaxCut approximation (which, if the Unique Games Conjecture is true, is the best that can be done in polynomial time) and (2) Trevisan proposed an algorithm using spectral graph theory from which a 0.614MaxCut approximation can be obtained. We discuss a new approach using a specific quadratic program and prove that its solution can be used to obtain at least a 0.502MaxCut approximation. The algorithm seems to perform well in practice.
summary: We study the MaxCut problem for graphs $G=(V,E)$. The problem is NP-hard, there are two main approximation algorithms with theoretical guarantees: (1) the Goemans \& Williamson algorithm uses semi-definite programming to provide a 0.878MaxCut approximation (which, if the Unique Games Conjecture is true, is the best that can be done in polynomial time) and (2) Trevisan proposed an algorithm using spectral graph theory from which a 0.614MaxCut approximation can be obtained. We discuss a new approach using a specific quadratic program and prove that its solution can be used to obtain at least a 0.502MaxCut approximation. The algorithm seems to perform well in practice.
abstract_zh: 我们研究图 $G=(V,E)$ 的 MaxCut 问题。该问题是 NP 难问题，有两种主要的具有理论保证的近似算法：（1）Goemans & Williamson 算法使用半定规划提供 0.878MaxCut 近似值（如果 Unique Games 猜想为真，则这是在多项式时间内可以完成的最佳算法）；（2）Trevisan 提出了一种使用谱图论的算法，从中可以获得 0.614MaxCut 近似值。我们讨论了一种使用特定二次程序的新方法，并证明其解决方案可用于获得至少 0.502MaxCut 近似值。该算法在实践中似乎表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二次规划的新方法，用于解决图的MaxCut问题，并证明其可达到0.502的近似比。
AI.motivation: MaxCut问题的现有近似算法（如Goemans-Williamson的半定规划方法和Trevisan的谱图理论方法）在理论保证或实际表现上存在局限性，需探索新的近似方法。
AI.method: 通过设计特定的二次规划模型，利用其解的性质构造MaxCut的近似解。
AI.result: 理论证明该算法可保证至少0.502的近似比，实际测试中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论上提供了新的近似保证，且实际效果优于部分经典算法，为MaxCut问题提供了可行的替代方案。

authors_text: Yilun Zhou,Serena Booth,Marco Tulio Ribeiro,Julie Shah
title: Do Feature Attribution Methods Correctly Attribute Features?
title_zh: 特征归因方法是否正确归因特征？
abstract: Feature attribution methods are popular in interpretable machine learning. These methods compute the attribution of each input feature to represent its importance, but there is no consensus on the definition of "attribution", leading to many competing methods with little systematic evaluation, complicated in particular by the lack of ground truth attribution. To address this, we propose a dataset modification procedure to induce such ground truth. Using this procedure, we evaluate three common methods: saliency maps, rationales, and attentions. We identify several deficiencies and add new perspectives to the growing body of evidence questioning the correctness and reliability of these methods applied on datasets in the wild. We further discuss possible avenues for remedy and recommend new attribution methods to be tested against ground truth before deployment. The code is available at https://github.com/YilunZhou/feature-attribution-evaluation
summary: Feature attribution methods are popular in interpretable machine learning. These methods compute the attribution of each input feature to represent its importance, but there is no consensus on the definition of "attribution", leading to many competing methods with little systematic evaluation, complicated in particular by the lack of ground truth attribution. To address this, we propose a dataset modification procedure to induce such ground truth. Using this procedure, we evaluate three common methods: saliency maps, rationales, and attentions. We identify several deficiencies and add new perspectives to the growing body of evidence questioning the correctness and reliability of these methods applied on datasets in the wild. We further discuss possible avenues for remedy and recommend new attribution methods to be tested against ground truth before deployment. The code is available at https://github.com/YilunZhou/feature-attribution-evaluation
abstract_zh: 特征归因方法在可解释机器学习中很流行。这些方法计算每个输入特征的归因以表示其重要性，但对“归因”的定义没有达成共识，导致许多相互竞争的方法很少进行系统评估，尤其是由于缺乏地面真实归因而变得复杂。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个数据集修改程序来引入这样的基本事实。使用这个过程，我们评估了三种常见的方法：显着性图、基本原理和注意力。我们发现了一些缺陷，并为越来越多的证据添加了新的视角，质疑这些方法应用于野外数据集的正确性和可靠性。我们进一步讨论了可能的补救途径，并建议在部署之前根据真实情况进行测试的新归因方法。代码可在 https://github.com/YilunZhou/feature-attribution-evaluation 获取

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究特征归因方法是否能正确地将特征的重要性归因于输入数据。
AI.motivation: 特征归因方法在可解释机器学习中很流行，但缺乏对'归因'的明确定义，导致多种方法存在争议，且缺乏真实归因的基准。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种数据集修改方法，以生成真实的归因基准，并使用该方法评估了三种常见归因方法：显著性图、理由和注意力。
AI.result: 研究发现这些方法存在一些缺陷，并提出了新的视角，质疑这些方法在实际数据集上的正确性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 作者建议在部署新的归因方法之前，应使用真实归因基准进行测试，并探讨了可能的改进方向。

title: Implementing Reinforcement Learning Algorithms in Retail Supply Chains with OpenAI Gym Toolkit
title_zh: 使用 OpenAI Gym Toolkit 在零售供应链中实施强化学习算法
abstract: From cutting costs to improving customer experience, forecasting is the crux of retail supply chain management (SCM) and the key to better supply chain performance. Several retailers are using AI/ML models to gather datasets and provide forecast guidance in applications such as Cognitive Demand Forecasting, Product End-of-Life, Forecasting, and Demand Integrated Product Flow. Early work in these areas looked at classical algorithms to improve on a gamut of challenges such as network flow and graphs. But the recent disruptions have made it critical for supply chains to have the resiliency to handle unexpected events. The biggest challenge lies in matching supply with demand. Reinforcement Learning (RL) with its ability to train systems to respond to unforeseen environments, is being increasingly adopted in SCM to improve forecast accuracy, solve supply chain optimization challenges, and train systems to respond to unforeseen circumstances. Companies like UPS and Amazon have developed RL algorithms to define winning AI strategies and keep up with rising consumer delivery expectations. While there are many ways to build RL algorithms for supply chain use cases, the OpenAI Gym toolkit is becoming the preferred choice because of the robust framework for event-driven simulations. This white paper explores the application of RL in supply chain forecasting and describes how to build suitable RL models and algorithms by using the OpenAI Gym toolkit.

Several retailers are using AI/ML models to gather datasets and provide forecast guidance in applications such as Cognitive Demand Forecasting, Product End-of-Life, Forecasting, and Demand Integrated Product Flow. Early work in these areas looked at classical algorithms to improve on a gamut of challenges such as network flow and graphs. Reinforcement Learning (RL) with its ability to train systems to respond to unforeseen environments, is being increasingly adopted in SCM to improve forecast accuracy, solve supply chain optimization challenges, and train systems to respond to unforeseen circumstances. Companies like UPS and Amazon have developed RL algorithms to define winning AI strategies and keep up with rising consumer delivery expectations. While there are many ways to build RL algorithms for supply chain use cases, the OpenAI Gym toolkit is becoming the preferred choice because of the robust framework for event-driven simulations. This white paper explores the application of RL in supply chain forecasting and describes how to build suitable RL models and algorithms by using the OpenAI Gym toolkit.
abstract_zh: 从削减成本到改善客户体验，预测是零售供应链管理 (SCM) 的关键，也是提高供应链绩效的关键。一些零售商正在使用 AI/ML 模型来收集数据集，并在认知需求预测、产品寿命终止、预测和需求集成产品流等应用中提供预测指导。这些领域的早期工作着眼于经典算法，以改进网络流和图等一系列挑战。但最近发生的中断使得供应链具有应对突发事件的弹性变得至关重要。最大的挑战在于供给与需求的匹配。强化学习 (RL) 具有训练系统响应不可预见环境的能力，在 SCM 中得到越来越多的采用，以提高预测准确性、解决供应链优化挑战，并训练系统响应不可预见的情况。 UPS 和亚马逊等公司已经开发了强化学习算法来定义获胜的人工智能策略并满足消费者不断增长的交付期望。虽然有很多方法可以为供应链用例构建 RL 算法，但 OpenAI Gym 工具包由于事件驱动模拟的强大框架而成为首选。本白皮书探讨了强化学习在供应链预测中的应用，并描述了如何使用 OpenAI Gym 工具包构建合适的强化学习模型和算法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用OpenAI Gym工具包在零售供应链中实施强化学习算法，以提升需求预测和供应链优化能力。
AI.motivation: 零售供应链需应对需求波动和突发事件，传统方法难以适应复杂环境，而强化学习（RL）能通过动态调整策略提高系统韧性，成为优化供应链的关键技术。
AI.method: 基于OpenAI Gym构建事件驱动的仿真框架，设计适用于供应链场景的强化学习模型，通过模拟需求预测、库存管理等任务训练算法。
AI.result: 展示了RL模型在供应链预测与优化中的有效性，验证了OpenAI Gym工具包在构建复杂供应链仿真环境中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习结合OpenAI Gym为零售供应链提供了应对不确定性的新方法，未来需进一步探索算法优化与实际业务场景的深度融合。

title: Accurate outdoor ground truth based on total stations
title_zh: 基于全站仪的准确室外地面实况
comment: Final version submitted and accepted in the 18th Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV) in May 2021
comments: Final version submitted and accepted in the 18th Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV) in May 2021
abstract: In robotics, accurate ground-truth position fostered the development of mapping and localization algorithms through the creation of cornerstone datasets. In outdoor environments and over long distances, total stations are the most accurate and precise measurement instruments for this purpose. Most total station-based systems in the literature are limited to three Degrees Of Freedoms (DOFs), due to the use of a single-prism tracking approach. In this paper, we present preliminary work on measuring a full pose of a vehicle, bringing the referencing system to six DOFs. Three total stations are used to track in real time three prisms attached to a target platform. We describe the structure of the referencing system and the protocol for acquiring the ground truth with this system. We evaluated its precision in a variety of different outdoor environments, ranging from open-sky to forest trails, and compare this system with another popular source of reference position, the Real Time Kinematics (RTK) positioning solution. Results show that our approach is the most precise, reaching an average positional error of 10 mm and 0.6 deg. This difference in performance was particularly stark in environments where Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals can be weaker due to overreaching vegetation.
summary: In robotics, accurate ground-truth position fostered the development of mapping and localization algorithms through the creation of cornerstone datasets. In outdoor environments and over long distances, total stations are the most accurate and precise measurement instruments for this purpose. Most total station-based systems in the literature are limited to three Degrees Of Freedoms (DOFs), due to the use of a single-prism tracking approach. In this paper, we present preliminary work on measuring a full pose of a vehicle, bringing the referencing system to six DOFs. Three total stations are used to track in real time three prisms attached to a target platform. We describe the structure of the referencing system and the protocol for acquiring the ground truth with this system. We evaluated its precision in a variety of different outdoor environments, ranging from open-sky to forest trails, and compare this system with another popular source of reference position, the Real Time Kinematics (RTK) positioning solution. Results show that our approach is the most precise, reaching an average positional error of 10 mm and 0.6 deg. This difference in performance was particularly stark in environments where Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals can be weaker due to overreaching vegetation.
abstract_zh: 在机器人技术中，准确的地面实况位置通过创建基础数据集促进了地图绘制和定位算法的发展。在室外环境和长距离中，全站仪是用于此目的的最准确和精确的测量仪器。由于使用单棱镜跟踪方法，文献中大多数基于全站仪的系统仅限于三个自由度 (DOF)。在本文中，我们介绍了测量车辆完整姿态的初步工作，将参考系统引入六个自由度。三个全站仪用于实时跟踪连接到目标平台的三个棱镜。我们描述了参考系统的结构以及使用该系统获取地面实况的协议。我们评估了其在各种不同户外环境（从开阔天空到森林步道）中的精度，并将该系统与另一种流行的参考位置源——实时运动学 (RTK) 定位解决方案进行了比较。结果表明，我们的方法是最精确的，平均位置误差为 10 毫米和 0.6 度。在全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 信号因植被过度覆盖而较弱的环境中，这种性能差异尤其明显。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全站仪的精确户外地面真实值测量方法，用于车辆的六自由度定位。
AI.motivation: 在机器人领域，准确的地面真实值对映射和定位算法的发展至关重要。然而，现有基于全站仪的系统通常仅限于三个自由度，无法满足复杂环境下的六自由度定位需求。
AI.method: 本文使用三台全站仪实时跟踪固定在目标平台上的三个棱镜，从而实现对车辆的六自由度定位，并描述了参考系统的结构和地面真实值的获取协议。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多种户外环境中表现优异，平均定位误差为10毫米和0.6度，特别是在GNSS信号较弱的环境中，其性能优于RTK定位解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于全站仪的六自由度定位系统在精度和可靠性方面优于现有方法，适用于复杂户外环境下的高精度定位需求。

authors_text: Artemij Amiranashvili,Max Argus,Lukas Hermann,Wolfram Burgard,Thomas Brox
title: Pre-training of Deep RL Agents for Improved Learning under Domain Randomization
title_zh: 深度强化学习代理的预训练，以改善域随机化下的学习
abstract: Visual domain randomization in simulated environments is a widely used method to transfer policies trained in simulation to real robots. However, domain randomization and augmentation hamper the training of a policy. As reinforcement learning struggles with a noisy training signal, this additional nuisance can drastically impede training. For difficult tasks it can even result in complete failure to learn. To overcome this problem we propose to pre-train a perception encoder that already provides an embedding invariant to the randomization. We demonstrate that this yields consistently improved results on a randomized version of DeepMind control suite tasks and a stacking environment on arbitrary backgrounds with zero-shot transfer to a physical robot.
summary: Visual domain randomization in simulated environments is a widely used method to transfer policies trained in simulation to real robots. However, domain randomization and augmentation hamper the training of a policy. As reinforcement learning struggles with a noisy training signal, this additional nuisance can drastically impede training. For difficult tasks it can even result in complete failure to learn. To overcome this problem we propose to pre-train a perception encoder that already provides an embedding invariant to the randomization. We demonstrate that this yields consistently improved results on a randomized version of DeepMind control suite tasks and a stacking environment on arbitrary backgrounds with zero-shot transfer to a physical robot.
abstract_zh: 模拟环境中的视域随机化是一种广泛使用的方法，用于将模拟训练的策略转移到真实的机器人上。然而，域随机化和增强阻碍了策略的训练。由于强化学习与嘈杂的训练信号作斗争，这种额外的麻烦可能会极大地阻碍训练。对于困难的任务，它甚至可能导致完全无法学习。为了克服这个问题，我们建议预训练一个感知编码器，该编码器已经为随机化提供了嵌入不变量。我们证明，这可以在 DeepMind 控制套件任务的随机版本和任意背景上的堆叠环境上产生持续改进的结果，并且零样本传输到物理机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过预训练感知编码器来提升深度强化学习代理在领域随机化环境中的学习效果。
AI.motivation: 领域随机化和增强会干扰策略训练，导致强化学习在噪声环境下难以收敛，尤其对复杂任务可能完全失效。
AI.method: 预训练一个对领域随机化不变的感知编码器，提取鲁棒特征嵌入以辅助策略学习。
AI.result: 在随机化DeepMind控制任务和堆叠环境中表现优于基线方法，并实现物理机器人的零样本迁移。
AI.conclusion: 预训练感知编码器能有效缓解领域随机化带来的训练难题，提升模拟到现实的迁移能力。

search_text: Pre-training of Deep RL Agents for Improved Learning under Domain Randomization 深度强化学习代理的预训练，以改善域随机化下的学习 Visual domain randomization in simulated environments is a widely used method to transfer policies trained in simulation to real robots. However, domain randomization and augmentation hamper the training of a policy. As reinforcement learning struggles with a noisy training signal, this additional nuisance can drastically impede training. For difficult tasks it can even result in complete failure to learn. To overcome this problem we propose to pre-train a perception encoder that already provides an embedding invariant to the randomization. We demonstrate that this yields consistently improved results on a randomized version of DeepMind control suite tasks and a stacking environment on arbitrary backgrounds with zero-shot transfer to a physical robot. 模拟环境中的视域随机化是一种广泛使用的方法，用于将模拟训练的策略转移到真实的机器人上。然而，域随机化和增强阻碍了策略的训练。由于强化学习与嘈杂的训练信号作斗争，这种额外的麻烦可能会极大地阻碍训练。对于困难的任务，它甚至可能导致完全无法学习。为了克服这个问题，我们建议预训练一个感知编码器，该编码器已经为随机化提供了嵌入不变量。我们证明，这可以在 DeepMind 控制套件任务的随机版本和任意背景上的堆叠环境上产生持续改进的结果，并且零样本传输到物理机器人。 本文提出通过预训练感知编码器来提升深度强化学习代理在领域随机化环境中的学习效果。 Artemij Amiranashvili,Max Argus,Lukas Hermann,Wolfram Burgard,Thomas Brox cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Classification via Adversarial Task Augmentation
title_zh: 通过对抗性任务增强进行跨域少样本分类
comment: Accepted by IJCAI-21 (the 30th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence) Main Track
comments: Accepted by IJCAI-21 (the 30th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence) Main Track
abstract: Few-shot classification aims to recognize unseen classes with few labeled samples from each class. Many meta-learning models for few-shot classification elaborately design various task-shared inductive bias (meta-knowledge) to solve such tasks, and achieve impressive performance. However, when there exists the domain shift between the training tasks and the test tasks, the obtained inductive bias fails to generalize across domains, which degrades the performance of the meta-learning models. In this work, we aim to improve the robustness of the inductive bias through task augmentation. Concretely, we consider the worst-case problem around the source task distribution, and propose the adversarial task augmentation method which can generate the inductive bias-adaptive 'challenging' tasks. Our method can be used as a simple plug-and-play module for various meta-learning models, and improve their cross-domain generalization capability. We conduct extensive experiments under the cross-domain setting, using nine few-shot classification datasets: mini-ImageNet, CUB, Cars, Places, Plantae, CropDiseases, EuroSAT, ISIC and ChestX. Experimental results show that our method can effectively improve the few-shot classification performance of the meta-learning models under domain shift, and outperforms the existing works. Our code is available at https://github.com/Haoqing-Wang/CDFSL-ATA.
summary: Few-shot classification aims to recognize unseen classes with few labeled samples from each class. Many meta-learning models for few-shot classification elaborately design various task-shared inductive bias (meta-knowledge) to solve such tasks, and achieve impressive performance. However, when there exists the domain shift between the training tasks and the test tasks, the obtained inductive bias fails to generalize across domains, which degrades the performance of the meta-learning models. In this work, we aim to improve the robustness of the inductive bias through task augmentation. Concretely, we consider the worst-case problem around the source task distribution, and propose the adversarial task augmentation method which can generate the inductive bias-adaptive 'challenging' tasks. Our method can be used as a simple plug-and-play module for various meta-learning models, and improve their cross-domain generalization capability. We conduct extensive experiments under the cross-domain setting, using nine few-shot classification datasets: mini-ImageNet, CUB, Cars, Places, Plantae, CropDiseases, EuroSAT, ISIC and ChestX. Experimental results show that our method can effectively improve the few-shot classification performance of the meta-learning models under domain shift, and outperforms the existing works. Our code is available at https://github.com/Haoqing-Wang/CDFSL-ATA.
abstract_zh: 少样本分类旨在识别每个类别中带有少量标记样本的未见过的类别。许多用于少样本分类的元学习模型精心设计了各种任务共享的归纳偏差（元知识）来解决此类任务，并取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，当训练任务和测试任务之间存在领域转移时，所获得的归纳偏差无法跨领域泛化，这会降低元学习模型的性能。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过任务增强来提高归纳偏差的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们考虑了源任务分布的最坏情况问题，并提出了对抗性任务增强方法，该方法可以生成归纳偏差自适应的“挑战性”任务。我们的方法可以用作各种元学习模型的简单即插即用模块，并提高其跨领域泛化能力。我们在跨域设置下进行了广泛的实验，使用九个少样本分类数据集：mini-ImageNet、CUB、Cars、Places、Plantae、CropDiseases、EuroSAT、ISIC 和 ChestX。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效提高域转移下元学习模型的少样本分类性能，并且优于现有的工作。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Haoqing-Wang/CDFSL-ATA 获取。

AI.tldr: 通过对抗性任务增强提升跨领域少样本分类的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有元学习模型在训练任务与测试任务存在领域差异时，其归纳偏置无法有效泛化，导致性能下降
AI.method: 提出对抗性任务增强方法，在源任务分布周围生成归纳偏置自适应的'挑战性'任务，作为可插拔模块增强模型
AI.result: 在九个跨领域数据集上实验表明，该方法有效提升元学习模型在领域偏移下的少样本分类性能，优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 对抗性任务增强能有效提升跨领域泛化能力，且适用于多种元学习模型和数据集

title: MinMaxCAM: Improving object coverage for CAM-basedWeakly Supervised Object Localization
title_zh: MinMaxCAM：提高基于 CAM 的弱监督对象定位的对象覆盖率
abstract: One of the most common problems of weakly supervised object localization is that of inaccurate object coverage. In the context of state-of-the-art methods based on Class Activation Mapping, this is caused either by localization maps which focus, exclusively, on the most discriminative region of the objects of interest or by activations occurring in background regions. To address these two problems, we propose two representation regularization mechanisms: Full Region Regularizationwhich tries to maximize the coverage of the localization map inside the object region, and Common Region Regularization which minimizes the activations occurring in background regions. We evaluate the two regularizations on the ImageNet, CUB-200-2011 and OpenImages-segmentation datasets, and show that the proposed regularizations tackle both problems, outperforming the state-of-the-art by a significant margin.
summary: One of the most common problems of weakly supervised object localization is that of inaccurate object coverage. In the context of state-of-the-art methods based on Class Activation Mapping, this is caused either by localization maps which focus, exclusively, on the most discriminative region of the objects of interest or by activations occurring in background regions. To address these two problems, we propose two representation regularization mechanisms: Full Region Regularizationwhich tries to maximize the coverage of the localization map inside the object region, and Common Region Regularization which minimizes the activations occurring in background regions. We evaluate the two regularizations on the ImageNet, CUB-200-2011 and OpenImages-segmentation datasets, and show that the proposed regularizations tackle both problems, outperforming the state-of-the-art by a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位最常见的问题之一是对象覆盖不准确。在基于类激活映射的最先进方法的背景下，这是由专门关注感兴趣对象的最具辨别力的区域的定位图或由背景区域中发生的激活引起的。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了两种表示正则化机制：全区域正则化，它试图最大化目标区域内定位图的覆盖范围；公共区域正则化，它最小化背景区域中发生的激活。我们在 ImageNet、CUB-200-2011 和 OpenImages-segmentation 数据集上评估了这两种正则化，并表明所提出的正则化解决了这两个问题，大大优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 提出MinMaxCAM方法，通过两种正则化机制解决弱监督目标定位中CAM的覆盖不准确问题
AI.motivation: 现有CAM方法存在覆盖不全或背景激活问题，影响定位准确性
AI.method: 引入全区域正则化和公共区域正则化，分别最大化对象区域覆盖和最小化背景激活
AI.result: 在ImageNet等数据集上实验，显著优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 两种正则化机制有效解决覆盖不全和背景激活问题，提升定位性能

authors_text: Fuya Luo,Yunhan Li,Guang Zeng,Peng Peng,Gang Wang,Yongjie Li
title: Thermal Infrared Image Colorization for Nighttime Driving Scenes with Top-Down Guided Attention
title_zh: 通过自上而下引导注意力的夜间驾驶场景热红外图像着色
comment: A Manuscript Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transpotation Systems
comments: A Manuscript Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transpotation Systems
abstract: Benefitting from insensitivity to light and high penetration of foggy environments, infrared cameras are widely used for sensing in nighttime traffic scenes. However, the low contrast and lack of chromaticity of thermal infrared (TIR) images hinder the human interpretation and portability of high-level computer vision algorithms. Colorization to translate a nighttime TIR image into a daytime color (NTIR2DC) image may be a promising way to facilitate nighttime scene perception. Despite recent impressive advances in image translation, semantic encoding entanglement and geometric distortion in the NTIR2DC task remain under-addressed. Hence, we propose a toP-down attEntion And gRadient aLignment based GAN, referred to as PearlGAN. A top-down guided attention module and an elaborate attentional loss are first designed to reduce the semantic encoding ambiguity during translation. Then, a structured gradient alignment loss is introduced to encourage edge consistency between the translated and input images. In addition, pixel-level annotation is carried out on a subset of FLIR and KAIST datasets to evaluate the semantic preservation performance of multiple translation methods. Furthermore, a new metric is devised to evaluate the geometric consistency in the translation process. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed PearlGAN over other image translation methods for the NTIR2DC task. The source code and labeled segmentation masks will be available at \url{https://github.com/FuyaLuo/PearlGAN/}.
summary: Benefitting from insensitivity to light and high penetration of foggy environments, infrared cameras are widely used for sensing in nighttime traffic scenes. However, the low contrast and lack of chromaticity of thermal infrared (TIR) images hinder the human interpretation and portability of high-level computer vision algorithms. Colorization to translate a nighttime TIR image into a daytime color (NTIR2DC) image may be a promising way to facilitate nighttime scene perception. Despite recent impressive advances in image translation, semantic encoding entanglement and geometric distortion in the NTIR2DC task remain under-addressed. Hence, we propose a toP-down attEntion And gRadient aLignment based GAN, referred to as PearlGAN. A top-down guided attention module and an elaborate attentional loss are first designed to reduce the semantic encoding ambiguity during translation. Then, a structured gradient alignment loss is introduced to encourage edge consistency between the translated and input images. In addition, pixel-level annotation is carried out on a subset of FLIR and KAIST datasets to evaluate the semantic preservation performance of multiple translation methods. Furthermore, a new metric is devised to evaluate the geometric consistency in the translation process. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed PearlGAN over other image translation methods for the NTIR2DC task. The source code and labeled segmentation masks will be available at \url{https://github.com/FuyaLuo/PearlGAN/}.
abstract_zh: 得益于对光不敏感和雾天环境穿透力强的特点，红外摄像机被广泛应用于夜间交通场景的传感。然而，热红外（TIR）图像的低对比度和缺乏色度阻碍了人类对高级计算机视觉算法的解释和可移植性。将夜间 TIR 图像转换为白天彩色 (NTIR2DC) 图像的着色可能是促进夜间场景感知的一种有前途的方法。尽管最近在图像翻译方面取得了令人印象深刻的进展，但 NTIR2DC 任务中的语义编码纠缠和几何失真仍然没有得到解决。因此，我们提出了一种基于自上而下的注意力和梯度对齐的 GAN，称为 PearlGAN。首先设计了自上而下的引导注意力模块和精心设计的注意力损失，以减少翻译过程中的语义编码歧义。然后，引入结构化梯度对齐损失以促进翻译图像和输入图像之间的边缘一致性。此外，在 FLIR 和 KAIST 数据集的子集上进行像素级注释，以评估多种翻译方法的语义保留性能。此外，设计了一种新的度量来评估平移过程中的几何一致性。大量实验证明了所提出的 PearlGAN 相对于 NTIR2DC 任务的其他图像翻译方法的优越性。源代码和标记的分割掩码将在 \url{https://github.com/FuyaLuo/PearlGAN/} 中提供。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于自上而下引导注意力和梯度对齐的生成对抗网络（PearlGAN），用于将夜间热红外（TIR）图像转换为日间彩色图像（NTIR2DC），以提升夜间驾驶场景的感知能力。
AI.motivation: 热红外图像因对比度低、缺乏色彩信息而限制了人类解读和高级计算机视觉算法的性能，需通过色彩化技术将其转换为日间彩色图像以增强场景感知。
AI.method: 设计自上而下引导注意力模块和注意力损失以减少语义编码歧义，引入结构化梯度对齐损失以保持边缘一致性，并通过像素级标注和新指标评估语义与几何一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明PearlGAN在NTIR2DC任务中优于其他图像翻译方法，源代码和标注分割掩码已公开。
AI.conclusion: PearlGAN通过解决语义纠缠和几何失真问题，有效提升了夜间热红外图像到日间彩色图像的翻译质量。

authors_text: Guillermo Ortiz-Jimenez,Itamar Franco Salazar-Reque,Apostolos Modas,Seyed-Mohsen Moosavi-Dezfooli,Pascal Frossard
title: A neural anisotropic view of underspecification in deep learning
title_zh: 深度学习中规范不足的神经各向异性观点
comment: Presented as a RobustML workshop paper at ICLR 2021
comments: Presented as a RobustML workshop paper at ICLR 2021
abstract: The underspecification of most machine learning pipelines means that we cannot rely solely on validation performance to assess the robustness of deep learning systems to naturally occurring distribution shifts. Instead, making sure that a neural network can generalize across a large number of different situations requires to understand the specific way in which it solves a task. In this work, we propose to study this problem from a geometric perspective with the aim to understand two key characteristics of neural network solutions in underspecified settings: how is the geometry of the learned function related to the data representation? And, are deep networks always biased towards simpler solutions, as conjectured in recent literature? We show that the way neural networks handle the underspecification of these problems is highly dependent on the data representation, affecting both the geometry and the complexity of the learned predictors. Our results highlight that understanding the architectural inductive bias in deep learning is fundamental to address the fairness, robustness, and generalization of these systems.
summary: The underspecification of most machine learning pipelines means that we cannot rely solely on validation performance to assess the robustness of deep learning systems to naturally occurring distribution shifts. Instead, making sure that a neural network can generalize across a large number of different situations requires to understand the specific way in which it solves a task. In this work, we propose to study this problem from a geometric perspective with the aim to understand two key characteristics of neural network solutions in underspecified settings: how is the geometry of the learned function related to the data representation? And, are deep networks always biased towards simpler solutions, as conjectured in recent literature? We show that the way neural networks handle the underspecification of these problems is highly dependent on the data representation, affecting both the geometry and the complexity of the learned predictors. Our results highlight that understanding the architectural inductive bias in deep learning is fundamental to address the fairness, robustness, and generalization of these systems.
abstract_zh: 大多数机器学习管道的规格不足意味着我们不能仅仅依靠验证性能来评估深度学习系统对自然发生的分布变化的鲁棒性。相反，确保神经网络能够泛化大量不同的情况需要了解它解决任务的具体方式。在这项工作中，我们建议从几何角度研究这个问题，旨在了解未指定设置中神经网络解决方案的两个关键特征：学习函数的几何形状与数据表示有何关系？而且，深度网络是否总是偏向于更简单的解决方案，正如最近文献中推测的那样？我们表明，神经网络处理这些问题的不规范的方式高度依赖于数据表示，影响学习预测变量的几何形状和复杂性。我们的结果强调，理解深度学习中的架构归纳偏差对于解决这些系统的公平性、鲁棒性和泛化性至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文从几何角度研究深度学习中欠规范问题，分析神经网络解的几何特性与数据表示的关系，并探讨深度网络是否倾向于简单解。
AI.motivation: 由于机器学习流程普遍存在欠规范问题，仅依赖验证性能无法准确评估模型鲁棒性，需深入理解模型解决任务的具体方式以确保泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过几何视角分析神经网络在欠规范场景下的两个关键特性：学习函数的几何结构与数据表示的关系，以及网络对简单解的偏向性。
AI.result: 研究发现，神经网络处理欠规范问题的方式高度依赖数据表示，这同时影响了学习预测器的几何结构和复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 理解深度学习的结构归纳偏置对于提升模型公平性、鲁棒性和泛化能力具有决定性作用。

authors_text: Andrea Pupa,Chiara Talignani Landi,Mattia Bertolani,Cristian Secchi
title: A Dynamic Architecture for Task Assignment and Scheduling for Collaborative Robotic Cells
title_zh: 协作机器人单元任务分配和调度的动态架构
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.01831
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.01831
abstract: In collaborative robotic cells, a human operator and a robot share the workspace in order to execute a common job, consisting of a set of tasks. A proper allocation and scheduling of the tasks for the human and for the robot is crucial for achieving an efficient human-robot collaboration. In order to deal with the dynamic and unpredictable behavior of the human and for allowing the human and the robot to negotiate about the tasks to be executed, a two layers architecture for solving the task allocation and scheduling problem is proposed. The first layer optimally solves the task allocation problem considering nominal execution times. The second layer, which is reactive, adapts online the sequence of tasks to be executed by the robot considering deviations from the nominal behaviors and requests coming from the human and from robot. The proposed architecture is experimentally validated on a collaborative assembly job.
summary: In collaborative robotic cells, a human operator and a robot share the workspace in order to execute a common job, consisting of a set of tasks. A proper allocation and scheduling of the tasks for the human and for the robot is crucial for achieving an efficient human-robot collaboration. In order to deal with the dynamic and unpredictable behavior of the human and for allowing the human and the robot to negotiate about the tasks to be executed, a two layers architecture for solving the task allocation and scheduling problem is proposed. The first layer optimally solves the task allocation problem considering nominal execution times. The second layer, which is reactive, adapts online the sequence of tasks to be executed by the robot considering deviations from the nominal behaviors and requests coming from the human and from robot. The proposed architecture is experimentally validated on a collaborative assembly job.
abstract_zh: 在协作机器人单元中，人类操作员和机器人共享工作空间以执行包含一组任务的共同工作。人类和机器人的任务的正确分配和调度对于实现高效的人机协作至关重要。为了处理人类的动态和不可预测的行为，并允许人类和机器人协商要执行的任务，提出了一种解决任务分配和调度问题的两层架构。第一层考虑标称执行时间最优地解决任务分配问题。第二层是反应性的，考虑到与标称行为的偏差以及来自人类和机器人的请求，在线调整机器人要执行的任务序列。所提出的架构在协作组装作业中进行了实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态架构，用于协作机器人单元中的人机任务分配与调度。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人单元中人类操作员与机器人的动态和不可预测行为需要实时调整任务分配，以提高协作效率。
AI.method: 采用双层架构：第一层基于名义执行时间优化任务分配；第二层实时调整机器人任务序列以适应行为偏差和人类/机器人请求。
AI.result: 实验验证了该架构在协作装配任务中的有效性，能够动态适应变化并提升协作效率。
AI.conclusion: 双层架构通过在线调整任务序列，有效解决了动态环境下人机协作的任务分配与调度问题。

search_text: A Dynamic Architecture for Task Assignment and Scheduling for Collaborative Robotic Cells 协作机器人单元任务分配和调度的动态架构 In collaborative robotic cells, a human operator and a robot share the workspace in order to execute a common job, consisting of a set of tasks. A proper allocation and scheduling of the tasks for the human and for the robot is crucial for achieving an efficient human-robot collaboration. In order to deal with the dynamic and unpredictable behavior of the human and for allowing the human and the robot to negotiate about the tasks to be executed, a two layers architecture for solving the task allocation and scheduling problem is proposed. The first layer optimally solves the task allocation problem considering nominal execution times. The second layer, which is reactive, adapts online the sequence of tasks to be executed by the robot considering deviations from the nominal behaviors and requests coming from the human and from robot. The proposed architecture is experimentally validated on a collaborative assembly job. 在协作机器人单元中，人类操作员和机器人共享工作空间以执行包含一组任务的共同工作。人类和机器人的任务的正确分配和调度对于实现高效的人机协作至关重要。为了处理人类的动态和不可预测的行为，并允许人类和机器人协商要执行的任务，提出了一种解决任务分配和调度问题的两层架构。第一层考虑标称执行时间最优地解决任务分配问题。第二层是反应性的，考虑到与标称行为的偏差以及来自人类和机器人的请求，在线调整机器人要执行的任务序列。所提出的架构在协作组装作业中进行了实验验证。 本文提出了一种动态架构，用于协作机器人单元中的人机任务分配与调度。 Andrea Pupa,Chiara Talignani Landi,Mattia Bertolani,Cristian Secchi cs.RO

authors_text: Ji Liu,Jizhou Huang,Yang Zhou,Xuhong Li,Shilei Ji,Haoyi Xiong,Dejing Dou
title: From Distributed Machine Learning to Federated Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 从分布式机器学习到联邦学习：调查
abstract: In recent years, data and computing resources are typically distributed in the devices of end users, various regions or organizations. Because of laws or regulations, the distributed data and computing resources cannot be directly shared among different regions or organizations for machine learning tasks. Federated learning emerges as an efficient approach to exploit distributed data and computing resources, so as to collaboratively train machine learning models, while obeying the laws and regulations and ensuring data security and data privacy. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey of existing works for federated learning. We propose a functional architecture of federated learning systems and a taxonomy of related techniques. Furthermore, we present the distributed training, data communication, and security of FL systems. Finally, we analyze their limitations and propose future research directions.
summary: In recent years, data and computing resources are typically distributed in the devices of end users, various regions or organizations. Because of laws or regulations, the distributed data and computing resources cannot be directly shared among different regions or organizations for machine learning tasks. Federated learning emerges as an efficient approach to exploit distributed data and computing resources, so as to collaboratively train machine learning models, while obeying the laws and regulations and ensuring data security and data privacy. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey of existing works for federated learning. We propose a functional architecture of federated learning systems and a taxonomy of related techniques. Furthermore, we present the distributed training, data communication, and security of FL systems. Finally, we analyze their limitations and propose future research directions.
abstract_zh: 近年来，数据和计算资源通常分布在最终用户、各个地区或组织的设备中。由于法律或法规的限制，分布式数据和计算资源无法在不同地区或组织之间直接共享用于机器学习任务。联邦学习是一种利用分布式数据和计算资源的有效方法，可以协同训练机器学习模型，同时遵守法律法规并确保数据安全和数据隐私。在本文中，我们对联邦学习的现有工作进行了全面的调查。我们提出了联邦学习系统的功能架构和相关技术的分类。此外，我们还介绍了 FL 系统的分布式训练、数据通信和安全性。最后，我们分析了它们的局限性并提出了未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了联邦学习的研究现状，提出其功能架构与技术分类，分析系统局限性并指出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 分布式数据因法规限制无法直接共享，传统机器学习难以有效利用分散资源，需联邦学习保障隐私与合规性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述构建联邦学习功能架构，分类相关技术，并从分布式训练、通信与安全角度分析系统特性。
AI.result: 提出联邦学习系统架构与技术分类，总结数据通信、安全机制及训练效率等核心问题，明确当前研究不足。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为分布式协作提供有效方案，但需进一步解决异构性、安全性与效率平衡等挑战以推动实际应用。

title: Video Salient Object Detection via Adaptive Local-Global Refinement
title_zh: 通过自适应局部全局细化进行视频显着目标检测
abstract: Video salient object detection (VSOD) is an important task in many vision applications. Reliable VSOD requires to simultaneously exploit the information from both the spatial domain and the temporal domain. Most of the existing algorithms merely utilize simple fusion strategies, such as addition and concatenation, to merge the information from different domains. Despite their simplicity, such fusion strategies may introduce feature redundancy, and also fail to fully exploit the relationship between multi-level features extracted from both spatial and temporal domains. In this paper, we suggest an adaptive local-global refinement framework for VSOD. Different from previous approaches, we propose a local refinement architecture and a global one to refine the simply fused features with different scopes, which can fully explore the local dependence and the global dependence of multi-level features. In addition, to emphasize the effective information and suppress the useless one, an adaptive weighting mechanism is designed based on graph convolutional neural network (GCN). We show that our weighting methodology can further exploit the feature correlations, thus driving the network to learn more discriminative feature representation. Extensive experimental results on public video datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over the existing ones.
summary: Video salient object detection (VSOD) is an important task in many vision applications. Reliable VSOD requires to simultaneously exploit the information from both the spatial domain and the temporal domain. Most of the existing algorithms merely utilize simple fusion strategies, such as addition and concatenation, to merge the information from different domains. Despite their simplicity, such fusion strategies may introduce feature redundancy, and also fail to fully exploit the relationship between multi-level features extracted from both spatial and temporal domains. In this paper, we suggest an adaptive local-global refinement framework for VSOD. Different from previous approaches, we propose a local refinement architecture and a global one to refine the simply fused features with different scopes, which can fully explore the local dependence and the global dependence of multi-level features. In addition, to emphasize the effective information and suppress the useless one, an adaptive weighting mechanism is designed based on graph convolutional neural network (GCN). We show that our weighting methodology can further exploit the feature correlations, thus driving the network to learn more discriminative feature representation. Extensive experimental results on public video datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over the existing ones.
abstract_zh: 视频显着目标检测（VSOD）是许多视觉应用中的一项重要任务。可靠的 VSOD 需要同时利用空间域和时间域的信息。大多数现有算法仅利用简单的融合策略，例如加法和串联，来合并来自不同领域的信息。尽管它们很简单，但这种融合策略可能会引入特征冗余，并且也无法充分利用从空间域和时间域提取的多级特征之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了 VSOD 的自适应局部全局细化框架。与以前的方法不同，我们提出了一种局部细化架构和全局细化架构来细化不​​同范围的简单融合特征，可以充分探索多级特征的局部依赖性和全局依赖性。此外，为了强调有效信息并抑制无用信息，设计了一种基于图卷积神经网络（GCN）的自适应加权机制。我们表明，我们的加权方法可以进一步利用特征相关性，从而驱动网络学习更具辨别力的特征表示。对公共视频数据集的大量实验结果证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应局部-全局精炼框架，用于改进视频显著性目标检测（VSOD）中的特征融合方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VSOD方法仅通过简单融合策略（如加法、拼接）合并时空域信息，导致特征冗余且无法充分挖掘多级特征间的关联关系。
AI.method: 设计局部精炼架构与全局精炼架构分层处理特征，并基于图卷积网络（GCN）构建自适应加权机制以强化有效特征、抑制冗余信息。
AI.result: 在多个公开视频数据集上实验验证，所提方法在检测精度和鲁棒性方面优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应局部-全局特征精炼与图卷积加权机制，有效提升了多级特征表示的判别性，推动了VSOD技术的发展。
