title: InsertionNet -- A Scalable Solution for Insertion
title_zh: InsertionNet——可扩展的插入解决方案
comment: Qualitative results can be found in our supplementary video on our website: https://sites.google.com/view/insertionnet/
comments: Qualitative results can be found in our supplementary video on our website: https://sites.google.com/view/insertionnet/
abstract: Complicated assembly processes can be described as a sequence of two main activities: grasping and insertion. While general grasping solutions are common in industry, insertion is still only applicable to small subsets of problems, mainly ones involving simple shapes in fixed locations and in which the variations are not taken into consideration. Recently, RL approaches with prior knowledge (e.g., LfD or residual policy) have been adopted. However, these approaches might be problematic in contact-rich tasks since interaction might endanger the robot and its equipment. In this paper, we tackled this challenge by formulating the problem as a regression problem. By combining visual and force inputs, we demonstrate that our method can scale to 16 different insertion tasks in less than 10 minutes. The resulting policies are robust to changes in the socket position, orientation or peg color, as well as to small differences in peg shape. Finally, we demonstrate an end-to-end solution for 2 complex assembly tasks with multi-insertion objectives when the assembly board is randomly placed on a table.
summary: Complicated assembly processes can be described as a sequence of two main activities: grasping and insertion. While general grasping solutions are common in industry, insertion is still only applicable to small subsets of problems, mainly ones involving simple shapes in fixed locations and in which the variations are not taken into consideration. Recently, RL approaches with prior knowledge (e.g., LfD or residual policy) have been adopted. However, these approaches might be problematic in contact-rich tasks since interaction might endanger the robot and its equipment. In this paper, we tackled this challenge by formulating the problem as a regression problem. By combining visual and force inputs, we demonstrate that our method can scale to 16 different insertion tasks in less than 10 minutes. The resulting policies are robust to changes in the socket position, orientation or peg color, as well as to small differences in peg shape. Finally, we demonstrate an end-to-end solution for 2 complex assembly tasks with multi-insertion objectives when the assembly board is randomly placed on a table.
abstract_zh: 复杂的装配过程可以描述为两个主要活动的序列：抓取和插入。虽然通用抓取解决方案在工业中很常见，但插入仍然仅适用于问题的一小部分，主要是涉及固定位置的简单形状并且不考虑变化的问题。最近，采用了具有先验知识（例如 LfD 或残差策略）的强化学习方法。然而，这些方法在接触丰富的任务中可能会出现问题，因为交互可能会危及机器人及其设备。在本文中，我们通过将问题表述为回归问题来应对这一挑战。通过结合视觉和力输入，我们证明了我们的方法可以在不到 10 分钟的时间内扩展到 16 个不同的插入任务。由此产生的策略对于插座位置、方向或钉子颜色的变化以及钉子形状的微小差异是稳健的。最后，当装配板随机放置在桌子上时，我们演示了针对 2 个具有多插入目标的复杂装配任务的端到端解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InsertionNet，通过回归方法解决复杂装配任务中的插入问题，实现对多种插入任务的快速适应。
AI.motivation: 现有插入方法仅适用于简单形状和固定位置的任务，难以处理接触丰富的复杂场景且存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 将插入问题建模为回归任务，融合视觉与力反馈输入，结合残差策略实现快速学习与泛化。
AI.result: 方法可在10分钟内适配16种插入任务，对插座位置、方向、插针颜色及形状微小变化具有鲁棒性，并完成多步骤复杂装配。
AI.conclusion: InsertionNet为工业装配提供了可扩展的插入解决方案，在效率与鲁棒性上优于传统强化学习方法。

search_text: InsertionNet -- A Scalable Solution for Insertion InsertionNet——可扩展的插入解决方案 Complicated assembly processes can be described as a sequence of two main activities: grasping and insertion. While general grasping solutions are common in industry, insertion is still only applicable to small subsets of problems, mainly ones involving simple shapes in fixed locations and in which the variations are not taken into consideration. Recently, RL approaches with prior knowledge (e.g., LfD or residual policy) have been adopted. However, these approaches might be problematic in contact-rich tasks since interaction might endanger the robot and its equipment. In this paper, we tackled this challenge by formulating the problem as a regression problem. By combining visual and force inputs, we demonstrate that our method can scale to 16 different insertion tasks in less than 10 minutes. The resulting policies are robust to changes in the socket position, orientation or peg color, as well as to small differences in peg shape. Finally, we demonstrate an end-to-end solution for 2 complex assembly tasks with multi-insertion objectives when the assembly board is randomly placed on a table. 复杂的装配过程可以描述为两个主要活动的序列：抓取和插入。虽然通用抓取解决方案在工业中很常见，但插入仍然仅适用于问题的一小部分，主要是涉及固定位置的简单形状并且不考虑变化的问题。最近，采用了具有先验知识（例如 LfD 或残差策略）的强化学习方法。然而，这些方法在接触丰富的任务中可能会出现问题，因为交互可能会危及机器人及其设备。在本文中，我们通过将问题表述为回归问题来应对这一挑战。通过结合视觉和力输入，我们证明了我们的方法可以在不到 10 分钟的时间内扩展到 16 个不同的插入任务。由此产生的策略对于插座位置、方向或钉子颜色的变化以及钉子形状的微小差异是稳健的。最后，当装配板随机放置在桌子上时，我们演示了针对 2 个具有多插入目标的复杂装配任务的端到端解决方案。 本文提出InsertionNet，通过回归方法解决复杂装配任务中的插入问题，实现对多种插入任务的快速适应。 Oren Spector,Dotan Di Castro cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Privacy-Preserving Portrait Matting
title_zh: 保护隐私的肖像抠图
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2021, code and dataset available at https://github.com/JizhiziLi/P3M
comments: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2021, code and dataset available at https://github.com/JizhiziLi/P3M
abstract: Recently, there has been an increasing concern about the privacy issue raised by using personally identifiable information in machine learning. However, previous portrait matting methods were all based on identifiable portrait images. To fill the gap, we present P3M-10k in this paper, which is the first large-scale anonymized benchmark for Privacy-Preserving Portrait Matting. P3M-10k consists of 10,000 high-resolution face-blurred portrait images along with high-quality alpha mattes. We systematically evaluate both trimap-free and trimap-based matting methods on P3M-10k and find that existing matting methods show different generalization capabilities when following the Privacy-Preserving Training (PPT) setting, i.e., training on face-blurred images and testing on arbitrary images. To devise a better trimap-free portrait matting model, we propose P3M-Net, which leverages the power of a unified framework for both semantic perception and detail matting, and specifically emphasizes the interaction between them and the encoder to facilitate the matting process. Extensive experiments on P3M-10k demonstrate that P3M-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of both objective metrics and subjective visual quality. Besides, it shows good generalization capacity under the PPT setting, confirming the value of P3M-10k for facilitating future research and enabling potential real-world applications. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/JizhiziLi/P3M
summary: Recently, there has been an increasing concern about the privacy issue raised by using personally identifiable information in machine learning. However, previous portrait matting methods were all based on identifiable portrait images. To fill the gap, we present P3M-10k in this paper, which is the first large-scale anonymized benchmark for Privacy-Preserving Portrait Matting. P3M-10k consists of 10,000 high-resolution face-blurred portrait images along with high-quality alpha mattes. We systematically evaluate both trimap-free and trimap-based matting methods on P3M-10k and find that existing matting methods show different generalization capabilities when following the Privacy-Preserving Training (PPT) setting, i.e., training on face-blurred images and testing on arbitrary images. To devise a better trimap-free portrait matting model, we propose P3M-Net, which leverages the power of a unified framework for both semantic perception and detail matting, and specifically emphasizes the interaction between them and the encoder to facilitate the matting process. Extensive experiments on P3M-10k demonstrate that P3M-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of both objective metrics and subjective visual quality. Besides, it shows good generalization capacity under the PPT setting, confirming the value of P3M-10k for facilitating future research and enabling potential real-world applications. The source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/JizhiziLi/P3M
abstract_zh: 最近，人们越来越关注机器学习中使用个人身份信息引发的隐私问题。然而，之前的人像抠图方法都是基于可识别的人像图像。为了填补这一空白，我们在本文中提出了 P3M-10k，这是第一个用于隐私保护肖像抠图的大规模匿名基准。 P3M-10k 由 10,000 张高分辨率面部模糊肖像图像以及高质量的 alpha 遮罩组成。我们在 P3M-10k 上系统地评估了无 trimap 和基于 trimap 的抠图方法，发现现有的抠图方法在遵循隐私保护训练（PPT）设置（即对面部模糊图像进行训练和对任意图像进行测试）时表现出不同的泛化能力。为了设计一个更好的无修剪图的肖像抠图模型，我们提出了 P3M-Net，它利用语义感知和细节抠图的统一框架的力量，并特别强调它们和编码器之间的交互以促进抠图过程。 P3M-10k 上的大量实验表明，P3M-Net 在客观指标和主观视觉质量方面均优于最先进的方法。此外，它在 PPT 设置下表现出良好的泛化能力，证实了 P3M-10k 对于促进未来研究和实现潜在实际应用的价值。源代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/JizhiziLi/P3M 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出隐私保护人像抠图方法P3M-Net，并构建首个大规模匿名化基准数据集P3M-10k，解决传统人像抠图方法依赖可识别图像导致的隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于可识别人像进行抠图，存在隐私泄露风险。为填补隐私保护抠图领域的空白，需建立匿名化基准并探索有效模型。
AI.method: 构建包含10,000张人脸模糊图像的P3M-10k数据集，提出融合语义感知与细节抠图的统一框架P3M-Net，强化编码器与多模块交互机制。
AI.result: P3M-Net在客观指标和视觉质量上优于现有方法，在隐私保护训练设置下展现良好泛化能力，验证了数据集与模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: P3M-10k基准和P3M-Net模型为隐私保护人像抠图研究提供新方向，推动该技术在现实场景中的安全应用。

Besides, it shows good generalization capacity under the PPT setting, confirming the value of P3M-10k for facilitating future research and enabling potential real-world applications. title: Segmentation-grounded Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 基于分割的场景图生成
abstract: Scene graph generation has emerged as an important problem in computer vision. While scene graphs provide a grounded representation of objects, their locations and relations in an image, they do so only at the granularity of proposal bounding boxes. In this work, we propose the first, to our knowledge, framework for pixel-level segmentation-grounded scene graph generation. Our framework is agnostic to the underlying scene graph generation method and address the lack of segmentation annotations in target scene graph datasets (e.g., Visual Genome) through transfer and multi-task learning from, and with, an auxiliary dataset (e.g., MS COCO). Specifically, each target object being detected is endowed with a segmentation mask, which is expressed as a lingual-similarity weighted linear combination over categories that have annotations present in an auxiliary dataset. These inferred masks, along with a novel Gaussian attention mechanism which grounds the relations at a pixel-level within the image, allow for improved relation prediction. The entire framework is end-to-end trainable and is learned in a multi-task manner with both target and auxiliary datasets.
summary: Scene graph generation has emerged as an important problem in computer vision. While scene graphs provide a grounded representation of objects, their locations and relations in an image, they do so only at the granularity of proposal bounding boxes. In this work, we propose the first, to our knowledge, framework for pixel-level segmentation-grounded scene graph generation. Our framework is agnostic to the underlying scene graph generation method and address the lack of segmentation annotations in target scene graph datasets (e.g., Visual Genome) through transfer and multi-task learning from, and with, an auxiliary dataset (e.g., MS COCO). Specifically, each target object being detected is endowed with a segmentation mask, which is expressed as a lingual-similarity weighted linear combination over categories that have annotations present in an auxiliary dataset. These inferred masks, along with a novel Gaussian attention mechanism which grounds the relations at a pixel-level within the image, allow for improved relation prediction. The entire framework is end-to-end trainable and is learned in a multi-task manner with both target and auxiliary datasets.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成已成为计算机视觉中的一个重要问题。虽然场景图提供了对象、它们在图像中的位置和关系的基础表示，但它们仅在提议边界框的粒度上这样做。在这项工作中，据我们所知，我们提出了第一个基于像素级分割的场景图生成框架。我们的框架与底层场景图生成方法无关，并通过从辅助数据集（例如，MS COCO）进行传输和多任务学习来解决目标场景图数据集（例如，Visual Genome）中缺乏分割注释的问题。具体来说，被检测的每个目标对象都被赋予了分割掩模，该分割掩模表示为辅助数据集中存在注释的类别的语言相似性加权线性组合。这些推断的掩模以及一种新颖的高斯注意机制（该机制将图像中的像素级关系建立在基础上）可以改进关系预测。整个框架是端到端可训练的，并且通过目标数据集和辅助数据集以多任务方式学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素级分割的场景图生成框架，通过结合辅助数据集的分割信息提升关系预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法依赖于区域建议框，缺乏像素级分割信息，导致关系预测不够精确。
AI.method: 利用辅助数据集（如MS COCO）的分割标注，通过迁移学习和多任务学习为每个目标生成分割掩码，并引入高斯注意力机制实现像素级关系建模。
AI.result: 在目标数据集（如Visual Genome）上实现了更准确的关系预测，且框架支持端到端训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合分割信息和注意力机制，该方法有效提升了场景图生成的精度和表达能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素级分割的场景图生成框架，通过结合辅助数据集的分割信息提升关系预测精度。

ai_content.method: 利用辅助数据集（如MS COCO）的分割标注，通过迁移学习和多任务学习为每个目标生成分割掩码，并引入高斯注意力机制实现像素级关系建模。
ai_content.result: 在目标数据集（如Visual Genome）上实现了更准确的关系预测，且框架支持端到端训练。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过融合分割信息和注意力机制，该方法有效提升了场景图生成的精度和表达能力。

search_text: Segmentation-grounded Scene Graph Generation 基于分割的场景图生成 Scene graph generation has emerged as an important problem in computer vision. While scene graphs provide a grounded representation of objects, their locations and relations in an image, they do so only at the granularity of proposal bounding boxes. In this work, we propose the first, to our knowledge, framework for pixel-level segmentation-grounded scene graph generation. Our framework is agnostic to the underlying scene graph generation method and address the lack of segmentation annotations in target scene graph datasets (e.g., Visual Genome) through transfer and multi-task learning from, and with, an auxiliary dataset (e.g., MS COCO). Specifically, each target object being detected is endowed with a segmentation mask, which is expressed as a lingual-similarity weighted linear combination over categories that have annotations present in an auxiliary dataset. These inferred masks, along with a novel Gaussian attention mechanism which grounds the relations at a pixel-level within the image, allow for improved relation prediction. The entire framework is end-to-end trainable and is learned in a multi-task manner with both target and auxiliary datasets. 场景图生成已成为计算机视觉中的一个重要问题。虽然场景图提供了对象、它们在图像中的位置和关系的基础表示，但它们仅在提议边界框的粒度上这样做。在这项工作中，据我们所知，我们提出了第一个基于像素级分割的场景图生成框架。我们的框架与底层场景图生成方法无关，并通过从辅助数据集（例如，MS COCO）进行传输和多任务学习来解决目标场景图数据集（例如，Visual Genome）中缺乏分割注释的问题。具体来说，被检测的每个目标对象都被赋予了分割掩模，该分割掩模表示为辅助数据集中存在注释的类别的语言相似性加权线性组合。这些推断的掩模以及一种新颖的高斯注意机制（该机制将图像中的像素级关系建立在基础上）可以改进关系预测。整个框架是端到端可训练的，并且通过目标数据集和辅助数据集以多任务方式学习。 本文提出了一种基于像素级分割的场景图生成框架，通过结合辅助数据集的分割信息提升关系预测精度。 Siddhesh Khandelwal,Mohammed Suhail,Leonid Sigal cs.CV

authors_text: Haotian Zhang,Yicheng Luo,Fangbo Qin,Yijia He,Xiao Liu
title: ELSD: Efficient Line Segment Detector and Descriptor
title_zh: ELSD：高效线段检测器和描述符
abstract: We present the novel Efficient Line Segment Detector and Descriptor (ELSD) to simultaneously detect line segments and extract their descriptors in an image. Unlike the traditional pipelines that conduct detection and description separately, ELSD utilizes a shared feature extractor for both detection and description, to provide the essential line features to the higher-level tasks like SLAM and image matching in real time. First, we design the one-stage compact model, and propose to use the mid-point, angle and length as the minimal representation of line segment, which also guarantees the center-symmetry. The non-centerness suppression is proposed to filter out the fragmented line segments caused by lines' intersections. The fine offset prediction is designed to refine the mid-point localization. Second, the line descriptor branch is integrated with the detector branch, and the two branches are jointly trained in an end-to-end manner. In the experiments, the proposed ELSD achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the Wireframe dataset and YorkUrban dataset, in both accuracy and efficiency. The line description ability of ELSD also outperforms the previous works on the line matching task.
summary: We present the novel Efficient Line Segment Detector and Descriptor (ELSD) to simultaneously detect line segments and extract their descriptors in an image. Unlike the traditional pipelines that conduct detection and description separately, ELSD utilizes a shared feature extractor for both detection and description, to provide the essential line features to the higher-level tasks like SLAM and image matching in real time. First, we design the one-stage compact model, and propose to use the mid-point, angle and length as the minimal representation of line segment, which also guarantees the center-symmetry. The non-centerness suppression is proposed to filter out the fragmented line segments caused by lines' intersections. The fine offset prediction is designed to refine the mid-point localization. Second, the line descriptor branch is integrated with the detector branch, and the two branches are jointly trained in an end-to-end manner. In the experiments, the proposed ELSD achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the Wireframe dataset and YorkUrban dataset, in both accuracy and efficiency. The line description ability of ELSD also outperforms the previous works on the line matching task.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了新颖的高效线段检测器和描述符（ELSD），可以同时检测线段并提取图像中的描述符。与分别进行检测和描述的传统流程不同，ELSD 利用共享特征提取器进行检测和描述，为 SLAM 和图像匹配等更高级别的任务实时提供必要的线条特征。首先，我们设计了一级紧凑模型，并提出使用中点、角度和长度作为线段的最小表示，这也保证了中心对称性。提出非中心抑制来滤除由于直线相交引起的碎片线段。精细偏移预测旨在细化中点定位。其次，线路描述符分支与检测器分支集成，两个分支以端到端的方式联合训练。在实验中，所提出的 ELSD 在 Wireframe 数据集和 YorkUrban 数据集上的准确性和效率方面均实现了最先进的性能。 ELSD 的线描述能力也优于之前在线匹配任务上的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效线段检测与描述子（ELSD），通过共享特征提取器同时完成线段检测与描述，提升实时任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将线段检测与描述分开处理，效率较低，难以满足SLAM和图像匹配等实时任务需求。
AI.method: 设计一阶段紧凑模型，采用中点、角度和长度作为线段最小表示，结合非中心度抑制和精细偏移预测，并通过端到端联合训练整合检测与描述分支。
AI.result: 在Wireframe和YorkUrban数据集上达到最先进水平，准确率与效率均优于现有方法，线段匹配能力显著提升。
AI.conclusion: ELSD通过统一架构实现高效线段检测与描述，在实时应用中具有显著优势。

title: Rethinking Ensemble-Distillation for Semantic Segmentation Based Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 重新思考基于语义分割的无监督域适应的集成蒸馏
abstract: Recent researches on unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) have demonstrated that end-to-end ensemble learning frameworks serve as a compelling option for UDA tasks. Nevertheless, these end-to-end ensemble learning methods often lack flexibility as any modification to the ensemble requires retraining of their frameworks. To address this problem, we propose a flexible ensemble-distillation framework for performing semantic segmentation based UDA, allowing any arbitrary composition of the members in the ensemble while still maintaining its superior performance. To achieve such flexibility, our framework is designed to be robust against the output inconsistency and the performance variation of the members within the ensemble. To examine the effectiveness and the robustness of our method, we perform an extensive set of experiments on both GTA5 to Cityscapes and SYNTHIA to Cityscapes benchmarks to quantitatively inspect the improvements achievable by our method. We further provide detailed analyses to validate that our design choices are practical and beneficial. The experimental evidence validates that the proposed method indeed offer superior performance, robustness and flexibility in semantic segmentation based UDA tasks against contemporary baseline methods.
summary: Recent researches on unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) have demonstrated that end-to-end ensemble learning frameworks serve as a compelling option for UDA tasks. Nevertheless, these end-to-end ensemble learning methods often lack flexibility as any modification to the ensemble requires retraining of their frameworks. To address this problem, we propose a flexible ensemble-distillation framework for performing semantic segmentation based UDA, allowing any arbitrary composition of the members in the ensemble while still maintaining its superior performance. To achieve such flexibility, our framework is designed to be robust against the output inconsistency and the performance variation of the members within the ensemble. To examine the effectiveness and the robustness of our method, we perform an extensive set of experiments on both GTA5 to Cityscapes and SYNTHIA to Cityscapes benchmarks to quantitatively inspect the improvements achievable by our method. We further provide detailed analyses to validate that our design choices are practical and beneficial. The experimental evidence validates that the proposed method indeed offer superior performance, robustness and flexibility in semantic segmentation based UDA tasks against contemporary baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 最近关于无监督域适应（UDA）的研究表明，端到端集成学习框架是 UDA 任务的一个令人信服的选择。然而，这些端到端集成学习方法通​​常缺乏灵活性，因为对集成的任何修改都需要重新训练其框架。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种灵活的集成蒸馏框架，用于执行基于语义分割的 UDA，允许集成中成员的任意组合，同时仍然保持其优越的性能。为了实现这种灵活性，我们的框架被设计为能够抵御集合内成员的输出不一致和性能变化。为了检验我们方法的有效性和稳健性，我们对 GTA5 to Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA to Cityscapes 基准进行了一系列广泛的实验，以定量检查我们的方法可实现的改进。我们进一步提供详细的分析来验证我们的设计选择是实用且有益的。实验证据证明，与当代基线方法相比，所提出的方法确实在基于语义分割的 UDA 任务中提供了卓越的性能、鲁棒性和灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种灵活的集成蒸馏框架，用于语义分割的无监督域适应任务，解决现有方法灵活性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端集成学习方法在无监督域适应中需重新训练整个框架以调整集成成员，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒的集成蒸馏框架，通过处理输出不一致性和性能波动，允许任意组合集成成员。
AI.result: 在GTA5到Cityscapes和SYNTHIA到Cityscapes基准测试中，方法在性能、鲁棒性和灵活性上优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过实验验证，在语义分割的无监督域适应任务中有效且具有实用价值。

To address this problem, we propose a flexible ensemble-distillation framework for performing semantic segmentation based UDA, allowing any arbitrary composition of the members in the ensemble while still maintaining its superior performance. title: Bayesian Deep Neural Networks for Supervised Learning of Single-View Depth
title_zh: 用于单视图深度监督学习的贝叶斯深度神经网络
abstract: Uncertainty quantification is essential for robotic perception, as overconfident or point estimators can lead to collisions and damages to the environment and the robot. In this paper, we evaluate scalable approaches to uncertainty quantification in single-view supervised depth learning, specifically MC dropout and deep ensembles. For MC dropout, in particular, we explore the effect of the dropout at different levels in the architecture. We show that adding dropout in all layers of the encoder brings better results than other variations found in the literature. This configuration performs similarly to deep ensembles with a much lower memory footprint, which is relevant forapplications. Finally, we explore the use of depth uncertainty for pseudo-RGBD ICP and demonstrate its potential to estimate accurate two-view relative motion with the real scale.
summary: Uncertainty quantification is essential for robotic perception, as overconfident or point estimators can lead to collisions and damages to the environment and the robot. In this paper, we evaluate scalable approaches to uncertainty quantification in single-view supervised depth learning, specifically MC dropout and deep ensembles. For MC dropout, in particular, we explore the effect of the dropout at different levels in the architecture. We show that adding dropout in all layers of the encoder brings better results than other variations found in the literature. This configuration performs similarly to deep ensembles with a much lower memory footprint, which is relevant forapplications. Finally, we explore the use of depth uncertainty for pseudo-RGBD ICP and demonstrate its potential to estimate accurate two-view relative motion with the real scale.
abstract_zh: 不确定性量化对于机器人感知至关重要，因为过度自信或点估计可能会导致环境和机器人发生碰撞和损坏。在本文中，我们评估了单视图监督深度学习中不确定性量化的可扩展方法，特别是 MC dropout 和深度集成。特别是对于 MC dropout，我们探索了架构中不同级别的 dropout 的影响。我们表明，在编码器的所有层中添加丢失比文献中发现的其他变体带来更好的结果。这种配置的性能与深度集成类似，但内存占用要低得多，这与应用程序相关。最后，我们探索了伪 RGBD ICP 的深度不确定性的使用，并展示了其在真实尺度下准确估计两视图相对运动的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了在单视角监督深度学习中用于不确定性量化的可扩展方法，特别是MC dropout和深度集成方法。
AI.motivation: 不确定性量化对机器人感知至关重要，过度自信或点估计可能导致碰撞和损害，因此需要更可靠的不确定性估计方法。
AI.method: 通过在编码器的不同层级应用MC dropout，发现所有编码层均使用dropout的配置优于文献中的其他变体，并与深度集成方法效果相当但内存占用更低。
AI.result: 该配置在内存效率上优于深度集成，且利用深度不确定性进行伪RGB-D ICP可准确估计两视角相对运动的真实尺度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于全编码层dropout的方法在不确定性量化上具有高效性，适用于机器人感知等实际应用。

title: Learning Heterogeneous Temporal Patterns of User Preference for Timely Recommendation
title_zh: 学习用户偏好的异构时间模式以进行及时推荐
abstract: Recommender systems have achieved great success in modeling user's preferences on items and predicting the next item the user would consume. Recently, there have been many efforts to utilize time information of users' interactions with items to capture inherent temporal patterns of user behaviors and offer timely recommendations at a given time. Existing studies regard the time information as a single type of feature and focus on how to associate it with user preferences on items. However, we argue they are insufficient for fully learning the time information because the temporal patterns of user preference are usually heterogeneous. A user's preference for a particular item may 1) increase periodically or 2) evolve over time under the influence of significant recent events, and each of these two kinds of temporal pattern appears with some unique characteristics. In this paper, we first define the unique characteristics of the two kinds of temporal pattern of user preference that should be considered in time-aware recommender systems. Then we propose a novel recommender system for timely recommendations, called TimelyRec, which jointly learns the heterogeneous temporal patterns of user preference considering all of the defined characteristics. In TimelyRec, a cascade of two encoders captures the temporal patterns of user preference using a proposed attention module for each encoder. Moreover, we introduce an evaluation scenario that evaluates the performance on predicting an interesting item and when to recommend the item simultaneously in top-K recommendation (i.e., item-timing recommendation). Our extensive experiments on a scenario for item recommendation and the proposed scenario for item-timing recommendation on real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of TimelyRec and the proposed attention modules.
summary: Recommender systems have achieved great success in modeling user's preferences on items and predicting the next item the user would consume. Recently, there have been many efforts to utilize time information of users' interactions with items to capture inherent temporal patterns of user behaviors and offer timely recommendations at a given time. Existing studies regard the time information as a single type of feature and focus on how to associate it with user preferences on items. However, we argue they are insufficient for fully learning the time information because the temporal patterns of user preference are usually heterogeneous. A user's preference for a particular item may 1) increase periodically or 2) evolve over time under the influence of significant recent events, and each of these two kinds of temporal pattern appears with some unique characteristics. In this paper, we first define the unique characteristics of the two kinds of temporal pattern of user preference that should be considered in time-aware recommender systems. Then we propose a novel recommender system for timely recommendations, called TimelyRec, which jointly learns the heterogeneous temporal patterns of user preference considering all of the defined characteristics. In TimelyRec, a cascade of two encoders captures the temporal patterns of user preference using a proposed attention module for each encoder. Moreover, we introduce an evaluation scenario that evaluates the performance on predicting an interesting item and when to recommend the item simultaneously in top-K recommendation (i.e., item-timing recommendation). Our extensive experiments on a scenario for item recommendation and the proposed scenario for item-timing recommendation on real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of TimelyRec and the proposed attention modules.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统在对用户对商品的偏好进行建模并预测用户将消费的下一个商品方面取得了巨大的成功。最近，人们做出了许多努力来利用用户与项目交互的时间信息来捕获用户行为的固有时间模式并在给定时间提供及时的推荐。现有研究将时间信息视为单一类型的特征，并重点关注如何将其与用户对项目的偏好相关联。然而，我们认为它们不足以充分学习时间信息，因为用户偏好的时间模式通常是异构的。用户对特定项目的偏好可能 1) 周期性增加或 2) 在近期重大事件的影响下随着时间的推移而演变，并且这两种时间模式中的每一种都呈现出一些独特的特征。在本文中，我们首先定义了时间感知推荐系统中应考虑的两种用户偏好时间模式的独特特征。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的及时推荐推荐系统，称为 TimelyRec，它考虑所有定义的特征，共同学习用户偏好的异构时间模式。在 TimelyRec 中，两个编码器的级联使用每个编码器建议的注意模块来捕获用户偏好的时间模式。此外，我们引入了一个评估场景，评估预测有趣项目的性能以及何时在 Top-K 推荐中同时推荐该项目（即项目时序推荐）。我们对项目推荐场景和在现实世界数据集上提出的项目时序推荐场景进行了广泛的实验，证明了 TimelyRec 和所提出的注意模块的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TimelyRec的推荐系统，通过联合学习用户偏好的异构时间模式（周期性变化和事件驱动变化），以实现更精准的实时推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将时间信息视为单一特征，无法充分捕捉用户偏好中周期性变化与事件驱动变化两种异构时间模式，导致推荐时效性不足。
AI.method: 设计包含两个编码器的级联结构，结合专用注意力模块分别建模周期性模式和事件驱动模式，并引入物品-时间联合评估场景验证效果。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，TimelyRec在物品推荐准确率和推荐时机预测任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 异构时间模式建模能显著提升推荐系统的时效性，所提出的注意力模块和评估框架为时间感知推荐提供了新思路。

title: Uncertainty-aware deep learning for robot touch: Application to Bayesian tactile servo control
title_zh: 机器人触摸的不确定性感知深度学习：在贝叶斯触觉伺服控制中的应用
abstract: This work investigates uncertainty-aware deep learning (DL) in tactile robotics based on a general framework introduced recently for robot vision. For a test scenario, we consider optical tactile sensing in combination with DL to estimate the edge pose as a feedback signal to servo around various 2D test objects. We demonstrate that uncertainty-aware DL can improve the pose estimation over deterministic DL methods. The system estimates the uncertainty associated with each prediction, which is used along with temporal coherency to improve the predictions via a Kalman filter, and hence improve the tactile servo control. The robot is able to robustly follow all of the presented contour shapes to reduce not only the error by a factor of two but also smooth the trajectory from the undesired noisy behaviour caused by previous deterministic networks. In our view, as the field of tactile robotics matures in its use of DL, the estimation of uncertainty will become a key component in the control of physically interactive tasks in complex environments.
summary: This work investigates uncertainty-aware deep learning (DL) in tactile robotics based on a general framework introduced recently for robot vision. For a test scenario, we consider optical tactile sensing in combination with DL to estimate the edge pose as a feedback signal to servo around various 2D test objects. We demonstrate that uncertainty-aware DL can improve the pose estimation over deterministic DL methods. The system estimates the uncertainty associated with each prediction, which is used along with temporal coherency to improve the predictions via a Kalman filter, and hence improve the tactile servo control. The robot is able to robustly follow all of the presented contour shapes to reduce not only the error by a factor of two but also smooth the trajectory from the undesired noisy behaviour caused by previous deterministic networks. In our view, as the field of tactile robotics matures in its use of DL, the estimation of uncertainty will become a key component in the control of physically interactive tasks in complex environments.
abstract_zh: 这项工作基于最近推出的机器人视觉通用框架，研究了触觉机器人中的不确定性感知深度学习 (DL)。对于测试场景，我们考虑将光学触觉传感与深度学习相结合，以估计边缘姿态作为反馈信号，以围绕各种 2D 测试对象进行伺服。我们证明，与确定性深度学习方法相比，不确定性感知深度学习可以改进姿态估计。该系统估计与每个预测相关的不确定性，与时间相干性一起使用，通过卡尔曼滤波器改进预测，从而改进触觉伺服控制。机器人能够稳健地遵循所有呈现的轮廓形状，不仅将误差减少两倍，而且还可以平滑轨迹，避免由先前的确定性网络引起的不良噪声行为。我们认为，随着触觉机器人领域在深度学习方面的成熟，不确定性的估计将成为复杂环境中物理交互任务控制的关键组成部分。

AI.tldr: 本文将不确定感知的深度学习应用于机器人触觉伺服控制，通过结合光学触觉传感与卡尔曼滤波提升对二维物体轮廓的跟踪能力。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性深度学习在触觉伺服中易受噪声干扰，难以保证复杂环境下的控制稳定性，需引入不确定性估计以增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于光学触觉传感与深度学习估计边缘姿态，通过卡尔曼滤波融合预测不确定性及时间一致性，优化触觉伺服控制策略。
AI.result: 实验表明系统误差降低50%，轨迹平滑性显著提升，机器人可稳健跟踪多种复杂轮廓形状。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性估计将成为触觉机器人控制的关键技术，为复杂物理交互任务提供更可靠的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文将不确定感知的深度学习应用于机器人触觉伺服控制，通过结合光学触觉传感与卡尔曼滤波提升对二维物体轮廓的跟踪能力。

search_text: Uncertainty-aware deep learning for robot touch: Application to Bayesian tactile servo control 机器人触摸的不确定性感知深度学习：在贝叶斯触觉伺服控制中的应用 This work investigates uncertainty-aware deep learning (DL) in tactile robotics based on a general framework introduced recently for robot vision. For a test scenario, we consider optical tactile sensing in combination with DL to estimate the edge pose as a feedback signal to servo around various 2D test objects. We demonstrate that uncertainty-aware DL can improve the pose estimation over deterministic DL methods. The system estimates the uncertainty associated with each prediction, which is used along with temporal coherency to improve the predictions via a Kalman filter, and hence improve the tactile servo control. The robot is able to robustly follow all of the presented contour shapes to reduce not only the error by a factor of two but also smooth the trajectory from the undesired noisy behaviour caused by previous deterministic networks. In our view, as the field of tactile robotics matures in its use of DL, the estimation of uncertainty will become a key component in the control of physically interactive tasks in complex environments. 这项工作基于最近推出的机器人视觉通用框架，研究了触觉机器人中的不确定性感知深度学习 (DL)。对于测试场景，我们考虑将光学触觉传感与深度学习相结合，以估计边缘姿态作为反馈信号，以围绕各种 2D 测试对象进行伺服。我们证明，与确定性深度学习方法相比，不确定性感知深度学习可以改进姿态估计。该系统估计与每个预测相关的不确定性，与时间相干性一起使用，通过卡尔曼滤波器改进预测，从而改进触觉伺服控制。机器人能够稳健地遵循所有呈现的轮廓形状，不仅将误差减少两倍，而且还可以平滑轨迹，避免由先前的确定性网络引起的不良噪声行为。我们认为，随着触觉机器人领域在深度学习方面的成熟，不确定性的估计将成为复杂环境中物理交互任务控制的关键组成部分。 本文将不确定感知的深度学习应用于机器人触觉伺服控制，通过结合光学触觉传感与卡尔曼滤波提升对二维物体轮廓的跟踪能力。 Manuel Floriano Vazquez,Nathan F. Lepora cs.RO

authors_text: Fabien Grzeskowiak,David Gonon,Daniel Dugas,Diego Paez-Granados,Jen Chung,Juan Nieto,Roland Siegwart,Aude Billard,Marie Babel,Julien Pettré
title: Crowd against the machine: A simulation-based benchmark tool to evaluate and compare robot capabilities to navigate a human crowd
title_zh: 人群对抗机器：基于模拟的基准工具，用于评估和比较机器人在人群中导航的能力
comment: ef:ICRA 2021 - IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, May 2021, Xian, China
comments: ef:ICRA 2021 - IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, May 2021, Xian, China
abstract: The evaluation of robot capabilities to navigate human crowds is essential to conceive new robots intended to operate in public spaces. This paper initiates the development of a benchmark tool to evaluate such capabilities; our long term vision is to provide the community with a simulation tool that generates virtual crowded environment to test robots, to establish standard scenarios and metrics to evaluate navigation techniques in terms of safety and efficiency, and thus, to install new methods to benchmarking robots' crowd navigation capabilities. This paper presents the architecture of the simulation tools, introduces first scenarios and evaluation metrics, as well as early results to demonstrate that our solution is relevant to be used as a benchmark tool.
summary: The evaluation of robot capabilities to navigate human crowds is essential to conceive new robots intended to operate in public spaces. This paper initiates the development of a benchmark tool to evaluate such capabilities; our long term vision is to provide the community with a simulation tool that generates virtual crowded environment to test robots, to establish standard scenarios and metrics to evaluate navigation techniques in terms of safety and efficiency, and thus, to install new methods to benchmarking robots' crowd navigation capabilities. This paper presents the architecture of the simulation tools, introduces first scenarios and evaluation metrics, as well as early results to demonstrate that our solution is relevant to be used as a benchmark tool.
abstract_zh: 评估机器人在人群中导航的能力对于构思在公共空间运行的新型机器人至关重要。本文启动了评估此类能力的基准工具的开发；我们的长期愿景是为社区提供一个模拟工具，生成虚拟拥挤环境来测试机器人，建立标准场景和指标来评估导航技术的安全性和效率，从而安装新方法来对机器人的人群导航能力进行基准测试。本文介绍了模拟工具的架构，介绍了第一个场景和评估指标，以及早期结果，以证明我们的解决方案适合用作基准工具。

AI.tldr: 开发基于模拟的基准工具，评估机器人在人群中的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 评估机器人导航能力对设计公共空间机器人至关重要，但缺乏标准化评估工具和场景，需建立统一基准。
AI.method: 构建模拟工具架构，设计初始场景与评估指标，并通过早期实验验证工具有效性。
AI.result: 早期实验结果验证了该工具作为机器人人群导航能力评估基准的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为机器人人群导航能力的标准化评估和新方法研究提供了基础。

title: Fine-grained Generalization Analysis of Vector-valued Learning
title_zh: 向量值学习的细粒度泛化分析
abstract: Many fundamental machine learning tasks can be formulated as a problem of learning with vector-valued functions, where we learn multiple scalar-valued functions together. Although there is some generalization analysis on different specific algorithms under the empirical risk minimization principle, a unifying analysis of vector-valued learning under a regularization framework is still lacking. In this paper, we initiate the generalization analysis of regularized vector-valued learning algorithms by presenting bounds with a mild dependency on the output dimension and a fast rate on the sample size. Our discussions relax the existing assumptions on the restrictive constraint of hypothesis spaces, smoothness of loss functions and low-noise condition. To understand the interaction between optimization and learning, we further use our results to derive the first generalization bounds for stochastic gradient descent with vector-valued functions. We apply our general results to multi-class classification and multi-label classification, which yield the first bounds with a logarithmic dependency on the output dimension for extreme multi-label classification with the Frobenius regularization. As a byproduct, we derive a Rademacher complexity bound for loss function classes defined in terms of a general strongly convex function.
summary: Many fundamental machine learning tasks can be formulated as a problem of learning with vector-valued functions, where we learn multiple scalar-valued functions together. Although there is some generalization analysis on different specific algorithms under the empirical risk minimization principle, a unifying analysis of vector-valued learning under a regularization framework is still lacking. In this paper, we initiate the generalization analysis of regularized vector-valued learning algorithms by presenting bounds with a mild dependency on the output dimension and a fast rate on the sample size. Our discussions relax the existing assumptions on the restrictive constraint of hypothesis spaces, smoothness of loss functions and low-noise condition. To understand the interaction between optimization and learning, we further use our results to derive the first generalization bounds for stochastic gradient descent with vector-valued functions. We apply our general results to multi-class classification and multi-label classification, which yield the first bounds with a logarithmic dependency on the output dimension for extreme multi-label classification with the Frobenius regularization. As a byproduct, we derive a Rademacher complexity bound for loss function classes defined in terms of a general strongly convex function.
abstract_zh: 许多基本的机器学习任务可以表述为向量值函数的学习问题，其中我们一起学习多个标量值函数。尽管在经验风险最小化原则下对不同的具体算法进行了一些泛化分析，但仍然缺乏在正则化框架下对向量值学习的统一分析。在本文中，我们通过提出对输出维度有轻微依赖性且对样本大小具有快速依赖性的边界来启动正则化向量值学习算法的泛化分析。我们的讨论放松了对假设空间的限制性约束、损失函数的平滑性和低噪声条件的现有假设。为了理解优化和学习之间的相互作用，我们进一步使用我们的结果来推导出带有向量值函数的随机梯度下降的第一个泛化界限。我们将一般结果应用于多类分类和多标签分类，这产生了对输出维度具有对数依赖性的第一个界限，用于使用 Frobenius 正则化进行极端多标签分类。作为副产品，我们导出了根据一般强凸函数定义的损失函数类的 Rademacher 复杂度界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究向量值学习的泛化分析，提出依赖输出维度较弱的界限并应用于多类分类等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏统一的向量值学习泛化分析框架，且存在对假设空间、损失函数等的严格限制。
AI.method: 在正则化框架下推导泛化界限，放松假设条件，并结合随机梯度下降分析优化与学习的交互。
AI.result: 获得输出维度的弱依赖界限及样本量快速率，首次应用于多标签分类并得到对数依赖结果，同时推导Rademacher复杂度界。
AI.conclusion: 填补了向量值学习统一分析的空白，提供了更灵活的理论条件，并扩展到实际机器学习任务中。

title: Spatial Privacy-aware VR streaming
title_zh: 空间隐私感知 VR 流媒体
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, submit to IEEE for possible publication. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.09779
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, submit to IEEE for possible publication. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.09779
abstract: Proactive tile-based virtual reality (VR) video streaming employs the current tracking data of a user to predict future requested tiles, then renders and delivers the predicted tiles before playback. Very recently, privacy protection in proactive VR video streaming starts to raise concerns. However, existing privacy protection may fail even with privacy-preserve federated learning. This is because when the future requested tiles can be predicted accurately, the user-behavior-related data can still be recovered from the predicted tiles. In this paper, we consider how to protect privacy even with accurate predictors and investigate the impact of privacy requirement on the quality of experience (QoE). To this end, we first add extra \textit{camouflaged} tile requests to the real tile requests and model the privacy requirement as the \textit{spatial degree of privacy} (sDoP). By ensuring sDoP, the real tile requests can be hidden and privacy can be protected. Then, we jointly optimize the durations for prediction, computing, and transmitting, aimed at maximizing the privacy-aware QoE given arbitrary predictor and configured resources. From the obtained optimal closed-form solution, we find that the impacts of sDoP on the QoE are two sides of the same coin. On the one side the increase of sDoP improves the capability of communication and computing hence improves QoE. On the other side it degrades the prediction performance hence degrades the QoE. The overall impact depends on which factor dominates the QoE. Simulation with two predictors on a real dataset verifies the analysis and shows that the overall impact of sDoP is to improve the QoE.
summary: Proactive tile-based virtual reality (VR) video streaming employs the current tracking data of a user to predict future requested tiles, then renders and delivers the predicted tiles before playback. Very recently, privacy protection in proactive VR video streaming starts to raise concerns. However, existing privacy protection may fail even with privacy-preserve federated learning. This is because when the future requested tiles can be predicted accurately, the user-behavior-related data can still be recovered from the predicted tiles. In this paper, we consider how to protect privacy even with accurate predictors and investigate the impact of privacy requirement on the quality of experience (QoE). To this end, we first add extra \textit{camouflaged} tile requests to the real tile requests and model the privacy requirement as the \textit{spatial degree of privacy} (sDoP). By ensuring sDoP, the real tile requests can be hidden and privacy can be protected. Then, we jointly optimize the durations for prediction, computing, and transmitting, aimed at maximizing the privacy-aware QoE given arbitrary predictor and configured resources. From the obtained optimal closed-form solution, we find that the impacts of sDoP on the QoE are two sides of the same coin. On the one side the increase of sDoP improves the capability of communication and computing hence improves QoE. On the other side it degrades the prediction performance hence degrades the QoE. The overall impact depends on which factor dominates the QoE. Simulation with two predictors on a real dataset verifies the analysis and shows that the overall impact of sDoP is to improve the QoE.
abstract_zh: 主动式基于图块的虚拟现实 (VR) 视频流利用用户当前的跟踪数据来预测未来请求的图块，然后在播放前渲染并传送预测的图块。最近，主动 VR 视频流中的隐私保护开始引起关注。然而，即使采用隐私保护联邦学习，现有的隐私保护也可能会失败。这是因为当可以准确地预测未来请求的图块时，仍然可以从预测的图块中恢复与用户行为相关的数据。在本文中，我们考虑如何在准确的预测因素下保护隐私，并研究隐私要求对体验质量 (QoE) 的影响。为此，我们首先向真实图块请求添加额外的\textit{伪装}图块请求，并将隐私要求建模为\textit{空间隐私度}（sDoP）。通过确保sDoP，可以隐藏真实的平铺请求并保护隐私。然后，我们联合优化预测、计算和传输的持续时间，旨在在给定任意预测器和配置资源的情况下最大化隐私感知 QoE。从获得的最优封闭式解中，我们发现 sDoP 对 QoE 的影响是同一枚硬币的两个方面。一方面，sDoP 的增加提高了通信和计算能力，从而提高了 QoE。另一方面，它会降低预测性能，从而降低 QoE。总体影响取决于主导 QoE 的因素。在真实数据集上使用两个预测变量进行的模拟验证了分析结果，并表明 sDoP 的总体影响是提高 QoE。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在准确预测用户请求的前提下保护VR流媒体中的空间隐私，并分析隐私需求对服务质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法在准确预测用户请求时仍可能泄露用户行为数据，需设计新的隐私保护机制以平衡隐私与服务质量。
AI.method: 通过添加伪装的瓦片请求隐藏真实请求，定义空间隐私度(sDoP)指标，并联合优化预测、计算和传输时长以最大化隐私感知服务质量。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，sDoP的增加通过提升通信与计算能力改善QoE，但会降低预测性能，总体影响取决于主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 隐私保护与服务质量存在权衡，合理配置sDoP可实现二者的协同优化。

title: Using Adaptive Gradient for Texture Learning in Single-View 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 在单视图 3D 重建中使用自适应梯度进行纹理学习
abstract: Recently, learning-based approaches for 3D model reconstruction have attracted attention owing to its modern applications such as Extended Reality(XR), robotics and self-driving cars. Several approaches presented good performance on reconstructing 3D shapes by learning solely from images, i.e., without using 3D models in training. Challenges, however, remain in texture generation due to the gap between 2D and 3D modals. In previous work, the grid sampling mechanism from Spatial Transformer Networks was adopted to sample color from an input image to formulate texture. Despite its success, the existing framework has limitations on searching scope in sampling, resulting in flaws in generated texture and consequentially on rendered 3D models. In this paper, to solve that issue, we present a novel sampling algorithm by optimizing the gradient of predicted coordinates based on the variance on the sampling image. Taking into account the semantics of the image, we adopt Frechet Inception Distance (FID) to form a loss function in learning, which helps bridging the gap between rendered images and input images. As a result, we greatly improve generated texture. Furthermore, to optimize 3D shape reconstruction and to accelerate convergence at training, we adopt part segmentation and template learning in our model. Without any 3D supervision in learning, and with only a collection of single-view 2D images, the shape and texture learned by our model outperform those from previous work. We demonstrate the performance with experimental results on a publically available dataset.
summary: Recently, learning-based approaches for 3D model reconstruction have attracted attention owing to its modern applications such as Extended Reality(XR), robotics and self-driving cars. Several approaches presented good performance on reconstructing 3D shapes by learning solely from images, i.e., without using 3D models in training. Challenges, however, remain in texture generation due to the gap between 2D and 3D modals. In previous work, the grid sampling mechanism from Spatial Transformer Networks was adopted to sample color from an input image to formulate texture. Despite its success, the existing framework has limitations on searching scope in sampling, resulting in flaws in generated texture and consequentially on rendered 3D models. In this paper, to solve that issue, we present a novel sampling algorithm by optimizing the gradient of predicted coordinates based on the variance on the sampling image. Taking into account the semantics of the image, we adopt Frechet Inception Distance (FID) to form a loss function in learning, which helps bridging the gap between rendered images and input images. As a result, we greatly improve generated texture. Furthermore, to optimize 3D shape reconstruction and to accelerate convergence at training, we adopt part segmentation and template learning in our model. Without any 3D supervision in learning, and with only a collection of single-view 2D images, the shape and texture learned by our model outperform those from previous work. We demonstrate the performance with experimental results on a publically available dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于学习的 3D 模型重建方法因其现代应用（例如扩展现实（XR）、机器人和自动驾驶汽车）而引起了人们的关注。几种方法通过仅从图像中学习（即在训练中不使用 3D 模型）来重建 3D 形状，从而表现出良好的性能。然而，由于 2D 和 3D 模态之间的差距，纹理生成仍然存在挑战。在之前的工作中，采用了 Spatial Transformer Networks 的网格采样机制从输入图像中采样颜色以制定纹理。尽管取得了成功，但现有框架在采样搜索范围方面存在局限性，导致生成的纹理存在缺陷，进而影响渲染的 3D 模型。在本文中，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的采样算法，根据采样图像的方差优化预测坐标的梯度。考虑到图像的语义，我们在学习中采用Frechet Inception Distance（FID）形成损失函数，这有助于弥合渲染图像和输入图像之间的差距。结果，我们极大地改善了生成的纹理。此外，为了优化 3D 形状重建并加速训练收敛，我们在模型中采用了部分分割和模板学习。在学习过程中没有任何 3D 监督，并且仅使用单视图 2D 图像的集合，我们的模型学习到的形状和纹理优于之前的工作。我们通过公开数据集上的实验结果展示了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应梯度优化的纹理学习方法，解决单视角3D重建中纹理生成质量不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因采样范围限制导致纹理生成缺陷，需改进采样机制并缩小2D/3D模态差距。
AI.method: 设计自适应梯度采样算法优化坐标预测，结合FID损失函数与部分分割模板学习提升重建效果。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现优于现有方法的纹理质量，且无需3D监督仅依赖单视角2D图像训练。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升了单视角3D重建的纹理精度与形状还原度，验证了自适应梯度优化的有效性。

title: Probabilistic Safety-Assured Adaptive Merging Control for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶车辆的概率安全保证自适应并道控制
abstract: Autonomous vehicles face tremendous challenges while interacting with human drivers in different kinds of scenarios. Developing control methods with safety guarantees while performing interactions with uncertainty is an ongoing research goal. In this paper, we present a real-time safe control framework using bi-level optimization with Control Barrier Function (CBF) that enables an autonomous ego vehicle to interact with human-driven cars in ramp merging scenarios with a consistent safety guarantee. In order to explicitly address motion uncertainty, we propose a novel extension of control barrier functions to a probabilistic setting with provable chance-constrained safety and analyze the feasibility of our control design. The formulated bi-level optimization framework entails first choosing the ego vehicle's optimal driving style in terms of safety and primary objective, and then minimally modifying a nominal controller in the context of quadratic programming subject to the probabilistic safety constraints. This allows for adaptation to different driving strategies with a formally provable feasibility guarantee for the ego vehicle's safe controller. Experimental results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
summary: Autonomous vehicles face tremendous challenges while interacting with human drivers in different kinds of scenarios. Developing control methods with safety guarantees while performing interactions with uncertainty is an ongoing research goal. In this paper, we present a real-time safe control framework using bi-level optimization with Control Barrier Function (CBF) that enables an autonomous ego vehicle to interact with human-driven cars in ramp merging scenarios with a consistent safety guarantee. In order to explicitly address motion uncertainty, we propose a novel extension of control barrier functions to a probabilistic setting with provable chance-constrained safety and analyze the feasibility of our control design. The formulated bi-level optimization framework entails first choosing the ego vehicle's optimal driving style in terms of safety and primary objective, and then minimally modifying a nominal controller in the context of quadratic programming subject to the probabilistic safety constraints. This allows for adaptation to different driving strategies with a formally provable feasibility guarantee for the ego vehicle's safe controller. Experimental results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车在不同场景下与人类驾驶员交互时面临着巨大的挑战。开发具有安全保证的控制方法，同时执行与不确定性的交互是一个持续的研究目标。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用双层优化和控制屏障功能（CBF）的实时安全控制框架，使自主车辆能够在坡道合并场景中与人类驾驶的汽车交互，并提供一致的安全保证。为了明确解决运动不确定性，我们提出了一种将控制障碍函数扩展到具有可证明机会约束安全性的概率设置的新颖扩展，并分析了我们控制设计的可行性。制定的双层优化框架需要首先在安全性和主要目标方面选择自我车辆的最佳驾驶方式，然后在受概率安全约束的二次规划背景下最小程度地修改标称控制器。这允许适应不同的驾驶策略，并为自我车辆的安全控制器提供正式证明的可行性保证。提供实验结果来证明我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率安全约束的双层优化控制框架，用于自动驾驶车辆在匝道合并场景中的安全交互控制。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在与人类驾驶员交互时面临不确定性挑战，现有方法难以在保证安全的同时适应不同驾驶策略。
AI.method: 通过扩展控制屏障函数（CBF）至概率场景，构建包含安全约束的双层优化框架，结合二次规划实现对名义控制器的最小化修正。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在不同驾驶策略下均能提供形式化安全保证，有效提升了自动驾驶车辆的适应性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的概率安全约束控制框架为自动驾驶车辆在复杂交互场景中的安全控制提供了理论保障与实用解决方案。

search_text: Probabilistic Safety-Assured Adaptive Merging Control for Autonomous Vehicles 自动驾驶车辆的概率安全保证自适应并道控制 Autonomous vehicles face tremendous challenges while interacting with human drivers in different kinds of scenarios. Developing control methods with safety guarantees while performing interactions with uncertainty is an ongoing research goal. In this paper, we present a real-time safe control framework using bi-level optimization with Control Barrier Function (CBF) that enables an autonomous ego vehicle to interact with human-driven cars in ramp merging scenarios with a consistent safety guarantee. In order to explicitly address motion uncertainty, we propose a novel extension of control barrier functions to a probabilistic setting with provable chance-constrained safety and analyze the feasibility of our control design. The formulated bi-level optimization framework entails first choosing the ego vehicle's optimal driving style in terms of safety and primary objective, and then minimally modifying a nominal controller in the context of quadratic programming subject to the probabilistic safety constraints. This allows for adaptation to different driving strategies with a formally provable feasibility guarantee for the ego vehicle's safe controller. Experimental results are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach. 自动驾驶汽车在不同场景下与人类驾驶员交互时面临着巨大的挑战。开发具有安全保证的控制方法，同时执行与不确定性的交互是一个持续的研究目标。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用双层优化和控制屏障功能（CBF）的实时安全控制框架，使自主车辆能够在坡道合并场景中与人类驾驶的汽车交互，并提供一致的安全保证。为了明确解决运动不确定性，我们提出了一种将控制障碍函数扩展到具有可证明机会约束安全性的概率设置的新颖扩展，并分析了我们控制设计的可行性。制定的双层优化框架需要首先在安全性和主要目标方面选择自我车辆的最佳驾驶方式，然后在受概率安全约束的二次规划背景下最小程度地修改标称控制器。这允许适应不同的驾驶策略，并为自我车辆的安全控制器提供正式证明的可行性保证。提供实验结果来证明我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于概率安全约束的双层优化控制框架，用于自动驾驶车辆在匝道合并场景中的安全交互控制。 Yiwei Lyu,Wenhao Luo,John M. Dolan cs.RO

title: Radar-based Automotive Localization using Landmarks in a Multimodal Sensor Graph-based Approach
title_zh: 在基于多模态传感器图的方法中使用地标进行基于雷达的汽车定位
abstract: Highly automated driving functions currently often rely on a-priori knowledge from maps for planning and prediction in complex scenarios like cities. This makes map-relative localization an essential skill. In this paper, we address the problem of localization with automotive-grade radars, using a real-time graph-based SLAM approach. The system uses landmarks and odometry information as an abstraction layer. This way, besides radars, all kind of different sensor modalities including cameras and lidars can contribute. A single, semantic landmark map is used and maintained for all sensors. We implemented our approach using C++ and thoroughly tested it on data obtained with our test vehicles, comprising cars and trucks. Test scenarios include inner cities and industrial areas like container terminals. The experiments presented in this paper suggest that the approach is able to provide a precise and stable pose in structured environments, using radar data alone. The fusion of additional sensor information from cameras or lidars further boost performance, providing reliable semantic information needed for automated mapping.
summary: Highly automated driving functions currently often rely on a-priori knowledge from maps for planning and prediction in complex scenarios like cities. This makes map-relative localization an essential skill. In this paper, we address the problem of localization with automotive-grade radars, using a real-time graph-based SLAM approach. The system uses landmarks and odometry information as an abstraction layer. This way, besides radars, all kind of different sensor modalities including cameras and lidars can contribute. A single, semantic landmark map is used and maintained for all sensors. We implemented our approach using C++ and thoroughly tested it on data obtained with our test vehicles, comprising cars and trucks. Test scenarios include inner cities and industrial areas like container terminals. The experiments presented in this paper suggest that the approach is able to provide a precise and stable pose in structured environments, using radar data alone. The fusion of additional sensor information from cameras or lidars further boost performance, providing reliable semantic information needed for automated mapping.
abstract_zh: 目前，高度自动化的驾驶功能通常依赖于地图中的先验知识来在城市等复杂场景中进行规划和预测。这使得地图相对定位成为一项基本技能。在本文中，我们使用基于实时图的 SLAM 方法解决了汽车级雷达的定位问题。该系统使用地标和里程计信息作为抽象层。这样，除了雷达之外，包括摄像头和激光雷达在内的各种不同的传感器模式都可以做出贡献。所有传感器都使用并维护一个单一的语义地标地图。我们使用 C++ 实现了我们的方法，并根据我们的测试车辆（包括汽车和卡车）获得的数据对其进行了彻底测试。测试场景包括市中心和集装箱码头等工业区。本文提出的实验表明，该方法能够仅使用雷达数据在结构化环境中提供精确且稳定的姿态。来自摄像机或激光雷达的附加传感器信息的融合进一步提高了性能，提供了自动映射所需的可靠语义信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于雷达和多模态传感器融合的实时图SLAM方法，实现汽车在复杂环境中的高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需依赖地图先验信息，但实际场景中地图可能不完整或过时，需开发不依赖先验地图的鲁棒定位方法。
AI.method: 构建统一语义地标地图，通过实时图SLAM融合雷达、相机和激光雷达数据，利用里程计信息和多传感器模态协同定位。
AI.result: 实验表明仅雷达数据即可在结构化环境中实现稳定定位，融合视觉/激光雷达数据后定位精度和语义可靠性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 多模态传感器融合的图SLAM方法有效提升了复杂场景下汽车定位的精度与鲁棒性，为自动驾驶提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Wang Luo,Tianzhu Zhang,Wenfei Yang,Jingen Liu,Tao Mei,Feng Wu,Yongdong Zhang
title: Action Unit Memory Network for Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization
title_zh: 用于弱监督时间动作定位的动作单元记忆网络
abstract: Weakly supervised temporal action localization aims to detect and localize actions in untrimmed videos with only video-level labels during training. However, without frame-level annotations, it is challenging to achieve localization completeness and relieve background interference. In this paper, we present an Action Unit Memory Network (AUMN) for weakly supervised temporal action localization, which can mitigate the above two challenges by learning an action unit memory bank. In the proposed AUMN, two attention modules are designed to update the memory bank adaptively and learn action units specific classifiers. Furthermore, three effective mechanisms (diversity, homogeneity and sparsity) are designed to guide the updating of the memory network. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explicitly model the action units with a memory network. Extensive experimental results on two standard benchmarks (THUMOS14 and ActivityNet) demonstrate that our AUMN performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, the average mAP of IoU thresholds from 0.1 to 0.5 on the THUMOS14 dataset is significantly improved from 47.0% to 52.1%.
summary: Weakly supervised temporal action localization aims to detect and localize actions in untrimmed videos with only video-level labels during training. However, without frame-level annotations, it is challenging to achieve localization completeness and relieve background interference. In this paper, we present an Action Unit Memory Network (AUMN) for weakly supervised temporal action localization, which can mitigate the above two challenges by learning an action unit memory bank. In the proposed AUMN, two attention modules are designed to update the memory bank adaptively and learn action units specific classifiers. Furthermore, three effective mechanisms (diversity, homogeneity and sparsity) are designed to guide the updating of the memory network. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explicitly model the action units with a memory network. Extensive experimental results on two standard benchmarks (THUMOS14 and ActivityNet) demonstrate that our AUMN performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, the average mAP of IoU thresholds from 0.1 to 0.5 on the THUMOS14 dataset is significantly improved from 47.0% to 52.1%.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作定位旨在在训练期间仅使用视频级标签来检测和定位未修剪视频中的动作。然而，如果没有帧级注释，实现定位完整性和减轻背景干扰是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于弱监督时间动作定位的动作单元记忆网络（AUMN），它可以通过学习动作单元记忆库来缓解上述两个挑战。在提出的 AUMN 中，设计了两个注意力模块来自适应更新记忆库并学习动作单元特定的分类器。此外，还设计了三种有效机制（多样性、同质性和稀疏性）来指导记忆网络的更新。据我们所知，这是第一个使用记忆网络对动作单元进行显式建模的工作。两个标准基准（THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet）的广泛实验结果表明，我们的 AUMN 的性能优于最先进的方法。具体来说，THUMOS14数据集上IoU阈值从0.1到0.5的平均mAP从47.0%显着提高到52.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督时序动作定位方法，通过构建动作单元记忆网络（AUMN）解决无帧级标注下的定位完整性与背景干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法在缺乏帧级标注时难以实现完整定位并抑制背景干扰，需设计新的网络结构与机制提升性能。
AI.method: 设计包含两个注意力模块的AUMN，通过动态更新记忆库学习动作单元分类器，并引入多样性、一致性与稀疏性机制指导记忆网络更新。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14数据集上，IoU阈值0.1-0.5的平均mAP从47.0%提升至52.1%，在ActivityNet上也优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AUMN通过显式建模动作单元记忆网络，有效缓解弱监督下的定位挑战，取得当前最优性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督时序动作定位方法，通过构建动作单元记忆网络（AUMN）解决无帧级标注下的定位完整性与背景干扰问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有弱监督方法在缺乏帧级标注时难以实现完整定位并抑制背景干扰，需设计新的网络结构与机制提升性能。

ai_content.result: 在THUMOS14数据集上，IoU阈值0.1-0.5的平均mAP从47.0%提升至52.1%，在ActivityNet上也优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: AUMN通过显式建模动作单元记忆网络，有效缓解弱监督下的定位挑战，取得当前最优性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督时序动作定位方法，通过构建动作单元记忆网络（AUMN）解决无帧级标注下的定位完整性与背景干扰问题。
motivation: 现有弱监督方法在缺乏帧级标注时难以实现完整定位并抑制背景干扰，需设计新的网络结构与机制提升性能。

search_text: Action Unit Memory Network for Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization 用于弱监督时间动作定位的动作单元记忆网络 Weakly supervised temporal action localization aims to detect and localize actions in untrimmed videos with only video-level labels during training. However, without frame-level annotations, it is challenging to achieve localization completeness and relieve background interference. In this paper, we present an Action Unit Memory Network (AUMN) for weakly supervised temporal action localization, which can mitigate the above two challenges by learning an action unit memory bank. In the proposed AUMN, two attention modules are designed to update the memory bank adaptively and learn action units specific classifiers. Furthermore, three effective mechanisms (diversity, homogeneity and sparsity) are designed to guide the updating of the memory network. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explicitly model the action units with a memory network. Extensive experimental results on two standard benchmarks (THUMOS14 and ActivityNet) demonstrate that our AUMN performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, the average mAP of IoU thresholds from 0.1 to 0.5 on the THUMOS14 dataset is significantly improved from 47.0% to 52.1%. 弱监督时间动作定位旨在在训练期间仅使用视频级标签来检测和定位未修剪视频中的动作。然而，如果没有帧级注释，实现定位完整性和减轻背景干扰是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于弱监督时间动作定位的动作单元记忆网络（AUMN），它可以通过学习动作单元记忆库来缓解上述两个挑战。在提出的 AUMN 中，设计了两个注意力模块来自适应更新记忆库并学习动作单元特定的分类器。此外，还设计了三种有效机制（多样性、同质性和稀疏性）来指导记忆网络的更新。据我们所知，这是第一个使用记忆网络对动作单元进行显式建模的工作。两个标准基准（THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet）的广泛实验结果表明，我们的 AUMN 的性能优于最先进的方法。具体来说，THUMOS14数据集上IoU阈值从0.1到0.5的平均mAP从47.0%显着提高到52.1%。 本文提出一种弱监督时序动作定位方法，通过构建动作单元记忆网络（AUMN）解决无帧级标注下的定位完整性与背景干扰问题。 Wang Luo,Tianzhu Zhang,Wenfei Yang,Jingen Liu,Tao Mei,Feng Wu,Yongdong Zhang cs.CV

title: Actor-centered Representations for Action Localization in Streaming Videos
title_zh: 流媒体视频中以演员为中心的动作本地化表示
abstract: Event perception tasks such as recognizing and localizing actions in streaming videos are essential for scaling to real-world application contexts. We tackle the problem of learning actor-centered representations through the notion of continual hierarchical predictive learning to localize actions in streaming videos without the need for training labels and outlines for the objects in the video. We propose a framework driven by the notion of hierarchical predictive learning to construct actor-centered features by attention-based contextualization. The key idea is that predictable features or objects do not attract attention and hence do not contribute to the action of interest. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that the approach can learn robust representations for localizing actions using only one epoch of training, i.e., a single pass through the streaming video. We show that the proposed approach outperforms unsupervised and weakly supervised baselines while offering competitive performance to fully supervised approaches. Additionally, we extend the model to multi-actor settings to recognize group activities while localizing the multiple, plausible actors. We also show that it generalizes to out-of-domain data with limited performance degradation.
summary: Event perception tasks such as recognizing and localizing actions in streaming videos are essential for scaling to real-world application contexts. We tackle the problem of learning actor-centered representations through the notion of continual hierarchical predictive learning to localize actions in streaming videos without the need for training labels and outlines for the objects in the video. We propose a framework driven by the notion of hierarchical predictive learning to construct actor-centered features by attention-based contextualization. The key idea is that predictable features or objects do not attract attention and hence do not contribute to the action of interest. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that the approach can learn robust representations for localizing actions using only one epoch of training, i.e., a single pass through the streaming video. We show that the proposed approach outperforms unsupervised and weakly supervised baselines while offering competitive performance to fully supervised approaches. Additionally, we extend the model to multi-actor settings to recognize group activities while localizing the multiple, plausible actors. We also show that it generalizes to out-of-domain data with limited performance degradation.
abstract_zh: 事件感知任务（例如识别和本地化流视频中的动作）对于扩展到现实世界的应用程序环境至关重要。我们通过持续分层预测学习的概念来解决学习以演员为中心的表示的问题，以定位流视频中的动作，而不需要训练视频中对象的标签和轮廓。我们提出了一个由分层预测学习概念驱动的框架，通过基于注意力的情境化构建以参与者为中心的特征。关键思想是可预测的特征或物体不会引起注意，因此不会对感兴趣的行为做出贡献。对三个基准数据集的实验表明，该方法可以仅使用一个训练周期（即一次通过流视频）来学习用于本地化动作的鲁棒表示。我们表明，所提出的方法优于无监督和弱监督基线，同时为完全监督方法提供了有竞争力的性能。此外，我们将模型扩展到多参与者设置，以识别群体活动，同时定位多个看似合理的参与者。我们还表明，它可以推广到域外数据，并且性能下降有限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需物体轮廓和训练标签的流媒体视频动作定位方法，通过以演员为中心的分层预测学习框架实现动作定位。
AI.motivation: 现有动作定位方法依赖标注数据和物体轮廓，难以适应真实场景中动态流媒体视频的实时处理需求。
AI.method: 基于分层预测学习框架，利用注意力机制构建演员中心特征，通过预测性特征筛选机制忽略可预测内容，聚焦动作关键区域。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上以单次训练周期实现优于无监督/弱监督方法的性能，接近全监督水平，且支持多演员群体活动识别与领域外数据泛化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无监督条件下通过预测性学习获得鲁棒动作表征的可行性，为流媒体视频分析提供了高效可扩展的解决方案。

title: Locality Constrained Analysis Dictionary Learning via K-SVD Algorithm
title_zh: 通过 K-SVD 算法进行局部约束分析字典学习
abstract: Recent years, analysis dictionary learning (ADL) and its applications for classification have been well developed, due to its flexible projective ability and low classification complexity. With the learned analysis dictionary, test samples can be transformed into a sparse subspace for classification efficiently. However, the underling locality of sample data has rarely been explored in analysis dictionary to enhance the discriminative capability of the classifier. In this paper, we propose a novel locality constrained analysis dictionary learning model with a synthesis K-SVD algorithm (SK-LADL). It considers the intrinsic geometric properties by imposing graph regularization to uncover the geometric structure for the image data. Through the learned analysis dictionary, we transform the image to a new and compact space where the manifold assumption can be further guaranteed. thus, the local geometrical structure of images can be preserved in sparse representation coefficients. Moreover, the SK-LADL model is iteratively solved by the synthesis K-SVD and gradient technique. Experimental results on image classification validate the performance superiority of our SK-LADL model.
summary: Recent years, analysis dictionary learning (ADL) and its applications for classification have been well developed, due to its flexible projective ability and low classification complexity. With the learned analysis dictionary, test samples can be transformed into a sparse subspace for classification efficiently. However, the underling locality of sample data has rarely been explored in analysis dictionary to enhance the discriminative capability of the classifier. In this paper, we propose a novel locality constrained analysis dictionary learning model with a synthesis K-SVD algorithm (SK-LADL). It considers the intrinsic geometric properties by imposing graph regularization to uncover the geometric structure for the image data. Through the learned analysis dictionary, we transform the image to a new and compact space where the manifold assumption can be further guaranteed. thus, the local geometrical structure of images can be preserved in sparse representation coefficients. Moreover, the SK-LADL model is iteratively solved by the synthesis K-SVD and gradient technique. Experimental results on image classification validate the performance superiority of our SK-LADL model.
abstract_zh: 近年来，分析字典学习（ADL）及其分类应用由于其灵活的投影能力和较低的分类复杂度而得到了很好的发展。利用学习到的分析字典，可以将测试样本转换为稀疏子空间，以便有效地进行分类。然而，在分析字典中很少探索样本数据的底层局部性来增强分类器的判别能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有综合 K-SVD 算法（SK-LADL）的新颖的局部约束分析字典学习模型。它通过施加图正则化来揭示图像数据的几何结构，从而考虑内在的几何特性。通过学习到的分析字典，我们将图像转换到一个新的紧凑空间，在该空间中可以进一步保证流形假设。因此，图像的局部几何结构可以保留在稀疏表示系数中。此外，SK-LADL模型通过综合K-SVD和梯度技术迭代求解。图像分类的实验结果验证了我们的 SK-LADL 模型的性能优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合局部约束的分析字典学习方法SK-LADL，通过K-SVD算法提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分析字典学习方法未充分挖掘样本数据的局部几何特性，导致分类判别能力不足。
AI.method: 设计SK-LADL模型，融合图正则化与合成K-SVD算法，通过迭代优化学习保留图像局部结构的分析字典。
AI.result: 在图像分类实验中，SK-LADL模型相较现有方法展现出更优的分类准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 局部约束分析字典学习能有效保持数据几何特性，为图像分类提供更具判别性的稀疏表示空间。

authors_text: Jianfei Chen,Lianmin Zheng,Zhewei Yao,Dequan Wang,Ion Stoica,Michael W. Mahoney,Joseph E. Gonzalez
title: ActNN: Reducing Training Memory Footprint via 2-Bit Activation Compressed Training
title_zh: ActNN：通过 2 位激活压缩训练减少训练内存占用
abstract: The increasing size of neural network models has been critical for improvements in their accuracy, but device memory is not growing at the same rate. This creates fundamental challenges for training neural networks within limited memory environments. In this work, we propose ActNN, a memory-efficient training framework that stores randomly quantized activations for back propagation. We prove the convergence of ActNN for general network architectures, and we characterize the impact of quantization on the convergence via an exact expression for the gradient variance. Using our theory, we propose novel mixed-precision quantization strategies that exploit the activation's heterogeneity across feature dimensions, samples, and layers. These techniques can be readily applied to existing dynamic graph frameworks, such as PyTorch, simply by substituting the layers. We evaluate ActNN on mainstream computer vision models for classification, detection, and segmentation tasks. On all these tasks, ActNN compresses the activation to 2 bits on average, with negligible accuracy loss. ActNN reduces the memory footprint of the activation by 12x, and it enables training with a 6.6x to 14x larger batch size.
summary: The increasing size of neural network models has been critical for improvements in their accuracy, but device memory is not growing at the same rate. This creates fundamental challenges for training neural networks within limited memory environments. In this work, we propose ActNN, a memory-efficient training framework that stores randomly quantized activations for back propagation. We prove the convergence of ActNN for general network architectures, and we characterize the impact of quantization on the convergence via an exact expression for the gradient variance. Using our theory, we propose novel mixed-precision quantization strategies that exploit the activation's heterogeneity across feature dimensions, samples, and layers. These techniques can be readily applied to existing dynamic graph frameworks, such as PyTorch, simply by substituting the layers. We evaluate ActNN on mainstream computer vision models for classification, detection, and segmentation tasks. On all these tasks, ActNN compresses the activation to 2 bits on average, with negligible accuracy loss. ActNN reduces the memory footprint of the activation by 12x, and it enables training with a 6.6x to 14x larger batch size.
abstract_zh: 神经网络模型规模的不断增加对于提高其准确性至关重要，但设备内存却没有以同样的速度增长。这给在有限的内存环境中训练神经网络带来了根本性的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ActNN，这是一种内存高效的训练框架，可存储用于反向传播的随机量化激活。我们证明了 ActNN 对于一般网络架构的收敛性，并通过梯度方差的精确表达式来表征量化对收敛的影响。利用我们的理论，我们提出了新颖的混合精度量化策略，该策略利用了跨特征维度、样本和层的激活的异质性。只需替换层，这些技术就可以轻松应用于现有的动态图框架，例如 PyTorch。我们在主流计算机视觉模型上评估 ActNN 的分类、检测和分割任务。在所有这些任务中，ActNN 将激活平均压缩到 2 位，精度损失可以忽略不计。 ActNN 将激活的内存占用量减少了 12 倍，并且可以使用 6.6 倍到 14 倍大的批量大小进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ActNN框架，通过2位激活压缩训练减少神经网络训练时的内存占用。
AI.motivation: 神经网络模型规模增大导致训练内存需求激增，而设备内存增长速度无法匹配，亟需高效内存利用方法。
AI.method: 采用随机量化激活值进行反向传播，通过梯度方差精确表达式分析量化影响，并提出跨特征维度、样本和层的混合精度量化策略。
AI.result: 在主流视觉任务中实现激活值12倍内存压缩，平均2位量化下精度损失可忽略，支持6.6x至14x更大批量训练。
AI.conclusion: ActNN理论证明收敛性且兼容PyTorch等动态框架，为大模型训练提供高效内存解决方案。

authors_text: Tse-Wei Chen,Deyu Wang,Wei Tao,Dongchao Wen,Lingxiao Yin,Tadayuki Ito,Kinya Osa,Masami Kato
title: CASSOD-Net: Cascaded and Separable Structures of Dilated Convolution for Embedded Vision Systems and Applications
title_zh: CASSOD-Net：嵌入式视觉系统和应用的扩张卷积的级联和可分离结构
comment: Camera-ready version for CVPR 2021 workshop (Embedded Vision Workshop)
comments: Camera-ready version for CVPR 2021 workshop (Embedded Vision Workshop)
abstract: The field of view (FOV) of convolutional neural networks is highly related to the accuracy of inference. Dilated convolutions are known as an effective solution to the problems which require large FOVs. However, for general-purpose hardware or dedicated hardware, it usually takes extra time to handle dilated convolutions compared with standard convolutions. In this paper, we propose a network module, Cascaded and Separable Structure of Dilated (CASSOD) Convolution, and a special hardware system to handle the CASSOD networks efficiently. A CASSOD-Net includes multiple cascaded $2 \times 2$ dilated filters, which can be used to replace the traditional $3 \times 3$ dilated filters without decreasing the accuracy of inference. Two example applications, face detection and image segmentation, are tested with dilated convolutions and the proposed CASSOD modules. The new network for face detection achieves higher accuracy than the previous work with only 47% of filter weights in the dilated convolution layers of the context module. Moreover, the proposed hardware system can accelerate the computations of dilated convolutions, and it is 2.78 times faster than traditional hardware systems when the filter size is $3 \times 3$.
summary: The field of view (FOV) of convolutional neural networks is highly related to the accuracy of inference. Dilated convolutions are known as an effective solution to the problems which require large FOVs. However, for general-purpose hardware or dedicated hardware, it usually takes extra time to handle dilated convolutions compared with standard convolutions. In this paper, we propose a network module, Cascaded and Separable Structure of Dilated (CASSOD) Convolution, and a special hardware system to handle the CASSOD networks efficiently. A CASSOD-Net includes multiple cascaded $2 \times 2$ dilated filters, which can be used to replace the traditional $3 \times 3$ dilated filters without decreasing the accuracy of inference. Two example applications, face detection and image segmentation, are tested with dilated convolutions and the proposed CASSOD modules. The new network for face detection achieves higher accuracy than the previous work with only 47% of filter weights in the dilated convolution layers of the context module. Moreover, the proposed hardware system can accelerate the computations of dilated convolutions, and it is 2.78 times faster than traditional hardware systems when the filter size is $3 \times 3$.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络的视场角（FOV）与推理的准确性高度相关。扩张卷积被认为是解决需要大视场问题的有效方法。然而，对于通用硬件或专用硬件，与标准卷积相比，处理扩张卷积通常需要额外的时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种网络模块、级联可分离扩张结构（CASSOD）卷积，以及一种可以有效处理 CASSOD 网络的特殊硬件系统。 CASSOD-Net 包含多个级联的 $2 × 2$ 扩张滤波器，可用于替换传统的 $3 × 3$ 扩张滤波器，而不会降低推理的准确性。使用扩张卷积和提出的 CASSOD 模块测试了两个示例应用程序（人脸检测和图像分割）。用于人脸检测的新网络比之前的工作实现了更高的准确度，上下文模块的扩张卷积层中的滤波器权重仅为 47%。此外，所提出的硬件系统可以加速扩张卷积的计算，当滤波器尺寸为$3×3$时，比传统硬件系统快2.78倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CASSOD-Net网络模块及专用硬件系统，通过级联可分离的空洞卷积结构提升嵌入式视觉系统的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统空洞卷积在通用硬件上计算效率低，且大感受野需求与计算开销存在矛盾，需寻找兼顾精度与效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计级联2×2空洞卷积滤波器替代传统3×3结构，结合可分离卷积降低计算复杂度，并开发专用硬件加速空洞卷积计算。
AI.result: 人脸检测任务在仅使用47%空洞卷积权重时精度超越现有方法，专用硬件在3×3滤波器场景下计算速度提升2.78倍。
AI.conclusion: CASSOD-Net通过结构创新与硬件协同优化，在保持精度的同时显著提升空洞卷积的计算效率，适用于嵌入式视觉场景。

authors_text: Tse-Wei Chen,Wei Tao,Deyu Wang,Dongchao Wen,Kinya Osa,Masami Kato
title: Hardware Architecture of Embedded Inference Accelerator and Analysis of Algorithms for Depthwise and Large-Kernel Convolutions
title_zh: 嵌入式推理加速器硬件架构及深度大核卷积算法分析
comment: Camera-ready version for ECCV 2020 workshop (Embedded Vision Workshop)
comments: Camera-ready version for ECCV 2020 workshop (Embedded Vision Workshop)
abstract: In order to handle modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs) efficiently, a hardware architecture of CNN inference accelerator is proposed to handle depthwise convolutions and regular convolutions, which are both essential building blocks for embedded-computer-vision algorithms. Different from related works, the proposed architecture can support filter kernels with different sizes with high flexibility since it does not require extra costs for intra-kernel parallelism, and it can generate convolution results faster than the architecture of the related works. The experimental results show the importance of supporting depthwise convolutions and dilated convolutions with the proposed hardware architecture. In addition to depthwise convolutions with large-kernels, a new structure called DDC layer, which includes the combination of depthwise convolutions and dilated convolutions, is also analyzed in this paper. For face detection, the computational costs decrease by 30%, and the model size decreases by 20% when the DDC layers are applied to the network. For image classification, the accuracy is increased by 1% by simply replacing $3 \times 3$ filters with $5 \times 5$ filters in depthwise convolutions.
summary: In order to handle modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs) efficiently, a hardware architecture of CNN inference accelerator is proposed to handle depthwise convolutions and regular convolutions, which are both essential building blocks for embedded-computer-vision algorithms. Different from related works, the proposed architecture can support filter kernels with different sizes with high flexibility since it does not require extra costs for intra-kernel parallelism, and it can generate convolution results faster than the architecture of the related works. The experimental results show the importance of supporting depthwise convolutions and dilated convolutions with the proposed hardware architecture. In addition to depthwise convolutions with large-kernels, a new structure called DDC layer, which includes the combination of depthwise convolutions and dilated convolutions, is also analyzed in this paper. For face detection, the computational costs decrease by 30%, and the model size decreases by 20% when the DDC layers are applied to the network. For image classification, the accuracy is increased by 1% by simply replacing $3 \times 3$ filters with $5 \times 5$ filters in depthwise convolutions.
abstract_zh: 为了有效地处理现代卷积神经网络 (CNN)，提出了一种 CNN 推理加速器的硬件架构来处理深度卷积和常规卷积，这两者都是嵌入式计算机视觉算法的重要构建模块。与相关工作不同的是，所提出的架构可以支持不同大小的滤波器内核，具有很高的灵活性，因为它不需要内核内并行性的额外成本，并且它可以比相关工作的架构更快地生成卷积结果。实验结果表明了使用所提出的硬件架构支持深度卷积和扩张卷积的重要性。除了大核的深度卷积之外，本文还分析了一种称为 DDC 层的新结构，它包括深度卷积和扩张卷积的组合。对于人脸检测，当 DDC 层应用于网络时，计算成本降低了 30%，模型大小降低了 20%。对于图像分类，只需在深度卷积中将 $3 \times 3$ 过滤器替换为 $5 \times 5$ 过滤器，精度即可提高 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效处理深度卷积和大核卷积的嵌入式CNN推理加速器硬件架构，并分析相关算法优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件架构在处理不同尺寸滤波器内核时灵活性不足或需额外成本，而深度卷积和大核卷积是嵌入式视觉算法的核心模块，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计支持多尺寸滤波器的灵活硬件架构，无需内核级并行开销；提出结合深度卷积与空洞卷积的DDC层结构，优化计算流程。
AI.result: 人脸检测任务计算成本降30%、模型体积减20%；图像分类任务通过5×5替换3×3滤波器使准确率提升1%。
AI.conclusion: 所提架构有效支持灵活内核尺寸，DDC层在保持精度的同时显著提升能效比，适用于嵌入式视觉场景。
