search_text: Hardware Architecture of Embedded Inference Accelerator and Analysis of Algorithms for Depthwise and Large-Kernel Convolutions 嵌入式推理加速器硬件架构及深度大核卷积算法分析 In order to handle modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs) efficiently, a hardware architecture of CNN inference accelerator is proposed to handle depthwise convolutions and regular convolutions, which are both essential building blocks for embedded-computer-vision algorithms. Different from related works, the proposed architecture can support filter kernels with different sizes with high flexibility since it does not require extra costs for intra-kernel parallelism, and it can generate convolution results faster than the architecture of the related works. The experimental results show the importance of supporting depthwise convolutions and dilated convolutions with the proposed hardware architecture. In addition to depthwise convolutions with large-kernels, a new structure called DDC layer, which includes the combination of depthwise convolutions and dilated convolutions, is also analyzed in this paper. For face detection, the computational costs decrease by 30%, and the model size decreases by 20% when the DDC layers are applied to the network. For image classification, the accuracy is increased by 1% by simply replacing $3 \times 3$ filters with $5 \times 5$ filters in depthwise convolutions. 为了有效地处理现代卷积神经网络 (CNN)，提出了一种 CNN 推理加速器的硬件架构来处理深度卷积和常规卷积，这两者都是嵌入式计算机视觉算法的重要构建模块。与相关工作不同的是，所提出的架构可以支持不同大小的滤波器内核，具有很高的灵活性，因为它不需要内核内并行性的额外成本，并且它可以比相关工作的架构更快地生成卷积结果。实验结果表明了使用所提出的硬件架构支持深度卷积和扩张卷积的重要性。除了大核的深度卷积之外，本文还分析了一种称为 DDC 层的新结构，它包括深度卷积和扩张卷积的组合。对于人脸检测，当 DDC 层应用于网络时，计算成本降低了 30%，模型大小降低了 20%。对于图像分类，只需在深度卷积中将 $3 \times 3$ 过滤器替换为 $5 \times 5$ 过滤器，精度即可提高 1%。 本文提出一种高效处理深度卷积和大核卷积的嵌入式CNN推理加速器硬件架构，并分析相关算法优化方法。 Tse-Wei Chen,Wei Tao,Deyu Wang,Dongchao Wen,Kinya Osa,Masami Kato cs.CV,cs.AR,eess.IV

authors_text: Tse-Wei Chen,Motoki Yoshinaga,Hongxing Gao,Wei Tao,Dongchao Wen,Junjie Liu,Kinya Osa,Masami Kato
title: Condensation-Net: Memory-Efficient Network Architecture with Cross-Channel Pooling Layers and Virtual Feature Maps
title_zh: Condensation-Net：具有跨通道池层和虚拟特征映射的内存高效网络架构
comment: Camera-ready version for CVPR 2019 workshop (Embedded Vision Workshop)
comments: Camera-ready version for CVPR 2019 workshop (Embedded Vision Workshop)
abstract: "Lightweight convolutional neural networks" is an important research topic in the field of embedded vision. To implement image recognition tasks on a resource-limited hardware platform, it is necessary to reduce the memory size and the computational cost. The contribution of this paper is stated as follows. First, we propose an algorithm to process a specific network architecture (Condensation-Net) without increasing the maximum memory storage for feature maps. The architecture for virtual feature maps saves 26.5% of memory bandwidth by calculating the results of cross-channel pooling before storing the feature map into the memory. Second, we show that cross-channel pooling can improve the accuracy of object detection tasks, such as face detection, because it increases the number of filter weights. Compared with Tiny-YOLOv2, the improvement of accuracy is 2.0% for quantized networks and 1.5% for full-precision networks when the false-positive rate is 0.1. Last but not the least, the analysis results show that the overhead to support the cross-channel pooling with the proposed hardware architecture is negligible small. The extra memory cost to support Condensation-Net is 0.2% of the total size, and the extra gate count is only 1.0% of the total size.
summary: "Lightweight convolutional neural networks" is an important research topic in the field of embedded vision. To implement image recognition tasks on a resource-limited hardware platform, it is necessary to reduce the memory size and the computational cost. The contribution of this paper is stated as follows. First, we propose an algorithm to process a specific network architecture (Condensation-Net) without increasing the maximum memory storage for feature maps. The architecture for virtual feature maps saves 26.5% of memory bandwidth by calculating the results of cross-channel pooling before storing the feature map into the memory. Second, we show that cross-channel pooling can improve the accuracy of object detection tasks, such as face detection, because it increases the number of filter weights. Compared with Tiny-YOLOv2, the improvement of accuracy is 2.0% for quantized networks and 1.5% for full-precision networks when the false-positive rate is 0.1. Last but not the least, the analysis results show that the overhead to support the cross-channel pooling with the proposed hardware architecture is negligible small. The extra memory cost to support Condensation-Net is 0.2% of the total size, and the extra gate count is only 1.0% of the total size.
abstract_zh: “轻量级卷积神经网络”是嵌入式视觉领域的一个重要研究课题。为了在资源有限的硬件平台上实现图像识别任务，需要减少内存大小和计算成本。本文的贡献如下。首先，我们提出了一种在不增加特征图最大内存存储的情况下处理特定网络架构（Condensation-Net）的算法。虚拟特征图的架构通过在将特征图存储到内存之前计算跨通道池化的结果，节省了 26.5% 的内存带宽。其次，我们表明跨通道池可以提高对象检测任务（例如人脸检测）的准确性，因为它增加了滤波器权重的数量。与Tiny-YOLOv2相比，当误报率为0.1时，量化网络的准确率提高了2.0%，全精度网络的准确率提高了1.5%。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，分析结果表明，使用所提出的硬件架构支持跨通道池的开销可以忽略不计。支持Condensation-Net的额外内存成本是总大小的0.2%，额外的门数仅是总大小的1.0%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Condensation-Net，一种通过交叉通道池化层和虚拟特征图减少内存占用并提升检测精度的轻量级神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的嵌入式视觉硬件平台上实现图像识别任务，需要降低内存消耗和计算成本，同时保持检测精度。
AI.method: 设计虚拟特征图机制，在存储特征图前计算交叉通道池化结果以节省内存带宽；通过增加滤波器权重数量提升目标检测精度，并验证硬件架构对交叉通道池化的支持开销可忽略。
AI.result: 相比Tiny-YOLOv2，量化网络在0.1误检率下精度提升2.0%，全精度网络提升1.5%；内存带宽节省26.5%，额外内存成本仅占总量0.2%，门电路开销为1.0%。
AI.conclusion: Condensation-Net在降低内存占用和计算成本的同时提升了检测精度，且硬件开销极小，适用于嵌入式视觉系统。

authors_text: Hanbo Zhang,Deyu Yang,Han Wang,Binglei Zhao,Xuguang Lan,Jishiyu Ding,Nanning Zheng
title: REGRAD: A Large-Scale Relational Grasp Dataset for Safe and Object-Specific Robotic Grasping in Clutter
title_zh: REGRAD：大规模关系抓取数据集，用于在杂乱中安全且特定于对象的机器人抓取
abstract: Despite the impressive progress achieved in robotic grasping, robots are not skilled in sophisticated tasks (e.g. search and grasp a specified target in clutter). Such tasks involve not only grasping but the comprehensive perception of the world (e.g. the object relationships). Recently, encouraging results demonstrate that it is possible to understand high-level concepts by learning. However, such algorithms are usually data-intensive, and the lack of data severely limits their performance. In this paper, we present a new dataset named REGRAD for the learning of relationships among objects and grasps. We collect the annotations of object poses, segmentations, grasps, and relationships for the target-driven relational grasping tasks. Our dataset is collected in both forms of 2D images and 3D point clouds. Moreover, since all the data are generated automatically, it is free to import new objects for data generation. We also released a real-world validation dataset to evaluate the sim-to-real performance of models trained on REGRAD. Finally, we conducted a series of experiments, showing that the models trained on REGRAD could generalize well to the realistic scenarios, in terms of both relationship and grasp detection. Our dataset and code could be found at: https://github.com/poisonwine/REGRAD
summary: Despite the impressive progress achieved in robotic grasping, robots are not skilled in sophisticated tasks (e.g. search and grasp a specified target in clutter). Such tasks involve not only grasping but the comprehensive perception of the world (e.g. the object relationships). Recently, encouraging results demonstrate that it is possible to understand high-level concepts by learning. However, such algorithms are usually data-intensive, and the lack of data severely limits their performance. In this paper, we present a new dataset named REGRAD for the learning of relationships among objects and grasps. We collect the annotations of object poses, segmentations, grasps, and relationships for the target-driven relational grasping tasks. Our dataset is collected in both forms of 2D images and 3D point clouds. Moreover, since all the data are generated automatically, it is free to import new objects for data generation. We also released a real-world validation dataset to evaluate the sim-to-real performance of models trained on REGRAD. Finally, we conducted a series of experiments, showing that the models trained on REGRAD could generalize well to the realistic scenarios, in terms of both relationship and grasp detection. Our dataset and code could be found at: https://github.com/poisonwine/REGRAD
abstract_zh: 尽管机器人抓取取得了令人印象深刻的进步，但机器人并不擅长复杂的任务（例如在杂乱中搜索并抓取指定目标）。这些任务不仅涉及抓取，还涉及对世界的全面感知（例如物体关系）。最近，令人鼓舞的结果表明，通过学习理解高级概念是可能的。然而，此类算法通常是数据密集型的，数据的缺乏严重限制了它们的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 REGRAD 的新数据集，用于学习对象和抓取之间的关系。我们收集目标驱动的关系抓取任务的对象姿势、分割、抓取和关系的注释。我们的数据集以 2D 图像和 3D 点云两种形式收集。此外，由于所有数据都是自动生成的，因此可以自由地导入新对象来生成数据。我们还发布了一个真实世界的验证数据集，以评估在 REGRAD 上训练的模型的模拟与真实性能。最后，我们进行了一系列实验，表明在 REGRAD 上训练的模型在关系和抓取检测方面可以很好地推广到现实场景。我们的数据集和代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/poisonwine/REGRAD

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为REGRAD的大规模关系抓取数据集，用于解决机器人在杂乱环境中进行安全且特定物体抓取的复杂任务。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人抓取算法在处理需要理解物体关系的复杂任务时表现不足，且缺乏足够的数据支持高阶概念学习，限制了算法性能。
AI.method: 通过自动采集2D图像和3D点云数据，标注物体姿态、分割、抓取点及物体关系，构建可扩展的数据集，并提供真实场景验证数据集评估模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于REGRAD训练的模型在真实场景中能有效检测物体关系和抓取点，验证了数据集的实用性与模型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: REGRAD为关系抓取研究提供了高质量数据支持，有助于推动机器人在复杂环境中的自主抓取能力发展。

search_text: REGRAD: A Large-Scale Relational Grasp Dataset for Safe and Object-Specific Robotic Grasping in Clutter REGRAD：大规模关系抓取数据集，用于在杂乱中安全且特定于对象的机器人抓取 Despite the impressive progress achieved in robotic grasping, robots are not skilled in sophisticated tasks (e.g. search and grasp a specified target in clutter). Such tasks involve not only grasping but the comprehensive perception of the world (e.g. the object relationships). Recently, encouraging results demonstrate that it is possible to understand high-level concepts by learning. However, such algorithms are usually data-intensive, and the lack of data severely limits their performance. In this paper, we present a new dataset named REGRAD for the learning of relationships among objects and grasps. We collect the annotations of object poses, segmentations, grasps, and relationships for the target-driven relational grasping tasks. Our dataset is collected in both forms of 2D images and 3D point clouds. Moreover, since all the data are generated automatically, it is free to import new objects for data generation. We also released a real-world validation dataset to evaluate the sim-to-real performance of models trained on REGRAD. Finally, we conducted a series of experiments, showing that the models trained on REGRAD could generalize well to the realistic scenarios, in terms of both relationship and grasp detection. Our dataset and code could be found at: https://github.com/poisonwine/REGRAD 尽管机器人抓取取得了令人印象深刻的进步，但机器人并不擅长复杂的任务（例如在杂乱中搜索并抓取指定目标）。这些任务不仅涉及抓取，还涉及对世界的全面感知（例如物体关系）。最近，令人鼓舞的结果表明，通过学习理解高级概念是可能的。然而，此类算法通常是数据密集型的，数据的缺乏严重限制了它们的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 REGRAD 的新数据集，用于学习对象和抓取之间的关系。我们收集目标驱动的关系抓取任务的对象姿势、分割、抓取和关系的注释。我们的数据集以 2D 图像和 3D 点云两种形式收集。此外，由于所有数据都是自动生成的，因此可以自由地导入新对象来生成数据。我们还发布了一个真实世界的验证数据集，以评估在 REGRAD 上训练的模型的模拟与真实性能。最后，我们进行了一系列实验，表明在 REGRAD 上训练的模型在关系和抓取检测方面可以很好地推广到现实场景。我们的数据集和代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/poisonwine/REGRAD 本文提出一个名为REGRAD的大规模关系抓取数据集，用于解决机器人在杂乱环境中进行安全且特定物体抓取的复杂任务。 Hanbo Zhang,Deyu Yang,Han Wang,Binglei Zhao,Xuguang Lan,Jishiyu Ding,Nanning Zheng cs.RO,cs.CV

title: Hessian Aware Quantization of Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络的 Hessian 感知量化
comment: ef:International Conference on Neuromorphic Systems 2021 (ICONS 2021), July 27--29, 2021, Knoxville, TN, USA
comments: ef:International Conference on Neuromorphic Systems 2021 (ICONS 2021), July 27--29, 2021, Knoxville, TN, USA
abstract: To achieve the low latency, high throughput, and energy efficiency benefits of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), reducing the memory and compute requirements when running on a neuromorphic hardware is an important step. Neuromorphic architecture allows massively parallel computation with variable and local bit-precisions. However, how different bit-precisions should be allocated to different layers or connections of the network is not trivial. In this work, we demonstrate how a layer-wise Hessian trace analysis can measure the sensitivity of the loss to any perturbation of the layer's weights, and this can be used to guide the allocation of a layer-specific bit-precision when quantizing an SNN. In addition, current gradient based methods of SNN training use a complex neuron model with multiple state variables, which is not ideal for compute and memory efficiency. To address this challenge, we present a simplified neuron model that reduces the number of state variables by 4-fold while still being compatible with gradient based training. We find that the impact on model accuracy when using a layer-wise bit-precision correlated well with that layer's Hessian trace. The accuracy of the optimal quantized network only dropped by 0.2%, yet the network size was reduced by 58%. This reduces memory usage and allows fixed-point arithmetic with simpler digital circuits to be used, increasing the overall throughput and energy efficiency.
summary: To achieve the low latency, high throughput, and energy efficiency benefits of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), reducing the memory and compute requirements when running on a neuromorphic hardware is an important step. Neuromorphic architecture allows massively parallel computation with variable and local bit-precisions. However, how different bit-precisions should be allocated to different layers or connections of the network is not trivial. In this work, we demonstrate how a layer-wise Hessian trace analysis can measure the sensitivity of the loss to any perturbation of the layer's weights, and this can be used to guide the allocation of a layer-specific bit-precision when quantizing an SNN. In addition, current gradient based methods of SNN training use a complex neuron model with multiple state variables, which is not ideal for compute and memory efficiency. To address this challenge, we present a simplified neuron model that reduces the number of state variables by 4-fold while still being compatible with gradient based training. We find that the impact on model accuracy when using a layer-wise bit-precision correlated well with that layer's Hessian trace. The accuracy of the optimal quantized network only dropped by 0.2%, yet the network size was reduced by 58%. This reduces memory usage and allows fixed-point arithmetic with simpler digital circuits to be used, increasing the overall throughput and energy efficiency.
abstract_zh: 为了实现尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 的低延迟、高吞吐量和能效优势，减少在神经形态硬件上运行时的内存和计算要求是重要的一步。神经形态架构允许具有可变和局部位精度的大规模并行计算。然而，如何将不同的位精度分配给网络的不同层或连接并不是微不足道的。在这项工作中，我们演示了分层 Hessian 迹分析如何测量损失对层权重任何扰动的敏感性，这可用于在量化 SNN 时指导特定于层的位精度的分配。此外，当前基于梯度的 SNN 训练方法使用具有多个状态变量的复杂神经元模型，这对于计算和内存效率来说并不理想。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简化的神经元模型，该模型将状态变量的数量减少了 4 倍，同时仍然与基于梯度的训练兼容。我们发现，使用逐层位精度时对模型精度的影响与该层的 Hessian 迹密切相关。最优量化网络的准确率仅下降了0.2%，但网络规模却减少了58%。这减少了内存使用量，并允许使用更简单的数字电路进行定点运算，从而提高整体吞吐量和能源效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Hessian矩阵的分层量化方法，结合简化神经元模型，以提高脉冲神经网络在神经形态硬件上的能效和吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络在神经形态硬件上运行时面临内存占用高、计算复杂度大及量化策略不明确的问题，需优化量化分配方案并简化神经元模型以提升效率。
AI.method: 通过分层Hessian迹分析评估各层权重对损失的敏感度，指导量化位宽分配；同时设计减少4倍状态变量的简化神经元模型，兼容梯度训练。
AI.result: 量化后网络体积缩小58%，精度仅下降0.2%，内存占用降低且支持固定点运算，显著提升吞吐量和能效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡精度与效率，为神经形态硬件部署SNN提供可行方案，未来可探索更动态的量化策略与硬件协同优化。

title: An Automated Approach for Timely Diagnosis and Prognosis of Coronavirus Disease
title_zh: 及时诊断和预测冠状病毒疾病的自动化方法
abstract: Since the outbreak of Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19), most of the impacted patients have been diagnosed with high fever, dry cough, and soar throat leading to severe pneumonia. Hence, to date, the diagnosis of COVID-19 from lung imaging is proved to be a major evidence for early diagnosis of the disease. Although nucleic acid detection using real-time reverse-transcriptase polymerase chain reaction (rRT-PCR) remains a gold standard for the detection of COVID-19, the proposed approach focuses on the automated diagnosis and prognosis of the disease from a non-contrast chest computed tomography (CT)scan for timely diagnosis and triage of the patient. The prognosis covers the quantification and assessment of the disease to help hospitals with the management and planning of crucial resources, such as medical staff, ventilators and intensive care units (ICUs) capacity. The approach utilises deep learning techniques for automated quantification of the severity of COVID-19 disease via measuring the area of multiple rounded ground-glass opacities (GGO) and consolidations in the periphery (CP) of the lungs and accumulating them to form a severity score. The severity of the disease can be correlated with the medicines prescribed during the triage to assess the effectiveness of the treatment. The proposed approach shows promising results where the classification model achieved 93% accuracy on hold-out data.
summary: Since the outbreak of Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19), most of the impacted patients have been diagnosed with high fever, dry cough, and soar throat leading to severe pneumonia. Hence, to date, the diagnosis of COVID-19 from lung imaging is proved to be a major evidence for early diagnosis of the disease. Although nucleic acid detection using real-time reverse-transcriptase polymerase chain reaction (rRT-PCR) remains a gold standard for the detection of COVID-19, the proposed approach focuses on the automated diagnosis and prognosis of the disease from a non-contrast chest computed tomography (CT)scan for timely diagnosis and triage of the patient. The prognosis covers the quantification and assessment of the disease to help hospitals with the management and planning of crucial resources, such as medical staff, ventilators and intensive care units (ICUs) capacity. The approach utilises deep learning techniques for automated quantification of the severity of COVID-19 disease via measuring the area of multiple rounded ground-glass opacities (GGO) and consolidations in the periphery (CP) of the lungs and accumulating them to form a severity score. The severity of the disease can be correlated with the medicines prescribed during the triage to assess the effectiveness of the treatment. The proposed approach shows promising results where the classification model achieved 93% accuracy on hold-out data.
abstract_zh: 自2019年冠状病毒病（COVID-19）爆发以来，大多数受影响的患者被诊断为高烧、干咳和喉咙痛，导致严重肺炎。因此，迄今为止，通过肺部影像诊断COVID-19被证明是该疾病早期诊断的主要证据。尽管使用实时逆转录酶聚合酶链反应 (rRT-PCR) 进行核酸检测仍然是检测 COVID-19 的金标准，但所提出的方法侧重于通过非造影胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描对疾病进行自动诊断和预后，以便及时诊断和对患者进行分诊。预后涵盖疾病的量化和评估，以帮助医院管理和规划关键资源，例如医务人员、呼吸机和重症监护病房 (ICU) 的容量。该方法利用深度学习技术，通过测量多个圆形毛玻璃混浊 (GGO) 和肺部周围实变 (CP) 的面积，并将其累积起来形成严重程度评分，自动量化 COVID-19 疾病的严重程度。疾病的严重程度可以与分诊过程中所​​开的药物相关联，以评估治疗的有效性。所提出的方法显示出有希望的结果，分类模型对保留数据的准确率达到 93%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动化方法，通过非对比增强胸部CT扫描实现COVID-19的及时诊断和预后评估。
AI.motivation: 尽管核酸检测是金标准，但CT影像诊断能更早发现肺部病变，且有助于医院资源分配。现有方法缺乏自动化定量分析手段，难以快速评估病情严重程度。
AI.method: 利用深度学习技术自动量化肺部多发磨玻璃影和实变区域面积，累加生成严重程度评分，结合分类模型实现诊断与预后评估。
AI.result: 分类模型在测试数据集上达到93%的准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升COVID-19患者的分诊效率和治疗效果评估，为医疗资源规划提供数据支持。

motivation: 尽管核酸检测是金标准，但CT影像诊断能更早发现肺部病变，且有助于医院资源分配。现有方法缺乏自动化定量分析手段，难以快速评估病情严重程度。
method: 利用深度学习技术自动量化肺部多发磨玻璃影和实变区域面积，累加生成严重程度评分，结合分类模型实现诊断与预后评估。
result: 分类模型在测试数据集上达到93%的准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: 该方法可提升COVID-19患者的分诊效率和治疗效果评估，为医疗资源规划提供数据支持。
search_text: An Automated Approach for Timely Diagnosis and Prognosis of Coronavirus Disease 及时诊断和预测冠状病毒疾病的自动化方法 Since the outbreak of Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19), most of the impacted patients have been diagnosed with high fever, dry cough, and soar throat leading to severe pneumonia. Hence, to date, the diagnosis of COVID-19 from lung imaging is proved to be a major evidence for early diagnosis of the disease. Although nucleic acid detection using real-time reverse-transcriptase polymerase chain reaction (rRT-PCR) remains a gold standard for the detection of COVID-19, the proposed approach focuses on the automated diagnosis and prognosis of the disease from a non-contrast chest computed tomography (CT)scan for timely diagnosis and triage of the patient. The prognosis covers the quantification and assessment of the disease to help hospitals with the management and planning of crucial resources, such as medical staff, ventilators and intensive care units (ICUs) capacity. The approach utilises deep learning techniques for automated quantification of the severity of COVID-19 disease via measuring the area of multiple rounded ground-glass opacities (GGO) and consolidations in the periphery (CP) of the lungs and accumulating them to form a severity score. The severity of the disease can be correlated with the medicines prescribed during the triage to assess the effectiveness of the treatment. The proposed approach shows promising results where the classification model achieved 93% accuracy on hold-out data. 自2019年冠状病毒病（COVID-19）爆发以来，大多数受影响的患者被诊断为高烧、干咳和喉咙痛，导致严重肺炎。因此，迄今为止，通过肺部影像诊断COVID-19被证明是该疾病早期诊断的主要证据。尽管使用实时逆转录酶聚合酶链反应 (rRT-PCR) 进行核酸检测仍然是检测 COVID-19 的金标准，但所提出的方法侧重于通过非造影胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描对疾病进行自动诊断和预后，以便及时诊断和对患者进行分诊。预后涵盖疾病的量化和评估，以帮助医院管理和规划关键资源，例如医务人员、呼吸机和重症监护病房 (ICU) 的容量。该方法利用深度学习技术，通过测量多个圆形毛玻璃混浊 (GGO) 和肺部周围实变 (CP) 的面积，并将其累积起来形成严重程度评分，自动量化 COVID-19 疾病的严重程度。疾病的严重程度可以与分诊过程中所​​开的药物相关联，以评估治疗的有效性。所提出的方法显示出有希望的结果，分类模型对保留数据的准确率达到 93%。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动化方法，通过非对比增强胸部CT扫描实现COVID-19的及时诊断和预后评估。 Abbas Raza Ali,Marcin Budka eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jingkai Zhou,Varun Jampani,Zhixiong Pi,Qiong Liu,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: Decoupled Dynamic Filter Networks
title_zh: 解耦动态滤波器网络
abstract: Convolution is one of the basic building blocks of CNN architectures. Despite its common use, standard convolution has two main shortcomings: Content-agnostic and Computation-heavy. Dynamic filters are content-adaptive, while further increasing the computational overhead. Depth-wise convolution is a lightweight variant, but it usually leads to a drop in CNN performance or requires a larger number of channels. In this work, we propose the Decoupled Dynamic Filter (DDF) that can simultaneously tackle both of these shortcomings. Inspired by recent advances in attention, DDF decouples a depth-wise dynamic filter into spatial and channel dynamic filters. This decomposition considerably reduces the number of parameters and limits computational costs to the same level as depth-wise convolution. Meanwhile, we observe a significant boost in performance when replacing standard convolution with DDF in classification networks. ResNet50 / 101 get improved by 1.9% and 1.3% on the top-1 accuracy, while their computational costs are reduced by nearly half. Experiments on the detection and joint upsampling networks also demonstrate the superior performance of the DDF upsampling variant (DDF-Up) in comparison with standard convolution and specialized content-adaptive layers.
summary: Convolution is one of the basic building blocks of CNN architectures. Despite its common use, standard convolution has two main shortcomings: Content-agnostic and Computation-heavy. Dynamic filters are content-adaptive, while further increasing the computational overhead. Depth-wise convolution is a lightweight variant, but it usually leads to a drop in CNN performance or requires a larger number of channels. In this work, we propose the Decoupled Dynamic Filter (DDF) that can simultaneously tackle both of these shortcomings. Inspired by recent advances in attention, DDF decouples a depth-wise dynamic filter into spatial and channel dynamic filters. This decomposition considerably reduces the number of parameters and limits computational costs to the same level as depth-wise convolution. Meanwhile, we observe a significant boost in performance when replacing standard convolution with DDF in classification networks. ResNet50 / 101 get improved by 1.9% and 1.3% on the top-1 accuracy, while their computational costs are reduced by nearly half. Experiments on the detection and joint upsampling networks also demonstrate the superior performance of the DDF upsampling variant (DDF-Up) in comparison with standard convolution and specialized content-adaptive layers.
abstract_zh: 卷积是 CNN 架构的基本构建模块之一。尽管标准卷积被广泛使用，但它有两个主要缺点：内容不可知和计算量大。动态过滤器是内容自适应的，同时进一步增加了计算开销。深度卷积是一种轻量级的变体，但它通常会导致 CNN 性能下降或需要更多通道数。在这项工作中，我们提出了解耦动态滤波器（DDF），它可以同时解决这两个缺点。受注意力最近进展的启发，DDF 将深度动态滤波器解耦为空间和通道动态滤波器。这种分解大大减少了参数数量，并将计算成本限制在与深度卷积相同的水平。同时，我们观察到在分类网络中用 DDF 替换标准卷积时性能显着提升。 ResNet50 / 101 在 top-1 精度上分别提高了 1.9% 和 1.3%，同时计算成本降低了近一半。检测和联合上采样网络的实验还证明了 DDF 上采样变体 (DDF-Up) 与标准卷积和专门的内容自适应层相比具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解耦动态滤波网络（DDF），旨在解决卷积神经网络中标准卷积存在的内容无关性和计算量大的问题。
AI.motivation: 标准卷积存在内容无关性和计算量大的缺陷，动态滤波虽内容自适应但计算开销大，深度可分离卷积则可能降低性能或需要更多通道。
AI.method: 受注意力机制启发，将深度可分离动态滤波器分解为空间和通道动态滤波器，显著减少参数量并控制计算成本与深度可分离卷积相当。
AI.result: 在分类网络中，ResNet50/101的top-1准确率分别提升1.9%和1.3%，计算成本减少近半；检测和上采样网络中DDF-Up也表现出色。
AI.conclusion: DDF有效平衡了计算效率与性能，为设计高效CNN架构提供了新思路。

title: Vehicular Teamwork: Collaborative localization of Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 车辆团队合作：自动驾驶车辆的协作本地化
abstract: This paper develops a distributed collaborative localization algorithm based on an extended kalman filter. This algorithm incorporates Ultra-Wideband (UWB) measurements for vehicle to vehicle ranging, and shows improvements in localization accuracy where GPS typically falls short. The algorithm was first tested in a newly created open-source simulation environment that emulates various numbers of vehicles and sensors while simultaneously testing multiple localization algorithms. Predicted error distributions for various algorithms are quickly producible using the Monte-Carlo method and optimization techniques within MatLab. The simulation results were validated experimentally in an outdoor, urban environment. Improvements of localization accuracy over a typical extended kalman filter ranged from 2.9% to 9.3% over 180 meter test runs. When GPS was denied, these improvements increased up to 83.3% over a standard kalman filter. In both simulation and experimentally, the DCL algorithm was shown to be a good approximation of a full state filter, while reducing required communication between vehicles. These results are promising in showing the efficacy of adding UWB ranging sensors to cars for collaborative and landmark localization, especially in GPS-denied environments. In the future, additional moving vehicles with additional tags will be tested in other challenging GPS denied environments.
summary: This paper develops a distributed collaborative localization algorithm based on an extended kalman filter. This algorithm incorporates Ultra-Wideband (UWB) measurements for vehicle to vehicle ranging, and shows improvements in localization accuracy where GPS typically falls short. The algorithm was first tested in a newly created open-source simulation environment that emulates various numbers of vehicles and sensors while simultaneously testing multiple localization algorithms. Predicted error distributions for various algorithms are quickly producible using the Monte-Carlo method and optimization techniques within MatLab. The simulation results were validated experimentally in an outdoor, urban environment. Improvements of localization accuracy over a typical extended kalman filter ranged from 2.9% to 9.3% over 180 meter test runs. abstract_zh: 本文开发了一种基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器的分布式协作定位算法。该算法结合了用于车辆到车辆测距的超宽带 (UWB) 测量，并显示出 GPS 通常达不到的定位精度的改进。该算法首先在新创建的开源模拟环境中进行测试，该环境模拟各种数量的车辆和传感器，同时测试多种定位算法。使用 MatLab 中的蒙特卡罗方法和优化技术可以快速生成各种算法的预测误差分布。模拟结果在室外城市环境中进行了实验验证。在 180 米的测试运行中，与典型的扩展卡尔曼滤波器相比，定位精度提高了 2.9% 至 9.3%。当 GPS 被拒绝时，这些改进比标准卡尔曼滤波器提高了 83.3%。在仿真和实验中，DCL 算法被证明是全状态滤波器的良好近似，同时减少了车辆之间所需的通信。这些结果有望展示在汽车上添加 UWB 测距传感器以实现协作和地标定位的功效，特别是在 GPS 无法使用的环境中。未来，带有附加标签的更多移动车辆将在其他具有挑战性的 GPS 拒绝环境中进行测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的分布式协作定位算法，结合UWB测距技术提升自动驾驶车辆在GPS信号不足环境下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在GPS信号弱或被阻断的场景中存在定位精度不足的问题，需通过协作定位技术提升可靠性。
AI.method: 开发分布式协作定位算法（DCL），融合UWB车辆间测距数据与扩展卡尔曼滤波，通过开源仿真环境与户外实验验证，并采用蒙特卡洛方法分析误差分布。
AI.result: 仿真与实验显示，DCL算法在180米测试中定位精度较传统EKF提升2.9%-9.3%，GPS禁用时提升达83.3%，且通信开销更低。
AI.conclusion: DCL算法有效提升协作定位性能，尤其适用于GPS受限环境，未来计划在更复杂场景中验证多车辆协同效果。

In the future, additional moving vehicles with additional tags will be tested in other challenging GPS denied environments. 本文开发了一种基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器的分布式协作定位算法。该算法结合了用于车辆到车辆测距的超宽带 (UWB) 测量，并显示出 GPS 通常达不到的定位精度的改进。该算法首先在新创建的开源模拟环境中进行测试，该环境模拟各种数量的车辆和传感器，同时测试多种定位算法。使用 MatLab 中的蒙特卡罗方法和优化技术可以快速生成各种算法的预测误差分布。模拟结果在室外城市环境中进行了实验验证。在 180 米的测试运行中，与典型的扩展卡尔曼滤波器相比，定位精度提高了 2.9% 至 9.3%。当 GPS 被拒绝时，这些改进比标准卡尔曼滤波器提高了 83.3%。在仿真和实验中，DCL 算法被证明是全状态滤波器的良好近似，同时减少了车辆之间所需的通信。这些结果有望展示在汽车上添加 UWB 测距传感器以实现协作和地标定位的功效，特别是在 GPS 无法使用的环境中。未来，带有附加标签的更多移动车辆将在其他具有挑战性的 GPS 拒绝环境中进行测试。 本文提出一种基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的分布式协作定位算法，结合UWB测距技术提升自动驾驶车辆在GPS信号不足环境下的定位精度。 Jacob Hartzer,Srikanth Saripalli cs.RO

title: AutoCone: An OmniDirectional Robot for Lane-Level Cone Placement
title_zh: AutoCone：用于车道级锥体放置的全向机器人
abstract: This paper summarizes the progress in developing a rugged, low-cost, automated ground cone robot network capable of traffic delineation at lane-level precision. A holonomic omnidirectional base with a traffic delineator was developed to allow flexibility in initialization. RTK GPS was utilized to reduce minimum position error to 2 centimeters. Due to recent developments, the cost of the platform is now less than $1,600. To minimize the effects of GPS-denied environments, wheel encoders and an Extended Kalman Filter were implemented to maintain lane-level accuracy during operation and a maximum error of 1.97 meters through 50 meters with little to no GPS signal. Future work includes increasing the operational speed of the platforms, incorporating lanelet information for path planning, and cross-platform estimation.
summary: This paper summarizes the progress in developing a rugged, low-cost, automated ground cone robot network capable of traffic delineation at lane-level precision. A holonomic omnidirectional base with a traffic delineator was developed to allow flexibility in initialization. RTK GPS was utilized to reduce minimum position error to 2 centimeters. Due to recent developments, the cost of the platform is now less than $1,600. To minimize the effects of GPS-denied environments, wheel encoders and an Extended Kalman Filter were implemented to maintain lane-level accuracy during operation and a maximum error of 1.97 meters through 50 meters with little to no GPS signal. Future work includes increasing the operational speed of the platforms, incorporating lanelet information for path planning, and cross-platform estimation.
abstract_zh: 本文总结了开发坚固耐用、低成本、自动化地面锥体机器人网络的进展，该网络能够以车道级精度进行交通描绘。开发了带有交通轮廓线的完整全向底座，以实现初始化的灵活性。利用RTK GPS将最小位置误差减少至2厘米。由于最近的发展，该平台的成本现已低于 1,600 美元。为了最大限度地减少 GPS 干扰环境的影响，采用了车轮编码器和扩展卡尔曼滤波器，以在操作过程中保持车道级精度，并在几乎没有 GPS 信号的情况下保持 1.97 米到 50 米的最大误差。未来的工作包括提高平台的运行速度、纳入路径规划的车道信息以及跨平台估计。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为AutoCone的全方位机器人，用于以车道级精度进行交通锥放置。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在开发一种低成本、耐用的自动化地面锥形机器人网络，以实现车道级精度的交通标线。
AI.method: 开发了一种全向全方位底盘和交通标线器，结合RTK GPS以减少位置误差，并使用轮编码器和扩展卡尔曼滤波器以在GPS信号缺失时保持车道级精度。
AI.result: 该平台的成本低于1600美元，最大误差在50米内为1.97米，即使在几乎没有GPS信号的情况下也能保持车道级精度。
AI.conclusion: 未来的工作包括提高平台的运行速度，结合车道信息进行路径规划以及跨平台估计。

authors_text: Shravan Murlidaran,William Yang Wang,Miguel P. Eckstein
title: Comparing Visual Reasoning in Humans and AI
title_zh: 比较人类和人工智能的视觉推理
abstract: Recent advances in natural language processing and computer vision have led to AI models that interpret simple scenes at human levels. Yet, we do not have a complete understanding of how humans and AI models differ in their interpretation of more complex scenes. We created a dataset of complex scenes that contained human behaviors and social interactions. AI and humans had to describe the scenes with a sentence. We used a quantitative metric of similarity between scene descriptions of the AI/human and ground truth of five other human descriptions of each scene. Results show that the machine/human agreement scene descriptions are much lower than human/human agreement for our complex scenes. Using an experimental manipulation that occludes different spatial regions of the scenes, we assessed how machines and humans vary in utilizing regions of images to understand the scenes. Together, our results are a first step toward understanding how machines fall short of human visual reasoning with complex scenes depicting human behaviors.
summary: Recent advances in natural language processing and computer vision have led to AI models that interpret simple scenes at human levels. Yet, we do not have a complete understanding of how humans and AI models differ in their interpretation of more complex scenes. We created a dataset of complex scenes that contained human behaviors and social interactions. AI and humans had to describe the scenes with a sentence. We used a quantitative metric of similarity between scene descriptions of the AI/human and ground truth of five other human descriptions of each scene. Results show that the machine/human agreement scene descriptions are much lower than human/human agreement for our complex scenes. Using an experimental manipulation that occludes different spatial regions of the scenes, we assessed how machines and humans vary in utilizing regions of images to understand the scenes. Together, our results are a first step toward understanding how machines fall short of human visual reasoning with complex scenes depicting human behaviors.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理和计算机视觉的最新进展催生了能够在人类水平上解释简单场景的人工智能模型。然而，我们还没有完全了解人类和人工智能模型在解释更复杂的场景时有何不同。我们创建了一个包含人类行为和社交互动的复杂场景的数据集。人工智能和人类必须用一句话来描述场景。我们使用了人工智能/人类的场景描述与每个场景的其他五个人类描述的基本事实之间的相似性的定量度量。结果表明，对于复杂的场景，机器/人类场景描述的一致性远低于人类/人类的一致性。通过遮挡场景不同空间区域的实验操作，我们评估了机器和人类在利用图像区域来理解场景方面的差异。总之，我们的结果是理解机器如何在描述人类行为的复杂场景中无法进行人类视觉推理的第一步。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了人类和AI在复杂场景中的视觉推理能力，通过分析描述差异和图像区域利用方式。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在简单场景中表现接近人类，但对复杂包含人类行为和社会互动的场景理解仍存在差距，需进一步研究。
AI.method: 构建包含复杂场景的数据集，让AI和人类生成场景描述，并通过与其他人类描述的相似度指标进行量化比较；通过遮挡实验分析图像区域利用差异。
AI.result: AI与人类的描述一致性显著低于人类之间的一致性，且AI在利用图像区域理解场景时与人类存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了AI在复杂场景视觉推理中的不足，为改进AI模型提供了方向。

title: A Normal Form Characterization for Efficient Boolean Skolem Function Synthesis
title_zh: 高效布尔 Skolem 函数综合的范式表征
comment: Full version of conference paper accepted at LICS'2021
comments: Full version of conference paper accepted at LICS'2021
abstract: Boolean Skolem function synthesis concerns synthesizing outputs as Boolean functions of inputs such that a relational specification between inputs and outputs is satisfied. This problem, also known as Boolean functional synthesis, has several applications, including design of safe controllers for autonomous systems, certified QBF solving, cryptanalysis etc. Recently, complexity theoretic hardness results have been shown for the problem, although several algorithms proposed in the literature are known to work well in practice. This dichotomy between theoretical hardness and practical efficacy has motivated the research into normal forms or representations of input specifications that permit efficient synthesis, thus explaining perhaps the efficacy of these algorithms. In this paper we go one step beyond this and ask if there exists a normal form representation that can in fact precisely characterize "efficient" synthesis. We present a normal form called SAUNF that precisely characterizes tractable synthesis in the following sense: a specification is polynomial time synthesizable iff it can be compiled to SAUNF in polynomial time. Additionally, a specification admits a polynomial-sized functional solution iff there exists a semantically equivalent polynomial-sized SAUNF representation. SAUNF is exponentially more succinct than well-established normal forms like BDDs and DNNFs, used in the context of AI problems, and strictly subsumes other more recently proposed forms like SynNNF. It enjoys compositional properties that are similar to those of DNNF. Thus, SAUNF provides the right trade-off in knowledge representation for Boolean functional synthesis.
summary: Boolean Skolem function synthesis concerns synthesizing outputs as Boolean functions of inputs such that a relational specification between inputs and outputs is satisfied. This problem, also known as Boolean functional synthesis, has several applications, including design of safe controllers for autonomous systems, certified QBF solving, cryptanalysis etc. Recently, complexity theoretic hardness results have been shown for the problem, although several algorithms proposed in the literature are known to work well in practice. This dichotomy between theoretical hardness and practical efficacy has motivated the research into normal forms or representations of input specifications that permit efficient synthesis, thus explaining perhaps the efficacy of these algorithms. In this paper we go one step beyond this and ask if there exists a normal form representation that can in fact precisely characterize "efficient" synthesis. We present a normal form called SAUNF that precisely characterizes tractable synthesis in the following sense: a specification is polynomial time synthesizable iff it can be compiled to SAUNF in polynomial time. Additionally, a specification admits a polynomial-sized functional solution iff there exists a semantically equivalent polynomial-sized SAUNF representation. SAUNF is exponentially more succinct than well-established normal forms like BDDs and DNNFs, used in the context of AI problems, and strictly subsumes other more recently proposed forms like SynNNF. It enjoys compositional properties that are similar to those of DNNF. Thus, SAUNF provides the right trade-off in knowledge representation for Boolean functional synthesis.
abstract_zh: 布尔斯科伦函数综合涉及将输出综合为输入的布尔函数，从而满足输入和输出之间的关系规范。这个问题也称为布尔函数综合，有多种应用，包括自主系统的安全控制器设计、经过认证的 QBF 求解、密码分析等。最近，该问题的复杂性理论硬度结果已被证明，尽管已知文献中提出的几种算法在实践中效果良好。理论难度和实际功效之间的这种二分法激发了对允许有效合成的输入规范的范式或表示的研究，从而解释了这些算法的功效。在本文中，我们更进一步，询问是否存在一种范式表示，实际上可以精确地表征“高效”综合。我们提出了一种称为 SAUNF 的范式，它在以下意义上精确地描述了易于处理的综合：一个规范是多项式时间可综合的，当且仅当它可以在多项式时间内编译为 SAUNF。此外，规范承认多项式大小的函数解，当且仅当存在语义上等效的多项式大小的 SAUNF 表示。 SAUNF 比在 AI 问题中使用的 BDD 和 DNNF 等成熟的范式要简洁得多，并且严格包含了其他最近提出的形式（如 SynNNF）。它具有与 DNNF 相似的成分特性。因此，SAUNF 为布尔函数综合提供了知识表示的正确权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAUNF的范式，用于精确表征布尔斯科伦函数合成的高效性。
AI.motivation: 布尔斯科伦函数合成在理论上具有复杂性，但实际算法表现良好，需寻找能精确表征高效合成的范式以解释这一现象。
AI.method: 提出SAUNF范式，并证明其与多项式时间可合成性之间的等价性，同时比较其与其他范式的简洁性与表达能力。
AI.result: SAUNF范式在多项式时间内可编译且能捕获可合成性，其表达能力优于BDD、DNNF等现有范式，且具有组合性质。
AI.conclusion: SAUNF为布尔函数合成提供了知识表示的最优平衡，兼顾效率与表达能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAUNF的范式，用于精确表征布尔斯科伦函数合成的高效性。
ai_content.motivation: 布尔斯科伦函数合成在理论上具有复杂性，但实际算法表现良好，需寻找能精确表征高效合成的范式以解释这一现象。
ai_content.method: 提出SAUNF范式，并证明其与多项式时间可合成性之间的等价性，同时比较其与其他范式的简洁性与表达能力。
ai_content.result: SAUNF范式在多项式时间内可编译且能捕获可合成性，其表达能力优于BDD、DNNF等现有范式，且具有组合性质。
ai_content.conclusion: SAUNF为布尔函数合成提供了知识表示的最优平衡，兼顾效率与表达能力。

search_text: A Normal Form Characterization for Efficient Boolean Skolem Function Synthesis 高效布尔 Skolem 函数综合的范式表征 Boolean Skolem function synthesis concerns synthesizing outputs as Boolean functions of inputs such that a relational specification between inputs and outputs is satisfied. This problem, also known as Boolean functional synthesis, has several applications, including design of safe controllers for autonomous systems, certified QBF solving, cryptanalysis etc. Recently, complexity theoretic hardness results have been shown for the problem, although several algorithms proposed in the literature are known to work well in practice. This dichotomy between theoretical hardness and practical efficacy has motivated the research into normal forms or representations of input specifications that permit efficient synthesis, thus explaining perhaps the efficacy of these algorithms. In this paper we go one step beyond this and ask if there exists a normal form representation that can in fact precisely characterize "efficient" synthesis. We present a normal form called SAUNF that precisely characterizes tractable synthesis in the following sense: a specification is polynomial time synthesizable iff it can be compiled to SAUNF in polynomial time. Additionally, a specification admits a polynomial-sized functional solution iff there exists a semantically equivalent polynomial-sized SAUNF representation. SAUNF is exponentially more succinct than well-established normal forms like BDDs and DNNFs, used in the context of AI problems, and strictly subsumes other more recently proposed forms like SynNNF. It enjoys compositional properties that are similar to those of DNNF. Thus, SAUNF provides the right trade-off in knowledge representation for Boolean functional synthesis. 布尔斯科伦函数综合涉及将输出综合为输入的布尔函数，从而满足输入和输出之间的关系规范。这个问题也称为布尔函数综合，有多种应用，包括自主系统的安全控制器设计、经过认证的 QBF 求解、密码分析等。最近，该问题的复杂性理论硬度结果已被证明，尽管已知文献中提出的几种算法在实践中效果良好。理论难度和实际功效之间的这种二分法激发了对允许有效合成的输入规范的范式或表示的研究，从而解释了这些算法的功效。在本文中，我们更进一步，询问是否存在一种范式表示，实际上可以精确地表征“高效”综合。我们提出了一种称为 SAUNF 的范式，它在以下意义上精确地描述了易于处理的综合：一个规范是多项式时间可综合的，当且仅当它可以在多项式时间内编译为 SAUNF。此外，规范承认多项式大小的函数解，当且仅当存在语义上等效的多项式大小的 SAUNF 表示。 SAUNF 比在 AI 问题中使用的 BDD 和 DNNF 等成熟的范式要简洁得多，并且严格包含了其他最近提出的形式（如 SynNNF）。它具有与 DNNF 相似的成分特性。因此，SAUNF 为布尔函数综合提供了知识表示的正确权衡。 本文提出了一种名为SAUNF的范式，用于精确表征布尔斯科伦函数合成的高效性。 Preey Shah,Aman Bansal,S. Akshay,Supratik Chakraborty cs.LO,cs.AI
